While my Democratic opponents are focused on how quickly they can raise your taxes with pie-in-the-sky policy proposals, we're focused on the issues that matter most to Marylanders: public safety, education, jobs, and the economy.
As your governor, _we'll make our state safer by supporting our brave men and women in law enforcement with the resources and training they need._ I'll fight to make sure criminals, especially repeat violent offenders, remain behind bars where they belong.
As a mom, I value the importance of steady, consistent leadership in our education system so that our kids can find their own path to prosperity. I introduced a Parental Bill of Rights, which serves as a blueprint to ensure that parents are empowered and that every child has the opportunity to succeed.
The moment I step into the office as governor, we're going to fight every single day to make our state more affordable. _That not only includes standing up to tax increases, but fighting for tax cuts every year I am in office. __ _
[We have made incredible progress but I need your help. Will you consider a contribution to my campaign today?](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86naEfiltj4tjrvBZnp0p70LuPVY0rrJy01RMzbi0MLXtITDbWWQX6wwfGNBKyu1M-2FfM-2FFeGjhkCl-2FIo-2FOfuO1bA-3D-3Dlddq_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6rVHIeOHsNm9blL9G6o-2BNtRXAcuAuNquCz3egCKcHffT0C7flpErb4wF8qSOp71VOqPBxvMeVS2XXk62fdMlAq5BfLAY-2FxgjziwHEOiNZsk229kXzuxmy3xC0yjHneAHnSy4PKPvOwldMrvdaQ7kkrntgUIjywNR0-2B36qiNOAGUS1-2FLKLGIDou67F7tX2xnW-2FIedxoRwu-2BG2jS9QNESjdcfbnNw9qxHUNEMGSTGIGpszuhK1G-2BPkaBNIZB2tef0dQbh1TdRT5yNuRUZOwqmXGTan0cyz2UBZ5dlgjwsWfASKsOvxHBmcH0gXc-2BkbS03ptwtEJfx2HdZassdU9LeZHzgMoE1CyJXYqELnTZIl6fNjwGuRm8ITwJFxzJiKHgjiD88kcuEPZupYKyMeJnZvQkXRaf-2FLT18JWGYp7ZUJWQX0p4SWKx141aJGFt4Kr9Wozbi8VuvXVcgsIMDW-2FJJr0qRtQn0oirQV5MS-2BlJpIBLw-2BtDNAJlHaEtE5iM12ltUPZdW-2BeQ-2FBw2WtF9Sd4krMTXr2nAxhnxxXyDNv6-2BsrIPh7oLowmYn9opXiO1Y-2BvYxTQC5ivCmuaF2ZCn7QzLRPhHP6srj6jX-2FmBCkb6z46bczkydE5rTMAgYdGPwoigCf5Jhx-2FQQ0KQWtTEl2Msq2yZ6F14hS6LTr1GhjBVAANJEKeZtUi2KmF7afj-2FZkP0Y4G4UrHwrowdTXHXclHoggJqXUCXLlpJsBupmhIeaKsDl6XQBPLjA5cl22PEEOyUH0IVRmFcG01-2FnFBAniPXA6Vva70PLhnb5c-2FgzJ1KKNb-2BSpaDiQpnWcGLmfN3c1xMcw01)

clean_body: | | | | This morning I had the opportunity to discuss my campaign on Fox 5 DC Dear Friend, This morning I had the opportunity to discuss my campaign on Fox 5 DC. While my Democratic opponents are focused on how quickly they can raise your taxes with pie-in-the-sky policy proposals, we're focused on the issues that matter most to Marylanders: public safety, education, jobs, and the economy. As your governor, we'll make our state safer by supporting our brave men and women in law enforcement with the resources and training they need. I'll fight to make sure criminals, especially repeat violent offenders, remain behind bars where they belong. As a mom, I value the importance of steady, consistent leadership in our education system so that our kids can find their own path to prosperity. I introduced a Parental Bill of Rights, which serves as a blueprint to ensure that parents are empowered and that every child has the opportunity to succeed. The moment I step into the office as governor, we're going to fight every single day to make our state more affordable. That not only includes standing up to tax increases, but fighting for tax cuts every year I am in office. Thank you, | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is proud to have been a part of passing the largest tax cut in the Mississippi's history. We fight every day for you to keep more of your money. We believe that people, not government, know best how to spend their own money. When people keep more of their hard-earned money, jobs and economic growth will flourish in the free market system. Highlights of the income tax compromise plan include:
* Eliminating the 4% tax bracket by 2023
* Single income taxpayers do not pay taxes on first $18,300 of income
* Married filers do not pay taxes on first $36,600 of income
* 5% bracket cut to 4.7% by 2024, 4.4% by 2025 and 4.0% by 2026
* Provides tax relief of $525 million per year by 2026

---
| |
---
| Read More About the Freedom Caucus
---
We are the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi.

| I know it’s the weekend so we’ll keep this short. But we wanted to suggest five reasons you should contribute $5 to Jevin’s grassroots movement.

**1.** **Jevin is a champion for education**. As the President of Arizona’s oldest Head Start, Jevin knows first hand how valuable education is. He will fight in Congress to ensure every Arizonan has this opportunity.

**2.** As the COVID pandemic showed us, our healthcare system has centuries of racial, gender, and geographic inequalities. **Jevin will be a voice for the voiceless in Congress** to break down these systemic inequities.

**3.** David Schweikert, Jevin’s opponent, has publicly supported January 6th insurrectionists. He is someone who should not be trusted to uphold the pillars of our democracy. Your contributions ensure that AZ-01 can **have the honest leader we deserve: Jevin Hodge.**

**4.** President Biden won this district by 1.5%, which means that **this is one of the best opportunities nationwide to flip a seat blue** and ensure a Democratic majority in the House.

**5\. Jevin cares deeply about our community.** He was raised in Tempe by his mother, Berdetta, and he will fight tirelessly to give back to the community that has given him a chance at a better life.

[_**Are those reason’s enough to support Jevin? (Spoiler Alert: they are!) Please, join us in pitching in to Jevin’s people-powered movement by contributing $5 now!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43995090/339645142/-1304906161?refcode=BLU-HODG-20220410-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2UzZDI1Yi0zY2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04cPIHA9iTTJzGRB8aUdf85D0UxPf3LOQ0KzlrJpbUc=)

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097941:J8yImuoNV:m:1:3317145305:BC414BDD8BDA2187575AFEA281689610:r)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097941:J8yImuoNV:m:1:3317145305:BC414BDD8BDA2187575AFEA281689610:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097941:J8yImuoNV:m:1:3317145305:BC414BDD8BDA2187575AFEA281689610:r)

At this critical time in our nation's history, we need leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our nation's interest to the highest bidder.

I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097941:J8yImuoNV:m:1:3317145305:BC414BDD8BDA2187575AFEA281689610:r)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097941:J8yImuoNV:m:1:3317145305:BC414BDD8BDA2187575AFEA281689610:r)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097941:J8yImuoNV:m:1:3317145305:BC414BDD8BDA2187575AFEA281689610:r)**

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an Official Founding Supporter. This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win. At this critical time in our nation's history, we need leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government, America-last agenda. This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our nation's interest to the highest bidder. I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country. I just have one simple question for you: WILL YOU JOIN ME? Thank you & God Bless America. Sarah Palin | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. name: Genesis 123 Foundation
subject: Passover 2022
body:
**URGENT PASSOVER APPEAL** As Passover approaches, Jews around the world celebrate our redemption from slavery in Egypt, and the return to Israel. Sadly, due to the current state of global affairs, far too many Jews have been displaced and won't be home to celebrate. Most of the Jews of Ukraine will be celebrating in exile, or attempting to live through the Festival of Freedom in a war zone. For a Jew, not being home on Passover is of tremendous significance, akin to a Christian not being home for Christmas. **[The Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating the Exodus in exile.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097923:666wyuoNz:m:1:3253819041:CA57A13ACA99E15C5D80983870662157:r "The
Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide
urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating the Exodus in exile.")** In Poland, there have been so many refugees that the Jewish population in Poland has increased by hundreds of percent. The Jewish community there has been working tirelessly to provide for the needs of all refugees, Jews and non-Jews. The rabbi in Krakow said they are so overwhelmed that they haven't begun to prepare for Passover which usually takes time, because they're just so busy finding food, warm clothes and places for the refugees to sleep. **[In these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097923:666wyuoNz:m:1:3253819041:CA57A13ACA99E15C5D80983870662157:r "In
these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.")** I hope you can find it in your heart to provide urgent support for the citizens of Ukraine, those who are still fighting for their country and those who have become refugees, Jews and non-Jews. All of them are desperately seeking to survive this atrocity and we are doing our part to ease their suffering now, and for Passover. **[Please help us today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60097923:666wyuoNz:m:1:3253819041:CA57A13ACA99E15C5D80983870662157:r "Please help us today!")** May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
---

body:

There is no more time for politics or politicians, as usual, I am NO politician and NEVER will be.The day of the career politician is _over_. [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyykjdky-bjututkitk-t/) I'm going to bring that same firepower to the halls of Congress to take out the RINOs and career politicians who are content to see our freedom and liberty destroyed!But I can't get there alone...I need your help. So, please, will you have my back in the fight to defend our Constitutional rights? name: Tom Brejcha
subject: He exposed Planned Parenthood and got arrested
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z918jnvmdi4equb7e708t6vg57mfj6mhbd7uf5m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1phkecq64c3kedijcstmekp79d30chj67ddme9qe0tr2c9ij6ttmetin5cb361jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9d9jc1p72phksapm9ptgmlin49fg)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaejg6vnjqpktkke0l32f1vtgucbvom5phgsa5ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z891g5trb8cs3r76mmg5jcmqhu7bfcep53dju3og_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4vnkqujsqc0vf6ucfpsv7f5eod8md4sdede9u18_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00butl84pda7br1cbheolcmuq9ph13vcpmt1vc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhptb4egeodmuoao9rlp65md22d3hp3uo26j9ck8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztk6n6l8jdlrr6s12arouk6e6kcdof1c0eqqmbag_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm6ubp9ha8uta57ovjqu7afhr1d2eto1tpe0eol0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi99437bk01pvtp8qaj83el5s2k7jhepojh5jhn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfdgrrnjfq8l88ncjoi9a7gvdbe0pcpo6kditt3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zousjouiadtrdp3gscbsr4unm5fgfi6v3m3ciao0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdjm8oj6cjh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

name: Coach Lou Holtz
subject: Will you honor them this May?
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100293:6wIeEuoNH:m:1:3317145305:3A4627E590A51AE288F3A2D59B392657:r)
---
| | Peter, You know me best as the former head football coach of the Notre Dame Fighting Irish and the South Carolina Gamecocks. But before I led six different college football programs to bowl games, I served in the military, like my father before me. I love this country. I love our freedom. And I love our way of life. Yet too often, we take America's blessings for granted and forget the supreme sacrifice of our fallen heroes -- men and women in the military who fought and died for our freedom. **This year, my friends at the American Veterans Center are again hosting the National Memorial Day Parade...the LARGEST Memorial Day event in America, with more than 5,000 veterans and service members marching in Washington, D.C.** [_**Will you help honor America's fallen heroes at this year's National Memorial Day Parade by sending a tax-deductible donation of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100293:6wIeEuoNH:m:1:3317145305:3A4627E590A51AE288F3A2D59B392657:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100293:6wIeEuoNH:m:1:3317145305:3A4627E590A51AE288F3A2D59B392657:r)
---
If you've ever attended, watched on TV, or heard about this parade before, then you know that it is America's most spectacular and beloved Memorial Day celebration.
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100293:6wIeEuoNH:m:1:3317145305:3A4627E590A51AE288F3A2D59B392657:r)
---
|
---
| | Greeting troops at the 2019 Memorial Day Parade
---
The National Memorial Day Parade brings together more than 5,000 veterans and service members to march in the event. It welcomes more than 200,000 patriotic Americans to the live event on Constitution Avenue in D.C. And it records and broadcasts this special and exciting ceremony for millions more. _But the American Veterans Center can only put on this important event with YOUR help._ [**Please join me in supporting this year's National Memorial Day Parade with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today. If you ask me, that's a small price to pay to properly honor those who died defending our country, freedom, and way of life.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100293:6wIeEuoNH:m:1:3317145305:3A4627E590A51AE288F3A2D59B392657:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100293:6wIeEuoNH:m:1:3317145305:3A4627E590A51AE288F3A2D59B392657:r)
---
Peter, like many Americans, I grew up in a family of military service. My father served in World War II and fought in the Battle of Midway, Iwo Jima, and many of the other major battles in the Pacific. He was one of the lucky ones who returned home, while many of his brothers-in-arms did not. Because of my father's sacrifices and the values he taught me, I joined the Army where I served as an Army Field Artillery Officer.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100293:6wIeEuoNH:m:1:3317145305:3A4627E590A51AE288F3A2D59B392657:r)
---
I learned so many lessons in the military which became the foundation of everything I did in life. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, You know me best as the former head football coach of the Notre Dame Fighting Irish and the South Carolina Gamecocks. But before I led six different college football programs to bowl games, I served in the military, like my father before me. I love this country. I love our freedom. And I love our way of life. Yet too often, we take America's blessings for granted and forget the supreme sacrifice of our fallen heroes -- men and women in the military who fought and died for our freedom. This year, my friends at the American Veterans Center are again hosting the National Memorial Day Parade...the LARGEST Memorial Day event in America, with more than 5,000 veterans and service members marching in Washington, D.C. If you've ever attended, watched on TV, or heard about this parade before, then you know that it is America's most spectacular and beloved Memorial Day celebration. | | | | | Greeting troops at the 2019 Memorial Day Parade The National Memorial Day Parade brings together more than 5,000 veterans and service members to march in the event. It welcomes more than 200,000 patriotic Americans to the live event on Constitution Avenue in D.C. And it records and broadcasts this special and exciting ceremony for millions more. But the American Veterans Center can only put on this important event with YOUR help. Peter, like many Americans, I grew up in a family of military service. My father served in World War II and fought in the Battle of Midway, Iwo Jima, and many of the other major battles in the Pacific. He was one of the lucky ones who returned home, while many of his brothers-in-arms did not. Because of my father's sacrifices and the values he taught me, I joined the Army where I served as an Army Field Artillery Officer. I learned so many lessons in the military which became the foundation of everything I did in life. But I wouldn't have had the opportunity to do what I love -- coach football for 44 years -- if it weren't for the brave men and women who gave the last full measure of devotion and died for our freedom to do what we love. I know you haven't forgotten these heroes' sacrifice. And neither have my friends at the American Veterans Center, who work every day to protect the legacy of those who served our country. I wouldn't ask for your help if the American Veterans Center didn't need it. And I wouldn't ask for your support of the National Memorial Day Parade if I didn't think it was so important to our nation's heroes. Your gift today will help the American Veterans Center bring the National Memorial Day Parade back to its full scale for the first time since the pandemic ... and it will ensure the American Veterans Center can continue its important year-round work of recording veterans' stories and educating the public and our young people about their service. Only you know how much you are able to give, and every dollar you can contribute will make a difference for this important cause. I hope to hear from you today -- Warmest regards, Coach Lou Holtz | | | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. AND NOW: The newest polling from the highly-respected Des Moines Register shows that just 45% of Iowans approve of the job Chuck Grassley is doing. And Grassley now has his “highest disapproval rating in any Iowa poll” EVER! We’re about to face our first big deadline of April, and we cannot afford to fall short of our fundraising goal if Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority. But right now, we’re still far behind on where we need to be, so we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to elect Mike Franken and turn Iowa blue. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Make your endorsement TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
It's Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60101960:6qK3IuoNV:m:1:3317145305:0D89EC455A7A69B3BE3FE9C738CDCBAA:r)
---

Peter,

I've been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio's 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I've watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I'll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60101960:6qK3IuoNV:m:1:3317145305:0D89EC455A7A69B3BE3FE9C738CDCBAA:r)
I'll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I'll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I'll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I'm reaching out to ask if you'll endorse me for re-election](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60101960:6qK3IuoNV:m:1:3317145305:0D89EC455A7A69B3BE3FE9C738CDCBAA:r)**.

I'll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I'm in Congress, **[which is why I'm asking for your support today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60101960:6qK3IuoNV:m:1:3317145305:0D89EC455A7A69B3BE3FE9C738CDCBAA:r)** It's imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I'm worthy of your support and **[I hope you'll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60101960:6qK3IuoNV:m:1:3317145305:0D89EC455A7A69B3BE3FE9C738CDCBAA:r)**.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60101960:6qK3IuoNV:m:1:3317145305:0D89EC455A7A69B3BE3FE9C738CDCBAA:r)
We've got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they're doing and it's going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm a€" from the**American people**.

I hope if you're still reading this email, you'll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60101960:6qK3IuoNV:m:1:3317145305:0D89EC455A7A69B3BE3FE9C738CDCBAA:r)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: You're overpaying for your state government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
As Governor, I'd refuse to spend more until you get a tax break
| | | | Dear Friends,
This week, many Massachusetts residents will be sitting down to finish their tax returns for filing. At the same time, members of the state House of Representatives will be filing their budget plan to spend your tax dollars next year.
As this annual ritual plays out, I'd like you to keep one concept in mind: you're overpaying for your state government.
The fact is, our state's coffers are bursting with tax revenue over and above what was anticipated to be collected this year. It's an open question whether that's because state leaders under-estimated revenue, or whether our state's economy is more robust than expected. (For our collective sake, let's hope it's the latter.) But either way, the fact remains that our state has more money than it needs right now.
As usual, legislators look gleefully at such situations as an open checkbook to spend more of your hard-earned money on their political agendas. What usually gets overlooked is the basic fact that this money is your money.
In private industry, when you pay too much, you deserve to get it back. Shouldn't the same principle apply to state government? Our government was never meant to be a for-profit enterprise.
It's not like people haven't been asking for relief. Governor Baker filed a tax relief plan earlier this year, but the Legislature has done nothing with it. I am one of many people who have demanded suspension of our state's gas tax for motorists, but the Legislature has refused to act. With all the money our state has, other avenues for relief are also possible including temporary measured relief from the excise tax, sales tax, and even the income tax. I'd be open to any of these plans, or a mix. Let's get creative. Plus, there is always the opportunity to reinvest some money in our cities and towns via Local Aid (including Chapter 70 aid for schools).
I have a message for our Legislature:
---
| As Governor, I would refuse to sign off on any more state spending -- not even a single penny -- until the Legislature enacts real tax relief for Massachusetts residents and increases Local Aid.
---
There is no more time for compromise on this issue. It's time to face reality. You've been overcharged by the state. It's your money. And you deserve to get it back.
As Governor, I'll fight for you. You can count on it.
---
---
|

subject: Hunter’s Laptop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: You may think that the media finally reporting on Hunter Biden's Laptop is good news - I don't. Let me be clear. I believe everything that's on Hunter's laptop is true. It proves the Chinese funneling money to Joe Biden, aka "The Big Guy" as we suspected all along. **But ask yourself, "Why, now?" What after 2 years the media suddenly cares?** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100673:6yGtwuoNf:m:1:3253819041:75FFB5A317D073CD52700CDF802EFF42:r "Join the Fight")It's simple. They're trying to get ahead of the story now so that they can dismiss it as "old news" when the other shoe drops before November's election. But we can't wait a minute longer. Biden is a criminal and it's time to do something about it. **[That's why I filed a bill in Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka "the Big Guy" and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100673:6yGtwuoNf:m:1:3253819041:75FFB5A317D073CD52700CDF802EFF42:r "That’s why I filed a bill in
Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka “the Big Guy” and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.")** **[Can I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100673:6yGtwuoNf:m:1:3253819041:75FFB5A317D073CD52700CDF802EFF42:r "Can
I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?")** The Left and their allies in Big Tech and the media have long stopped caring about the truth. That was painfully evident the first time we found out about Hunter Biden's laptop. When the New York Post reported on Hunter's laptop, the Deep State unleashed its fury to discredit the story. 50 ~~intelligence operatives~~ Deep State hacks called it Russian disinformation, Facebook censored the story, and Twitter even banned the New York Post's account outright. Just like they've done to me and President Trump, they blocked the truth! If we don't impeach Biden soon, we'll never find out the full story and the Left's effort to protect Grandpa Joe is going to work. **[That's why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100673:6yGtwuoNf:m:1:3253819041:75FFB5A317D073CD52700CDF802EFF42:r "That’s why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500
today?")** They know I'm right which is why the Leftists are doing all they can to block my attempts to impeach Joe Biden. They will stop at nothing to shut me up to keep me from exposing the truth. That's why Big Tech has repeatedly banned my accounts from Twitter and Pelosi works hard to keep a microphone out of my hands on Capitol Hill. DC swamp monsters are even funneling campaign donations to both my Democrat and GOP challengers. It's like they know exactly how much the Chinese control Joe Biden through their bribes that they've funneled through Hunter. **[They're throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me. That's why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100673:6yGtwuoNf:m:1:3253819041:75FFB5A317D073CD52700CDF802EFF42:r "They’re throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me.
That’s why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with
your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.")** **Bottom line, they 're scared to death that all of it will come out if Biden does get impeached. That's why it's imperative that you help me continue this fight.** I'm ready to expose the facts and impeach Joe Biden, but I can't succeed without your help. **[Please join my efforts today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100673:6yGtwuoNf:m:1:3253819041:75FFB5A317D073CD52700CDF802EFF42:r "Please join my efforts today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60100673:6yGtwuoNf:m:1:3253819041:75FFB5A317D073CD52700CDF802EFF42:r "IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!")

"Join the Fight"It's simple. They're trying to get ahead of the story now so that they can dismiss it as "old news" when the other shoe drops before November's election. But we can't wait a minute longer. Biden is a criminal and it's time to do something about it. "That’s why I filed a bill in Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka “the Big Guy” and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress." "Can I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?" The Left and their allies in Big Tech and the media have long stopped caring about the truth. That was painfully evident the first time we found out about Hunter Biden's laptop. When the New York Post reported on Hunter's laptop, the Deep State unleashed its fury to discredit the story. 50 ~~intelligence operatives~~ Deep State hacks called it Russian disinformation, Facebook censored the story, and Twitter even banned the New York Post's account outright. Just like they've done to me and President Trump, they blocked the truth! If we don't impeach Biden soon, we'll never find out the full story and the Left's effort to protect Grandpa Joe is going to work. "That’s why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?" They know I'm right which is why the Leftists are doing all they can to block my attempts to impeach Joe Biden. They will stop at nothing to shut me up to keep me from exposing the truth. That's why Big Tech has repeatedly banned my accounts from Twitter and Pelosi works hard to keep a microphone out of my hands on Capitol Hill. DC swamp monsters are even funneling campaign donations to both my Democrat and GOP challengers. It's like they know exactly how much the Chinese control Joe Biden through their bribes that they've funneled through Hunter. "They’re throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me. That’s why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today." Bottom line, they 're scared to death that all of it will come out if Biden does get impeached. That's why it's imperative that you help me continue this fight. I'm ready to expose the facts and impeach Joe Biden, but I can't succeed without your help. "Please join my efforts today." Thank you. God Bless America. Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) | | "IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!" | PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC. name: Mary Vought
subject: Battleground Senate Race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to endorse Herschel Walker for U.S. Senate in Georgia.
You may remember Walker as a star running back for the University of Georgia Bulldogs and then in the NFL. But your kids and grandkids will remember him as a stalwart conservative patriot who helped make America great again.
Walker is one of the top conservative Senate candidates of this election cycle. The media wants to portray him as a celebrity candidate, but it's his ideas and toughness they really fear.
Walker is running on the conservative issues that matter most:
▶︎ Border security▶︎ Energy independence▶︎ Backing the Blue▶︎ The 2nd Amendment▶︎ Pro-family values
Please make a generous contribution to his campaign.
Walker is a pro-life, pro-gun, pro-constitution, America-First leader. He won the full endorsement of President Donald Trump, and Senate Conservatives Fund is putting all our strength behind him, too.
Georgia is a critical battleground state for Senate control. The incumbent Democrat, Raphael Warnock, is a left-wing radical - extreme for any state, but especially for Georgia.
Warnock is one of the woke, socialist Democrats who helped unleash Biden-flation, open our borders, and put teachers' unions ahead of parents and children in our schools.
Replacing him with a conservative star like Herschel Walker is like winning two elections in one. And SCF's support is crucial - to show conservatives around the country that THIS is the race, and HERSCHEL WALKER is the candidate.
Please do your part today and send $10, $25, $50, or more to help Herschel Walker run to Washington!
SCF will pay all processing fees so Herschel can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact.
Let's work together to win this race so we can take control of the Senate away from the Democrats AND build a conservative Senate controlled by leaders who will fight for our future.
Thank you for considering this request and for being part of our team.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER

 

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

 

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

 

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: NextGen America
subject: The issues guiding our mission, decided by you
body:
Here’s what you let us know.

| | Friend, **At NextGen, our community is at the heart of our movement. Everything we do is made possible by the incredible network of volunteers, organizers, and activists such as yourself.** That’s why earlier this year, we asked you to take our 2022 survey to tell us what issues mattered most to you. **And you answered.** Over 1,000 of you took the time to share what’s important to you this year, and we’re deeply grateful for that. Here’s what you told us:
* **Our lawmakers must fight for climate action.** In the responses to our survey, climate change consistently came up as a top issue of priority, and we couldn’t agree more. Our lawmakers have the tools to put us on a path that strengthens and prioritizes a safer climate, and we’re going to make sure they use them.
* **We’ve got to protect and fight for the right to vote.** This year, our movement to ensure every American has the freedom to vote is as crucial as ever, and we’re glad you’re with us. We’re going to continue to take action against rampant voter suppression and advocate to make voting safer and more accessible for all Americans, especially young people, people of color, and the working class.
* **Access to affordable health care and the fight for reproductive rights is of top concern.** No American should have to put the price of a hospital or doctor's visit above their health, and they shouldn’t be restricted from accessing that care, either. With restrictions against abortion across the country continuing and the Supreme Court set to rule on whether to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ this summer, we’re facing an attack not just on reproductive rights, but on essential health care as a whole. Abortion is health care, and health care is a human right — our laws need to reflect that.

Our mission is guided by people like yourself, and we’re so thankful that you took the time to share your priorities and thoughts for this year. As we continue our work, we’re going to keep your priorities at the center of everything we do. **[And if you haven’t taken our survey yet, it’s not too late! Let us know what issues are of top priority for you this year with our 2022 survey.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44005623/339682740/-68271967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVmMGJhZi05ZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxXmTdglW3aQ_2dmDDf56_dh1JGgBI71KyyV0YBDtMg=&emci=386dc62d-f7b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=74ef0baf-9fb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** | [Take our 2022 survey](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44005640/339682760/-1990586268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVmMGJhZi05ZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxXmTdglW3aQ_2dmDDf56_dh1JGgBI71KyyV0YBDtMg=&emci=386dc62d-f7b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=74ef0baf-9fb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

Instead of answering any lingering questions and addressing the people's growing concerns, our elected leaders chose to ignore the problem entirely. I introduced a bill to audit the results of the 2020 election in New Hampshire because, as an elected official, I have a responsibility to restore trust in our elections and ensure fair and free elections in the future. Election integrity is one of the most important issues in this upcoming election because people are threatening to stop participating if we don't fix our current system. clean_body: Many Americans have lost faith in our electoral process after the inconsistencies and failures of the 2020 election. Instead of answering... | Peter, Elections matter because elections have consequences... Many Americans have lost faith in our electoral process after the inconsistencies and failures of the 2020 election. Instead of answering any lingering questions and addressing the people's growing concerns, our elected leaders chose to ignore the problem entirely. I introduced a bill to audit the results of the 2020 election in New Hampshire because, as an elected official, I have a responsibility to restore trust in our elections and ensure fair and free elections in the future. Election integrity is one of the most important issues in this upcoming election because people are threatening to stop participating if we don't fix our current system. That means the voices of hundreds of thousands of conservatives will continue to be ignored, while radical socialists like Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi remain in power. As one of the most outspoken advocates for a full forensic audit of the 2020 Presidential election in the New Hampshire legislature, I believe that, if he did vote twice during the 2016 Republican primaries, then Mowers is disqualified from running for Congress. "Jersey" Mowers has illustrated that he's willing to do anything to win, even if that means potentially breaking federal law to elect a RINO into power. In a time where we need to restore faith in our elections now more than ever, these kinds of headlines are only hurting our America-First movement. We know that, with fair and free elections, our voices will be heard. Unfortunately, our election system is broken and open to interference. We'll never take America back if we don't first fix our election system, Peter. Select an option below to elect the Proven Conservative Fighter in this race who has a track record of fighting for election integrity. Any interference with our elections is unacceptable. In order to protect our Republic, we must ensure fair and free elections in the future. With your support, we will take our America-First movement to Congress and take steps to protect our elections from potential threats and interference in the future. You have my word. Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress Personal Cell Phone: (603)-997-8108 | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

Folks, I have an important favor to ask you:

**[_If you can, I need you to pitch in to my campaign to help defeat Ron DeSantis. And if you’ll give me just a minute, I’ll explain why your donation right now is so important._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44007966/339691885/-1240574987?refcode=20220411_f_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTJlOTQyNy1hM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tru2oPZZL-MfsOQ_fub6RQf245H5xgXu5u75qxG4KTI=)**

The scary truth is that **I’m worried about Florida’s future** if we allow Governor DeSantis another term. If we don’t defeat him now, he’s going to continue playing politics with our health, our voting rights, our reproductive freedoms, and more. One expert was even quoted in POLITICO as saying, “Ron DeSantis is turning Florida into his own mini-autocracy.”

The good news is **Governor DeSantis is vulnerable** : Recent polls show his approval ratings dropping, and even better, they show me within the margin of error — or flat-out beating him.

But we can’t start getting complacent. Governor DeSantis has **an army of extreme right-wing billionaires** ready to spend and do whatever it takes to secure his re-election. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fight back.

**So team, please don’t wait. Pitch in now to help us keep building our momentum so we can defeat Governor DeSantis and finally get to work on building a Florida for All:**

clean_body: Governor DeSantis is vulnerable, and we need to do everything we can to defeat him. | | | | = Folks, I have an important favor to ask you: = = = The scary truth is that I’m worried about Florida’s future if we allow Governor DeSantis another term. If we don’t defeat him now, he’s going to continue playing politics with our health, our voting rights, our reproductive freedoms, and more. One expert was even quoted in POLITICO as saying, “Ron DeSantis is turning Florida into his own mini-autocracy.” The good news is Governor DeSantis is vulnerable : Recent polls show his approval ratings dropping, and even better, they show me within the margin of error — or flat-out beating him. But we can’t start getting complacent. Governor DeSantis has an army of extreme right-wing billionaires ready to spend and do whatever it takes to secure his re-election. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fight back. So team, please don’t wait. Pitch in now to help us keep building our momentum so we can defeat Governor DeSantis and finally get to work on building a Florida for All: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

_— Begin Forwarded Message —_

Hi

**Since you are one of Tom’s top supporters, I wanted you to be among the first to hear: thanks to our incredible grassroots team, Tom is _OFFICIALLY_ on the ballot for 2022.**

A candidate for U.S. House of Representatives in New Jersey needs 200 signatures to qualify for the ballot, but #TeamTom volunteers collected an incredible 3,526 signatures in a show of enormous organizational strength and enthusiasm. It’s more than 10 TIMES the number of signatures our likely Republican opponent, Tom Kean, Jr., collected.

This is a big deal — and whether it was signing Tom’s petition, helping collect signatures from friends and neighbors, stepping up to volunteer or donating to support our efforts, you’re helping build a campaign with winning grassroots momentum. But with national Republicans naming Tom one of their TOP targets this cycle, we can’t afford to let up.

[We have to scale up our efforts to stay ahead of the GOP and their relentless dark money attacks. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hi there! Just wanted to circle back on this. Last month, we told you that Congress is currently considering passing another stimulus check for Social Security seniors. So our polling team reached out to you to give your input on whether or not you support a $1,400 stimulus payment for Social Security seniors. But as of, you still haven’t submitted your response. We must reach a 100% response rate to successfully gauge where support lies on this hot-button topic. That’s why we’re granting an extension on our deadline to respond to our urgent poll by Please respond below: | | | | Thank you for responding, Andy C. Team Ruiz \------------ Begin Forwarded Message ------------ | | | | Folks – many American seniors can’t afford their bills right now. Housing and health care costs are higher than they’ve EVER been. A fourth stimulus check would provide desperately needed relief to America’s seniors. | | | –Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. clean_body: | = Hi friend, it’s me again — Wes’ wife, Dawn. Our campaign to make Wes the next Governor of Maryland faces another big benchmark tomorrow, April 12. His team will be filing a report, and where we are now will be a key indicator of whether or not we’re on track to build the resources needed to power this campaign to the rescheduled primary election in July. Take it from me: Wes is a busy man, and I know he hates asking folks for money. But the reality is, if we’re going to take our movement all the way to the November general election and WIN, we need to keep hitting our financial goals along the way. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = You’ve always come through for me and Wes before, and I’m forever grateful for everything you do to support my husband in his journey to lift people up and lead our state forward. Many thanks, Dawn | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. name: Val Hoyle
subject: The League of Conservation Voters weighs in on our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44016728/339715831/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJjMzU2Yi1iMWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Agy1Nu1cvBEz7-p3nD99MhSEvGGZLLPpSQ4eP4RoSXQ=&emci=3716cae5-2ab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6dbc356b-b1b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Big News, Peter! **This week, the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund (LCV) endorsed our campaign!** LCV is a national leader in the fight for our environment and for real solutions to combat the climate crisis we are facing. **_And it is a crisis._** We need our leaders to be candid about that. My opponent in this race, Alek Skarlatos, would rather bury his head in the sand than face the facts. Skarlatos has said that the root causes of climate change are "up for debate." This is the same guy who placed all of the blame for our recent catastrophic wildfires on a lack of logging. _Really Alek?_ **I was evacuated along with my neighbors during the wildfire season of 2020, Peter. We didn't lose our home, but far too many Oregonians weren't so lucky. As devastating as the fires were that year, it is only going to get worse and we can't wait to act on climate.** We can't afford to have a Climate Denier like Alek Skarlatos representing us in Congress. We need a leader who will: →Move America towards a 100% clean electricity standard. →Fight to make Oregon a leader in renewable energy generation. →Halt new fossil fuel leasing on federal lands. →Create new investment and jobs right here in Oregon, ensuring no worker is left behind in this transition to a clean energy future. **That's why I'm running for Congress. I hope you'll join me, and the League of Conservation Voters, in this fight for our climate.** _Val_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | Big News, Peter! This week, the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund (LCV) endorsed our campaign! LCV is a national leader in the fight for our environment and for real solutions to combat the climate crisis we are facing. And it is a crisis. We need our leaders to be candid about that. My opponent in this race, Alek Skarlatos, would rather bury his head in the sand than face the facts. Skarlatos has said that the root causes of climate change are "up for debate." This is the same guy who placed all of the blame for our recent catastrophic wildfires on a lack of logging. Really Alek? I was evacuated along with my neighbors during the wildfire season of 2020, Peter. We didn't lose our home, but far too many Oregonians weren't so lucky. As devastating as the fires were that year, it is only going to get worse and we can't wait to act on climate. We can't afford to have a Climate Denier like Alek Skarlatos representing us in Congress. We need a leader who will: →Move America towards a 100% clean electricity standard. →Fight to make Oregon a leader in renewable energy generation. →Halt new fossil fuel leasing on federal lands. →Create new investment and jobs right here in Oregon, ensuring no worker is left behind in this transition to a clean energy future. That's why I'm running for Congress. I hope you'll join me, and the League of Conservation Voters, in this fight for our climate. While both President Biden and Tom understand the need to address the wealth gap to help working families, corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin and Republicans like Ron Johnson are siding with **billionaires** instead.

[**Sign on today to stand with President Biden and Tom Nelson in agreement that the nation’s richest must be fairly taxed →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44016836/339716310/687857837?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_220411_1_1&refcode2=812fea94-b1b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTJmZWE5NC1iMWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9SIHVR_Rq-jHg4xSXmhSeJP4JKbbyqVCS1mdYTUtDE=&emci=7f2fea94-b1b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=812fea94-b1b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15112925)

Multi-millionaires like Joe Manchin and Ron Johnson can’t be trusted to serve and advocate for working families — **they’re out-of-touch puppets who have proven time and time again to only be loyal to Wall Street, Big Oil, and the nation’s richest.**
See for yourself what they think about the widely-supported billionaire tax:
* “Manchin’s opposition means Biden’s proposal is likely **dead** only a day after the White House unveiled it.” — _The Hill_
* “[Instead of supporting Biden’s proposal], Republicans have embraced Senator Ron Johnson and Rick Scott’s GOP agenda to **raise taxes on 32% of Wisconsinites** ...” — _WisDems.org_

This is why it’s so important we elect Tom Nelson, a bold, progressive leader, this November.

[**Show your support for this progressive tax action by signing on today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44016838/339716312/687857837?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_220411_1_1&refcode2=812fea94-b1b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTJmZWE5NC1iMWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9SIHVR_Rq-jHg4xSXmhSeJP4JKbbyqVCS1mdYTUtDE=&emci=7f2fea94-b1b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=812fea94-b1b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15112925)

Fifth-generation Wisconsinite and Lutheran pastor son Tom Nelson works overtime, while raising his family, to defend hard-working families in the fight against corporate politicians and Foxconn-like special interests. As your U.S. senator, he’ll relentlessly fight a corrupt system in DC to promote Main Street solutions to our rigged economy and the existential threat of climate change. Tom has won six elections in a Trump county because he gets things done, including saving 300 union jobs at a hometown paper mill that was going to be shut down. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: ICYMI: Donald Trump’s Official Endorsement™️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s going to take a lot for us to stand up against the coming MAGA deluge
#
Derek, did you see John’s email yesterday?
He reached out because **Donald Trump officially endorsed Dr. Oz for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**

Donald Trump is obsessed with Pennsylvania. So many of his lies about the 2020 Election were centered on PA’s electoral integrity. Now Trump is going all in for 2022.
This endorsement opens the floodgates for MAGA Super PAC dark money. That’s _in addition_ to Dr. Oz’s personal fortune, which he’s using to self-fund his race.

**We need the resources to fight back, which is why we set an emergency goal of raising 1,000 small-dollar donations within 24 hours. A lot of folks have already pitched in, but we’re still 113 donations short.**

**_[Will you help out today with your first donation of any amount? Your support today has a direct + immediate impact on our ability to defend ourselves against Republican Super PACs + dark money.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47196?refcode=em20220411-5339&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)_**
**[Contribute Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47196?refcode=em20220411-5339&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)**
Thanks for all your help,

Team Fetterman HQ 💛 **
**
_\----Forwarded Message----
_ From: John Fetterman
Date: April 10, 2022
Subject: Donald Trump’s Official EndorsementTM️
Derek,
Did anyone predict that a celebrity TV doctor was going to run for Senate in 2022?
You know, I wouldn't believe you if you said you did.
But here we are. And now **Dr. Mehmet Oz has Donald Trump’s Official EndorsementTM in the Republican primary for U.S. Senate in PA** 🤯
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47196?refcode=em20220411-5339&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)
Frankly, this is a *big* deal that shifts the dynamic of our race. **Trump’s endorsement is a blaring green light for MAGA Super PACs to hit PA with an avalanche of dark money, the likes of which have never been seen before in our state.**
Look, Dr. Oz is a self-funding millionaire.**1** He’s already spent a profoundly gross amount of personal wealth in the GOP’s record-breaking $43 million primary.
Meanwhile, Donald Trump could endorse a ham sandwich for U.S. Senate and Super PACs would still dump loads of money behind it 🙄
Derek, I FULLY expect Trump’s endorsement to give Dr. Oz — who is already self-funding his campaign by the million$ — a huge fundraising boost.
**That’s why, in response to Donald Trump’s Official EndorsementTM, our campaign is launching an emergency fund with a public goal of 1,000 small-dollar donations in the next 24 hours.**
I need your help to defeat the weirdo celebrity TV doctor who has the FULL backing of Donald Trump + his own personal wealth. Let's show them what we're made of.
**_[Can you rush your very first donation of $5 to help our emergency fund reach 1,000 donations in the next 24 hours? We need as many individual donations as possible to overpower Donald Trump’s endorsement + show the true grassroots strength of our campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47196?refcode=em20220411-5339&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)___**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47196?refcode=em20220411-5339&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)**
I just gotta say, Gisele and I are committed to running a clean, people-powered campaign with no dirty corporate PAC money.
You’re an important part of that + we seriously can’t thank you enough for your support during a critical moment like this.
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! 🙏
— John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of PA
**1** He’s actually from New Jersey. Not even from PA. As my daughter Gracie says: “Like, ew.” [**_Donate now to ensure we have the resources to defeat Dr. Oz._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47196?refcode=em20220411-5339&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220411-5339-footer&t=25&refcode2=5339_434096_tiG71P&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=5339%2E434096%2EtiG71P)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Make history with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
Together, we will take back our country | Recently, I announced my candidacy for Alaska's United States House of Representatives seat.
Peter,

**I want to make history together.**

Recently, I announced my candidacy for Alaska's United States House of Representatives seat because we need a _**TRUE**_ America First patriot fighting for our state in Washington.

Now, I want YOU to join our fight as an **Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member**. Together, we will unite the America First movement in Alaska and SAVE OUR COUNTRY.

**[SAVE ALASKA>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60103856:6dU6DuoNG:m:1:3317145305:1E03A7FC61F117717A50D0579DF78D85:r)**

Public service is a calling and I am proud to be fighting for the great people of Alaska. By becoming an **Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member** you are joining me in the fight for:

**_Restoring our Alaskan values
Fighting the left's socialist Agenda
Providing energy security for America
Revitalizing our economy
AND SO MUCH MORE_**

Peter, taking back our country from the radical Left and restoring President Trump's agenda in Washington will not be easy. That's why I'm counting on great patriots like YOU to join me in this fight.

_**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to become an Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member and help me SAVE ALASKA.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60103856:6dU6DuoNG:m:1:3317145305:1E03A7FC61F117717A50D0579DF78D85:r)**_

**SUPPORTER: Peter
MEMBERSHIP STATUS: ****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: TODAY**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60103856:6dU6DuoNG:m:1:3317145305:1E03A7FC61F117717A50D0579DF78D85:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $250>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60103857:6dU6DuoNG:m:1:3317145305:1E03A7FC61F117717A50D0579DF78D85:r)**

I won't lie to you. This is the final chance we have to reclaim the America we love before Biden and the socialist Left _**destroy our country for good**_.

Alaska needs a proud conservative fighter representing it and that's exactly what I plan on being. Don't just take my word for it. Here's what President Trump said about me:

_This is our moment. Together we will take back our country and put America First again. Peter, I need to know, will you be standing with me?_

Sarah Palin

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Statement: Crooked Kim Gardner Admits to Wrongdoing. Governor Greitens Fully Exonerated and Vindicated.
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens released the following statement on St. Louis Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner, a George Soros funded prosecutor:
"Today's groundbreaking decision reaffirms what we have known all along--Soros funded prosecutor Kim Gardner conducted a political witch hunt. "Due to overwhelming evidence and over 70 perjury charges against her, Gardner today admitted to wrongdoing and said it was 'mistake on my part.' "From hiring former FBI agent William Tisaby, who just plead guilty to evidence tampering, to lying and engaging in a coverup to conceal her misconduct, Gardner is the worst type of public official, corrupt and crooked. "Gardner represents the worst of establishment and dishonest officials who use their unfettered power to target innocent and law-abiding individuals, from the governor of Missouri to police officers to everyday citizens. The people of Missouri deserve better. My campaign for U.S. Senate directly challenges corrupt officials who engage in the abuse of their power. As the only America First candidate in the race, I will continue to fight for every Missourian whose freedoms are constantly under assault."

The consequences of the war on drugs are perpetuated by racial and economic discrimination. Enforcement of marijuana laws results in over 600,000 arrests annually and disproportionately impacts Black and brown communities, who are four times more likely to be arrested for marijuana possession charges.

Despite the federal criminalization of marijuana, numerous states and cities have reformed their policies to decriminalize it. Now, we need to see change in Washington.

[**_Help me continue fighting to reform our justice system and dismantle historical systems of oppression that still prevail today by donating whatever you can afford._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44017533/339719804/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220411MORE_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjVlOWI5Zi1iNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH-NoFxaCHLD1YhptYI1aFixr-ApqseL0NW58NO3yfw=)

Together,

Shontel Brown
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

body:
---
| | | Patriot,

Are you really turning down the chance of a lifetime to have dinner with President Trump? We're SHOCKED!

We thought you were a top supporter of President Trump and House Conservatives, but our records show you _**DECLINED your chance to have dinner in Dallas with President Trump. **_

You MUST correct the record now, or we will offer your spot to the next Patriot on our list!
* * *
** SUPPORTER: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60104280:JzdjWuoNj:m:1:3299561967:746A5880A61F2AE56BA353A90CF90A13:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
RSVP: DECLINED**
* * *
_**[RSVP NOW to enter to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60104280:JzdjWuoNj:m:1:3299561967:746A5880A61F2AE56BA353A90CF90A13:r "RSVP NOW to enter
to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!")**_

Thank you,

Trump Dinner Reservations

---
You can read the full contest rules [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60104281:JzdjWuoNj:m:1:3299561967:746A5880A61F2AE56BA353A90CF90A13:r). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60104282:JzdjWuoNj:m:1:3299561967:746A5880A61F2AE56BA353A90CF90A13:r).

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without making a contribution, click [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60104282:JzdjWuoNj:m:1:3299561967:746A5880A61F2AE56BA353A90CF90A13:r). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003. | |
