name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20LaPierre?=
subject: Christian Conservative Mike LaPierre's Commitment
body:
Christian Conservative Mike LaPierre's Commitment | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b75dabe7905f/happy-new-year-6069013?e=6582090d83)
---
|
---
**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS****MY COMMITMENT TO DISTRICT 4** · Team LaPierre will show up to work with our lunch pails, will not be absent from work, and produce results· I pledge to join the House Freedom Caucus in Washington, DC· I will use the platform and bully pulpit of the congressional office to sound the alarm and fight against the MARXISTS-SOCIALISTS on our shores· Team LaPierre will use sound reason, judgment, and discernment emanating from bible principles to render legislative decisions· Our team will fight tooth and nail to bring America back to a respect for our great nation, a respect for traditional values, a respect for true history, a respect for the Constitution, and a respect for our Founding Father’s original vision for America· We will use every legislative means possible to encourage and reestablish our Framer’s original view of the relationship between Church and State· I will do everything in my power to make sure that we stay focused on the foundational and spiritual underpinnings that made America great in the first place· Our team will help reestablish the elements of our American distinctiveness that are currently out of alignment. i.e., life, liberty, the pursuit of happiness, border security, and gun rights· We will help bring a focus on religion and the Spirit of the Living God back to the great citizens of District 4 and around the country· Our team will help right the wrongs of excessive and run-away spending, the cancel culture, CRT indoctrination, anti-American and anti-God sentiment, and the Marxist ideology now stealing the soul of our nation
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!
|
---
|
---

clean_body: I’m the best candidate to do it = Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene hasn’t just taken advantage of decades of Republican misinformation campaigns — she’s taken it to a whole new level of insanity. A lot of people have written Northwest Georgia off, but this is my home, and I refuse to do that. Instead of escalating culture wars and conspiracy theories, I have a real plan to help my community. If Marge had a plan to actually help, she wouldn’t have to resort to such desperate tactics. = = I have a plan to fight the lies, and it’s working. As a mother, a small business owner, and a member of the community,I am the exact opposite of what Marjorie wants rural voters to believe the Democratic Party represents. I believe it’s important to counter Marge’s narrative and show people in my district the truth. I want to help them, and I have a plan to do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Fighting for you, Holly McCormack || || Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States ** | Paid for by Holly for Congress

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: TPPA Weekly Call to Action: April 11th
body:
| | | |
---
---
This week, both the House and the Senate are not in session, so we will be focusing efforts on their local/in-state offices. **In this week’s call-to-action**
* Save Title 42 and protect the border!
* Previous AlignAct campaigns that are still active

_Remember, when you use our AlignAct campaign, you can contact all of the Senators with just a couple of clicks – it will literally take you one to two minutes to do!_
---
| |
---
Our border has never been this bad. By the end of Biden’s first two years in the White House, millions and millions of illegal migrants will be in the USA – more than the population of some entire states. This week’s action is simple. Call your Representative and both of your Senators’ local offices. Pick one office to call or call all of them – just do what you have time to do. When you call, you’re going to ask one question (make a note of the answer) and leave a comment. **Question:** “What is my [Rep. or Sen.] doing about the border crisis?” _Make a note of the answer_**Comment:** “I support the continuation of President Trump’s commonsense Title 42 policy, and I want you keep it in place.” You can find the contact for the offices through the links below. The links will allow you to search for their official, government websites. Once on those websites, you will need to look for the link to “Offices,” or “Contact,” or similar. Sometimes they make phone numbers hard to find (surprise, surprise). Sometimes it’s under “About,” or some other random link. Just poke around if you can’t find it right away.
---
[FIND MY REPRESENTATIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
[FIND MY SENATORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDEtNzFjMjY0YzM0ODhkNGM1MDhkNmM5ZjIwZWMzZjhlZmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZpbmQtc2VuYXRvcnM_bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/HIecmuBOEUc2mttYYmUcdQ)
---
| | |
---
[A poll released last week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/dy_KDD9eJnHsMpoASUDjqQ) finds Biden’s rescission of Title 42 to be the administration’s most unpopular decision to date. Implemented by the Trump administration in 2020, Title 42 is a public health order that has proved expeditious in removing illegal migrants within America’s southern border and preventing their unlawful entry into the United States during the pandemic. A _Morning Consult_ poll found that [56% of voters](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-ZCup_2E0YygNfJB5YQ) disagree with the president's decision to end this policy. This decision is part and parcel with Biden's other immigration [policies](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/UhFeidM167yqGNWRFp8JOg) that have made the Southern border less secure while encouraging illegal immigration.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDEtNzFjMjY0YzM0ODhkNGM1MDhkNmM5ZjIwZWMzZjhlZmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/vaYyNy-egRwi-GwvyXk0VQ)
---
Our elected officials in D.C. have already spent over $5 trillion to “respond” to COVID. Now, they’re trying to spend over $15 billion more – no, wait – Nancy Pelosi wants to spend another $45 billion! Don’t let them! While the House is in recess this week, we can still make calls and email and use social media to pressure the House to vote against the COVID spending bill, H.R. 7007.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDEtNzFjMjY0YzM0ODhkNGM1MDhkNmM5ZjIwZWMzZjhlZmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/c0K9Yl5xbKZQZe8mx7crxA)
---
| | |
---
Washington State is reaping the bitter fruits of the "defund the police" movement. In Seattle, where the murderous, police-free [CHAZ autonomous zone](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/qhtuZ_lOmbrTmP9H_-hVvA) was created, robberies are up 30% just within the first quarter of this year, with [violent crime up 32% overall](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/C8fEsb726sWcI_gGaw7sng). Now, thanks to the Democratic legislature that codified defund police proposals into law statewide, [crime is surging across Washington](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Fe8K7qna0t-1SvBQ). Tacoma has already recorded 219 robberies in 2022, and the rate of car thefts is up 300% in Bellingham. Skyrocketing crime rates are the inevitable consequence of policies that treat criminals as if they are the victims. Voters considering Democrat candidates in the 2022 midterms should think carefully about whether these candidates will go along with this madness once in office.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Q)
---
**Reopen the Keystone Pipeline!** Under President Trump, America was energy independent, exporting energy to other nations, and we (and the world) were safer as a result. One of the pieces of our energy independence was the Keystone Pipeline. Within hours of being sworn in, Joe Biden cancelled the permits for the pipeline, killing the project. Now we see, in real time, the consequences of his actions, as we import energy from Russia, and in effect, are helping to fund their invasion of Ukraine. Furthermore, Biden and the radical left that owns him want to exploit current events to stop Americans from using oil and gas full stop. Remember their motto, never let a crisis go to waste.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | |
---
Biden's continued use of the United States’ Strategic Petroleum Reserve is putting our national security at risk. The reserve, which holds [hundreds of millions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDEtNzFjMjY0YzM0ODhkNGM1MDhkNmM5ZjIwZWMzZjhlZmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5lbmVyZ3kuZ292L2ZlY20vc3RyYXRlZ2ljLXBldHJvbGV1bS1yZXNlcnZlLTk_bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/oKwlCf5zcR2R3LQhgNmjDQ) of barrels of oil, is intended to be used in emergency situations, but the president is utilizing 180 million barrels of oil to cover up a “green” energy agenda that has contributed to record-high gasoline prices. Releasing oil from the reserves will likely not have any [long-term impact](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Og6YnYqs5MCVdyD1GpCuWw) on the price of gas at the pump because it doesn't address the root causes of rising energy costs. This policy is a continuation of Biden's efforts to blame everybody else for the consequences of his [anti-energy policies](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/4PiBUZ8Y55OCUqaBwIiL9w). His congressional allies even [dragged energy executives before Congress](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) in an attempt to deflect blame away from their agenda. Joe Biden is [jeopardizing America's national security](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-3WCkLCU7Z9Xit1xpu3w) for a chance to salvage the midterm elections for his party.
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDEtNzFjMjY0YzM0ODhkNGM1MDhkNmM5ZjIwZWMzZjhlZmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/kNmNtzgZzYAqasBp4TYgVQ)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDEtNzFjMjY0YzM0ODhkNGM1MDhkNmM5ZjIwZWMzZjhlZmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTgiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ1MTc1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/V7csuUYe9FJE_644W-a36Q)

Fellow Conservative,

You would have more in your checking account if President Trump were still leading the world’s greatest economy.

But we have Joe Biden’s leadership in fighting this global energy crisis. Instead of increasing U.S. domestic oil production and supply, Joe Biden has canceled the Keystone pipeline and refuses to issue permits for new oil drilling and gas fracking sites on U.S. federal-owned lands.

It seems like the Biden-Pelosi Democrats skipped economics class a few too many times to know how much their policies cost YOU.

Stop the Biden Gas Hike

The Biden-Pelosi left will keep raising our taxes to pay for their radical agenda. They don’t care how many trillions of your tax dollars they throw down the drain to prove a point; they will keep demanding more and refusing to budget wisely.

Joe Biden does not care about Building Back Better or his most recent slogan. Joe Biden is making things worse for Americans every day and ONLY cares about holding on to power and enacting an AOC-approved anti-American energy agenda.

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: I’m so humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
I am extremely humbled and honored to share that EMILY’s List, the country’s largest organization working to elect Democratic pro-choice women to office, has endorsed our campaign for Congress!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44019922/339730688/2085084876?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220411-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTY0MGJjMy1iZGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zf4Oh3UbYlyeeqYsYnrIX-pLYF_1Jr7lmmGtd5nnbIw=)
---
| Peter,

I am extremely humbled and honored to share that EMILY’s List, the country’s largest organization working to elect Democratic pro-choice women to office, has endorsed our campaign for Congress!

---
| | “EMILY’s List is excited to give our support to state Sen. Valerie Foushee as she runs to represent the people of North Carolina’s 4th Congressional District. **Foushee has a long and distinguished history fighting for the people of North Carolina,** whether it was in the state legislature or in her own hometown of Chapel Hill. **Along with her history of protecting the right to abortion, Foushee’s commitment to improving the education system, increasing access to affordable health care, and protecting voting rights make her the best choice for the 4th Congressional District.”

\- Laphonza Butler, president of EMILY’s List**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44019923/339730689/2085084876?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220411-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTY0MGJjMy1iZGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zf4Oh3UbYlyeeqYsYnrIX-pLYF_1Jr7lmmGtd5nnbIw=)
---
**Peter, this is a big deal for our movement as we head into the final weeks before our election.**

I have to be honest. Earning this endorsement means so much to me because I’ve fought so hard for North Carolinians’ over the course of my career. And I promise I will continue to do so in Congress.

clean_body: I am extremely humbled and honored to share that EMILY’s List, the country’s largest organization working to elect Democratic pro-choice women to office, has endorsed our campaign for Congress! | = | Peter, I am extremely humbled and honored to share that EMILY’s List, the country’s largest organization working to elect Democratic pro-choice women to office, has endorsed our campaign for Congress! | | “EMILY’s List is excited to give our support to state Sen. Valerie Foushee as she runs to represent the people of North Carolina’s 4th Congressional District. Foushee has a long and distinguished history fighting for the people of North Carolina, whether it was in the state legislature or in her own hometown of Chapel Hill. Along with her history of protecting the right to abortion, Foushee’s commitment to improving the education system, increasing access to affordable health care, and protecting voting rights make her the best choice for the 4th Congressional District.” \- Laphonza Butler, president of EMILY’s List | = Peter, this is a big deal for our movement as we head into the final weeks before our election. I have to be honest. Earning this endorsement means so much to me because I’ve fought so hard for North Carolinians’ over the course of my career. And I promise I will continue to do so in Congress. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = All the best, = * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc?=
subject: Rey Martinez Has Endorsed My Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc
body:
Former Mayor of Loganville, Rey Martinez, has endorsed my campaign | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9b9a87ea86d7/campaign-update-9005017?e=2429acb6f7)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter,
Today, I am proud to announce the former Mayor of Loganville, Rey Martinez has endorsed my campaign. Rey and I have been friends for over 20 years, and to have his endorsement means so much to me personally. Rey is a U.S. Navy Veteran. He was the first Latino to be elected mayor of a city in Georgia and has served Loganville well, using sound American conservative principles and his Christian faith as his guides.
---
|
---
| _“I’ve known Marc for over 20 years, and during that time, we developed a deep friendship. Marc’s work ethic is unmatched; I believe in him. He supports true conservative principles and is exactly what we need in D.C. representing us right now.” Rey Martinez Former Mayor of Loganville._ I am honored to receive the endorsement of Rey Martinez. As fellow business owners for almost two decades, Rey and I have formed a mutual respect and friendship over the years. As a mayor, he was a true man of the people and did an incredible job for the city of Loganville. He will also do an excellent job representing the 111 District in the Georgia State House.
---
|
#

---
|

* * *
First, Texas enacted a near-total ban on abortions. Now, Oklahoma is following suit.
_States with Republican Governors have launched attack after attack on a woman’s right to choose._
Patients are traveling all the way to Nevada for treatment because they can no longer access safe abortions and treatment in their state.
But the truth is, Republicans in Nevada will do everything in their power to follow in the footsteps of Texas and Oklahoma and take away our right to choose.
Governor Sisolak has been steadfast in protecting reproductive rights. He’s fought to remove penalties against women and doctors, expanded access to birth control, and defended abortion rights. We can count on him.
**[Abortion is on the line in this election. Re-electing Steve is the best chance we have to make sure we can continue to defend the right to choose in Nevada. Can you chip in right now to make sure we re-elect Governor Sisolak?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44020248/339732127/-1561074788?refcode=email_041122_oklahomaabortion_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmY1MTBkZC1jMGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bA9QMPB5PrfhWOrZia5QbDf1C6nwxifUNvRB9U4mSc=)**

clean_body: = Listen, we’re seeing a wave of far-right, anti-abortion laws. Democratic Governor Steve Sisolak has always fought to protect the right to choose. And that’s why it’s important we all do our part to help re-elect him this fall. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = First, Texas enacted a near-total ban on abortions. Now, Oklahoma is following suit. States with Republican Governors have launched attack after attack on a woman’s right to choose. Patients are traveling all the way to Nevada for treatment because they can no longer access safe abortions and treatment in their state. But the truth is, Republicans in Nevada will do everything in their power to follow in the footsteps of Texas and Oklahoma and take away our right to choose. Governor Sisolak has been steadfast in protecting reproductive rights. He’s fought to remove penalties against women and doctors, expanded access to birth control, and defended abortion rights. We can count on him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks for taking action, Team Sisolak | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. # [House Republican Conference Chair Stefanik Endorses Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06)](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=b5fb488ec0&e=659fba240e)

**House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik announced today her endorsement of Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06) for U.S. Congress. **Congresswoman Stefanik is the third ranking Republican in the House, represents Upstate New York, and was recently endorsed by President Trump for her re-election.** **
Arizona's new 6th congressional district is a highly competitive, key battleground seat we must flip to take back the House in 2022!
“Under Joe Biden's failed Far-Left agenda, our country is facing many challenges impacting families and communities, including those in Arizona. Juan Ciscomani understands those issues, and he will be a strong and effective check on the damaging Biden-Pelosi agenda. **Juan's expertise and experience on our border and his commitment to border security will be a valuable addition to Congress. As a husband and dad, Juan knows first-hand the economic challenges facing everyday Americans, and he will prioritize American jobs and businesses.** It has been great getting to know Juan. I am proud to endorse him, and I look forward to serving together when we take back the House this November," said House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik.
[](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=767861f5ea&e=659fba240e) Congresswoman Stefanik joins several others in endorsing Ciscomani for AZ-06 including [Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=be83328c71&e=659fba240e), [Whip Steve Scalise](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=68f1b764e5&e=659fba240e), [Congressional Leadership Fund](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=632c30ecae&e=659fba240e), Arizona State Representative Teresa Martinez, Mayor of Marana Ed Honea, Mayor of Casa Grande Craig McFarland, Mayor of Sahuarita Tom Murphy, Cochise County border rancher John Ladd and others.
**IT'S TIME TO TAKE BACK #AZ06, FLIP THE HOUSE & PRESERVE THE AMERICAN DREAM!**
---

Right now, Bob is locked in a competitive primary against a Republican who isn’t who he says he is. | | | | Our opponents track record speaks for itself... 🚩 He supported socialist Bernie Sanders🚩 He opposes American pipelines and energy independence 🚩 He joined the Democrats in attacking President Trump’s administration Now, he’s running against Bob claiming he’s a hardline conservative. Our team knows the truth and that’s why we’re fighting tooth and nail to make sure the RIGHT candidate wins this primary. With the far-left already controlling Congress, the LAST THING we need is more phony conservatives in DC. Bob has created thousands of jobs in South Jersey, built hospitals for the poor in Sierra Leone, and served others through his charitable organization, the Healey International Relief Foundation. Now, Bob wants to get to work for YOU in DC, and he’s ready to disrupt Congress’ status quo with fresh ideas and sensible solutions. name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Barrett Raises More Than $750,000
body:
More than $450,000 raised for first quarter of 2022 | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D624ec1621dda454c18a5f129%26ss_email_id%3D62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68%26ss_campaign_name%3DBarrett%2BRaises%2BMore%2BThan%2B%2524750%252C000%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-11T14%253A02%253A51Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=IfgM3kjkLIgSBef4BnvHmM_YNko%3D)
---
| **Barrett Raises More Than $750,000**(Lansing, Mich.) - Sen. Tom Barrett, Republican candidate for Michigan’s 7th Congressional District, raised $458,000 for the first quarter of 2022, to surpass $750,000 raised in just 4.5 months. More impressive, Barrett received donations from more than 12,500 for an average contribution of $60.“I’m overwhelmed by the number of people who have invested in our campaign,” said Barrett. “The polices of the Biden Administration and Biden Democrats like Elissa Slotkin are hurting mid-Michigan families with the highest gas prices in Michigan history, the highest inflation in 40 years, the largest deficit in American history, and the highest murder rate in Lansing history. People are scared about the future and they want to see a change.”###
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D624ec1621dda454c18a5f129%26ss_email_id%3D62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68%26ss_campaign_name%3DBarrett%2BRaises%2BMore%2BThan%2B%2524750%252C000%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-11T14%253A02%253A51Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=IfgM3kjkLIgSBef4BnvHmM_YNko%3D) | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fbarrettbrigade%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=uG-Lgx2agPUyvgYlqkTuQrsqlbE%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsquarespace&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=s3TXKTqBXfQT6zBwAGtMKP1qgPQ%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Ftomformichigan&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=Q1OaHrZQ_dL_-YMHJ1y_pClhkNg%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62543480cc94e61e4ab7fe68&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=A5kZlI5wkQjhCXDCQ6T3gm7z_9c%3D) | | [ ](mailto:info@tombarrettforcongress.com)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Trump for Speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Peter --

FIRST: Polls show a red wave building to
sweep Democrats out of power.

THEN: The American people fire Nancy Pelosi.

NEXT: An America First majority elects Donald
Trump the Speaker of the House.

Would you like to see Nancy Pelosi out of a
job in 2022?
Would you like to see Donald Trump wielding
the Speaker's Gavel leading an America First majority that slams
the breaks on Joe Biden's socialist agenda?
If you agree, I hope you will chip in a
contribution right away to help me elect America First
conservatives across the country and send Nancy Pelosi packing.

With Speaker Donald J. Trump leading the way,
conservatives can force the FBI to answer real questions about
the "FEDSURRECTION" that took place on January 6.

No more ducking, dodging and hiding behind
Never Trump sellouts Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger and the rest
of Nancy Pelosi's January 6 witch hunt committee.

An America First majority will demand the
truth about the FBI having informants and agents in the crowd
that day and if they conspired or incited violence.

I want to find out what role the Federal
government, specifically the FBI and DOJ, had in instigating the
events of that day.
Firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker this November
and replacing her with Donald Trump is step one in getting those
answers.
And that's why I am leading the charge to
FIRE Nancy Pelosi and replace her with President Trump.

That's I hope you will support my campaign to
elect an America First majority by chipping in a contribution of
$10, $25, $50, or $100 right away.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59948400:WWeGXqHXN:m:3:2365227053:3F30A6D2F5C4DF2E17D10D85D1392E89:r

However, unraveling the Biden regime and fake
news media lies about January 6 is just the start.

An America First majority led by Speaker
Donald Trump will:

Shine a light on Hunter Biden's corrupt
business dealings in Ukraine and Communist China.

Hold Joe Biden accountable for the illegal
alien invasion on the southern border.

Expose the Big Tech censors covering up for
Dr. Fauci's lies about funding dangerous coronavirus research at
the Wuhan Institute of Virology.

I know I want to see Nancy Pelosi surrender
the Speaker's Gavel to Donald Trump.

My first vote in the next Congress will be
firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House and replacing her
with Donald Trump.

But I need your help to send Pelosi packing
and elect in America First majority.
So please help me fight to end Nancy Pelosi's
reign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250,
$100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 today.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59948400:WWeGXqHXN:m:3:2365227053:3F30A6D2F5C4DF2E17D10D85D1392E89:r

Together I know that America First Patriots
will take our country back this November.

Sincerely,

Matt Gaetz

An America First majority led by Speaker Donald Trump will: Shine a light on Hunter Biden's corrupt business dealings in Ukraine and Communist China. Hold Joe Biden accountable for the illegal alien invasion on the southern border. Expose the Big Tech censors covering up for Dr. Fauci's lies about funding dangerous coronavirus research at the Wuhan Institute of Virology. name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsbv9q0i70tovnlkr8mni7jqr0bu62lg2ldpp1ig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboj0t9mcior6c736io72cr76apm4d9n6hi35dpncko7ac31c5rj7crkmhrbas9nmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j72tpjc1jrcoj66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ieeo30c1h60oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zadn83gd7qokqj8dppqcra7jk7bpofhjkcg4r16o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv20kanv47k2eh23pnoc347tk5rclbsfilhjq2t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm4enru1bcjgq5jjvbt6igaguiuuqug33r11php8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2k6rjsd0khk46h63imuiqathjcrcgl57477q79o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z703l34piudqr2507i8ni23lnehoi43lbdf9dkc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs4d9ri9gkfp6f3qo6utk5o3chgfvu8o1ml975do_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztvbnnvopf82kekqsur70le9sv8gl93u65iaem20_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvu74nvojo6g5pl5cqmm2de8cei1ea5bvc3irflo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zags5bd67e6nlh93dmo25qmo3tfc8r1ct1qsm318_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt022a4f5kg5gsjjt65m5tk4agd5f8m96ivs5ve0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z96pag45dqbhe54f3d1vjidk9sm26lq06c287qc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z55rmd1bbnenibac8681ec3su2o9b2fl8e66hfng_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg60o32c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Make history with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
Together, we will take back our country | Recently, I announced my candidacy for Alaska's United States House of Representatives seat.
Patriot,

**I want to make history together.**

Recently, I announced my candidacy for Alaska's United States House of Representatives seat because we need a _**TRUE**_ America First patriot fighting for our state in Washington.

Now, I want YOU to join our fight as an **Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member**. Together, we will unite the America First movement in Alaska and SAVE OUR COUNTRY.

**[SAVE ALASKA>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

Public service is a calling and I am proud to be fighting for the great people of Alaska. By becoming an **Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member** you are joining me in the fight for:

**_Restoring our Alaskan values
Fighting the left's socialist Agenda
Providing energy security for America
Revitalizing our economy
AND SO MUCH MORE_**

Patriot, taking back our country from the radical Left and restoring President Trump's agenda in Washington will not be easy. That's why I'm counting on great patriots like YOU to join me in this fight.

_**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to become an Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member and help me SAVE ALASKA.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**_

**[DAY 1 SARAH FOR ALASKA MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Patriot
MEMBERSHIP STATUS: ****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: TODAY**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $250>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105116:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105117:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105118:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $35>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105119:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

I won't lie to you. This is the final chance we have to reclaim the America we love before Biden and the socialist Left _**destroy our country for good**_.

Alaska needs a proud conservative fighter representing it and that's exactly what I plan on being. Don't just take my word for it. Here's what President Trump said about me:

**" Sarah Palin is tough and smart and will never back down, and I am proud to give her my Complete and Total Endorsement, and encourage all Republicans to unite behind this wonderful person and her campaign to put America First!"
- President Donald J. Trump**

_This is our moment. Together we will take back our country and put America First again. Patriot, I need to know, will you be standing with me?_

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to become an Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member and stand with President Trump and me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105115:62-uJuoNR:m:1:3299561967:A522D311B33107E539D2B07CEEAD4170:r)**

body:
|
---

Folks, you know I want to build a Florida for All. But that’s only possible if I know what issues are most pressing to YOU.

So this week, I’m hosting _**"Chat with Charlie,"**_ where you’ll get a chance to submit whatever questions you have about me, our plan for Florida, and what you can do to get involved.

Here are the details — [_**you can RSVP by chipping in any amount to my campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021492/339738071/1418660878?refcode=20220411_EV_EM_AMA_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWUwZWMyYS1jNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIzsrP1C-qeqeZ_G2r4BKWwgMn7HFE3OI3jGGRYK60U=)
**What:** Chat with Charlie
**When:** Wednesday, April 13 at 6pm
**Where:** This is a virtual event
**Why:** To build a Florida for All!
**[Donate to RSVP and submit your questions>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021493/339738072/1418660878?refcode=20220411_EV_EM_AMA_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWUwZWMyYS1jNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIzsrP1C-qeqeZ_G2r4BKWwgMn7HFE3OI3jGGRYK60U=)**
---
It’s not going to be easy beating Ron DeSantis. And one thing I know for sure is that I can’t do it alone.

In fact, we’ve got to build a historic grassroots movement here in Florida.

So I hope you’ll join me on Wednesday — [**_chip in any amount, submit your questions, and let’s build a Florida for All._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021494/339738073/1418660878?refcode=20220411_EV_EM_AMA_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWUwZWMyYS1jNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIzsrP1C-qeqeZ_G2r4BKWwgMn7HFE3OI3jGGRYK60U=)
**[Donate to RSVP and submit your questions>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021495/339738074/1418660878?refcode=20220411_EV_EM_AMA_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWUwZWMyYS1jNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIzsrP1C-qeqeZ_G2r4BKWwgMn7HFE3OI3jGGRYK60U=)**

Charlie Crist

body:
Please split a $25 contribution between my campaign and CommonGood to help me close the polling gap and save our Democratic Senate majority before it’s too late! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220411_CGVA_CCM]
Derek – poll after poll has shown me trailing my Trump-endorsed opponent, and now The Cook Political Report has joined Nate Silver in calling me the most vulnerable senator up for re-election this year.
Nevada is the most important race for control of the Senate. There is absolutely no doubt that I’m Mitch McConnell’s #1 target. The GOP has already spent over $4 MILLION smearing me with attack ads and it’s putting this Senate seat and our majority in severe jeopardy of flipping from blue to red.
Experts agree we can still turn this around and save our Democratic Senate majority, but only if we immediately raise the resources to fight back against the vicious GOP attacks. This news changes everything, and with tonight’s critical deadline rapidly approaching, I’m still $4,837 short of my critical fundraising goal. Please, Derek, don’t wait until it’s too late:
Please, split a contribution of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood before tonight’s critical deadline to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220411_CGVA_CCM]

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021629/339738718/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTBiMTQ2My1jNWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PDdAJ4gN8YWxiFtnw-y50MJdvVkv5RJt59915INvX1o=&emci=78643e73-68b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=410b1463-c5b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8780864)

| | Friend — we have an exciting update about my election last Tuesday. **Thursday night, the county released additional ballot counts which showed I actually came out _ahead_ of my opponent.** We're still headed to a run-off for my special election in June — but we'll be coming in a lot stronger. We overcame _a lot_ to win on Tuesday. We faced a really short timeline, low voter turnout, and hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate interests to win. [**Now, we can take this momentum to June 7th. Together, we can make a more equitable, just California >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021630/339738719/-1329068671?refcode=X_041122_ElectionResults_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTBiMTQ2My1jNWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PDdAJ4gN8YWxiFtnw-y50MJdvVkv5RJt59915INvX1o=) I'm so glad to have you on my team in this, \-- _Georgette_

Hey Peter Willis,
With just two months left before the June primary, we’re taking stock of how far we’ve come and laying plans for the most critical stretch of the race ahead. **All of those plans come back to one core fact: This is a movement by and for the people.**
But to really be able to run that kind of campaign, we need to hear from you. **[Will you take our supporter survey and tell us more about who you are and what matters to you?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wx2lwmVl_yl5ERYKP1vyJ64jlEoRQPnzn9jXYxvnrc72o5TXaIDpPQ47OWrFSvwFvMOVuB4U9GJ_wCI_oTtVh5tHFuIPzEvu0iYhYLy3C5w16xd0X2205QMtxaRDr4XtId_vnp1ZV1w9ohrSd6GP5Z1jesOc6puGqg_yEhHBee8ZWCIwKf1Zt1iKDyazJNYUDgoVfaMETSjohGlucRA_1in6ywvYQgIcVTpaAs8IHgUDTAov-6g3weZxA8gc491CJ6znf2ch7ijV-SO4tJfzJ-A/3l4/u_5RhXaiTdy5fR8LtTkW1Q/h1/DjZNCLWBcMsSSczrKIh11uJ6BrWR3t-68TjoxcHmNTg)**
[Take the Survey](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wx2lwmVl_yl5ERYKP1vyJ6-1hU0-g3ELA0WcmvuKKM-IBj-BpDYW5DIA0jCqB6aOkC6l4hjv06AWRSmKwaa8Rp_myWXvT_SdItDzt-84pjGz23mQaD_kohyJPGBLW5opg1_7-yOcdsJCt3vSLHdicAAukNlEiUC_xzY8ZLlLGGU3ks9znw5FjFqs2euUIqiuRxge3IJyh1JsIU9-r5dpzZxmV0rAHzMb5VDE_JTA-dCOPdbzjHb4-oLfLrgGN-t8twrUSDm0kDK8lVjXu0FpGVA/3l4/u_5RhXaiTdy5fR8LtTkW1Q/h2/4mJqILqrOMfPXxjyifCVr_vfd0-mg8uArKHhztffaBs)

Listening — actually listening — to constituents is something that many of our elected leaders have apparently forgotten how to do. But the only way we’ll return power to the people, where it belongs, is by listening to their needs and understanding what keeps them up at night.
That’s what surveys like this one are for — to help us build a movement that puts people over politics, workers over corporations, and families over profits.
**[Please take a minute to share with Melanie more about yourself and what matters most to you.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wx2lwmVl_yl5ERYKP1vyJ60ro8uouut-P3XzMcQyXhzRVwbbdchDBiSQG4qVfiMRh2CVA64R2aZkI1LsfP3uXY5vj6yoads-Xr7pbxjZ0m7hTXEyhUZ2f_MIlq1xciF2ANHAPuS2EDT3UmFuelGa8biFyGWapEHhImgIsT0gpnYedKXiLo-IdYnc_2VO-Ac8Z2nmn3Y1Lum7gqC_jzPfxA8d7hoZEIF2JULnToVsjbIhMD4OGYYYuqIlKjCUi62buK6NHh7BlFuKXUDRfZTD1lQ/3l4/u_5RhXaiTdy5fR8LtTkW1Q/h3/EV_n03jbEvOYtLqLk6_RxkQzCn90xv7dmAumxj7LtBc)**
Thanks for taking the time. We appreciate hearing from you!
Team Melanie

[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr5uOGSQDE8QEQm_7NYMMyTiA3r9Qkg3kzVqAth63plhdBVBxSpgHUR_P9IAuMtvIUQNEqXYehqUYmj1X4Sj5eVMpYrYYFvUnmITv_hgXWSwTBa-8SNduE1ZiWyEoVcLkmXzh555x8X_9R6l0JVfV6XvOJuq3zOQ4Rqu_SfCNNbcGtjVU4u66b-azNbP58eJICNLuVnRTGGu0kV_-sWtzL45GI37cjUU1nTuYb91smSkW42KQmj13mRk3eXPF5Sef8u7G72baPtpqrGkG5_ugfGd2tqOfc20gyxHR9v-5KF7P73Hm6PojMH7bYhsbN5QJfDaop-5cOESTBo91Qc1fxYbA3zbHgRlpCLyvaNL5xMkQ/3l4/u_5RhXaiTdy5fR8LtTkW1Q/h4/vK9Lm1_ApG9ARI0budCLvF6joNodadn4gNGHcL7Z_oY)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: The latest stop of our Berkshires to Boston Tour in Hampden County was a great success!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
We had a great day in Hampden County on Thursday!
We started the day at Main Street Deli Restaurant & Catering in Agawam for breakfast and meeting with locals.
---
|
---
| We then visited Allied Flooring & Paint, a wonderful local business with a great staff. Thanks to Cecilia Calabrese, city councilor and candidate for State Senate, for showing me around!
---
|
---
| We visited at Chicopee Town Hall and received a personal tour with Samuel Shumsky, Chicopee School Committee member, a rising star in our state.
---
|
---
| We grabbed lunch at Tavern Restaurant in Westfield, and were joined by our good friend Dan Allie.
---
|
---
| We strolled through history, Storrowton Tavern and its grounds, before getting a sweet treat at Smokin' Scoops, with owner Insights by Greg Neffinger, Former Mayor of West Springfield.
---
---
Last, our great supporters organized a sign standout in Springfield.
---
---
| Thanks to all the businesses who hosted us, and all who came out to show support and ask great questions on the trail.
I can't wait for next week's stop in Middlesex County! The itinerary will be posted this weekend; check for it and information on other upcoming events on the [Events page](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P-AChLoUuDRvXNCst3vdDsyZ5UI9gLuYnE9Ubjdh8xdgLMqToG3mraOEmumaQQfOebldYqiMtQKfhm5l-8dStoWdBLc7VSIM2sYNFdtl6AfnCvXOzbg1Uko0cugAOJ19HWBdOnYbspMLNDBVj28sQht5K8P6zfs4&c=ufAPpRH6Wxjy4ci0nI2DF-HkxmgG9F4diWDyKTpZGd0UZMoWy6Jsmg==&ch=GNPMXatdboLXyBvG-rsDj7EL3AdAhUU_UDTySy5szqjW2oSM9Uq_5A==) of my Website.

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friends, We had a great day in Hampden County on Thursday! We started the day at Main Street Deli Restaurant & Catering in Agawam for breakfast and meeting with locals. | | We then visited Allied Flooring & Paint, a wonderful local business with a great staff. Thanks to Cecilia Calabrese, city councilor and candidate for State Senate, for showing me around! | | We visited at Chicopee Town Hall and received a personal tour with Samuel Shumsky, Chicopee School Committee member, a rising star in our state. | | We grabbed lunch at Tavern Restaurant in Westfield, and were joined by our good friend Dan Allie. | | We strolled through history, Storrowton Tavern and its grounds, before getting a sweet treat at Smokin' Scoops, with owner Insights by Greg Neffinger, Former Mayor of West Springfield. Last, our great supporters organized a sign standout in Springfield. | Thanks to all the businesses who hosted us, and all who came out to show support and ask great questions on the trail. I can't wait for next week's stop in Middlesex County! The itinerary will be posted this weekend; check for it and information on other upcoming events on the == of my Website. | Leah and I are busy criss-crossing the state every day, attending different events and chatting with voters. name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqn23u4vels15mdqfij0p4ed1kaphr6tdo5a5rs0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uapn7c36eiq3corkscpb6pbmcerrcppjmsrm3c30ecrbatb16co78otmcgrjec77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqjadtmc5j3cp5jcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cjjm0p30shj649fg)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqo3ekscflqthm20t07ndtd273f14msj4gt1tdu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg68o74cph2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zko8oo4hou9tg185d0tnalhfotfngd34515lil9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg68o74cph2bs)**_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z81nfqtp6ofseq9u2n3f3q4sjuda7mt8n4vti1co_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg68o74cph2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh4l19r83msumipu3hhp15uoeq05roanrc0co178_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg68o74cph2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn16l9296ea2fger20sk0q1nmcmsg07pbmtm0pkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg68o74cph2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcouo9potu1eqp5ij6r1glq0qd8c7ui32rbl1mf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stg68o74cph2bs)**

# You're invited to meet Team Cole
**We have a powerhouse team leading us, so[come get to know them](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=8766bcd8b3&e=339f142c50)!** [](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=ae3230b081&e=339f142c50)

I hope you can make it!

Jahmal Cole

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Play Ball! ⚾
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Friday, I was in Detroit campaigning and then cheering on the Detroit Tigers to their Opening Day victory. | | | |
---
| | |
## Take Me Out to the Ballgame!
---
|
---
| **Greetings from the campaign trail, Peter!**

My week started out with a bang as I made a short trip to our nation’s capitol for a number of important meetings. Some of my time was at the **Republican Governor’s Association** where we had a great discussion about what it will take to _turn Michigan red_. Stay tuned.
---
|
---
---
| During the week, I was able to speak to Republican groups in **Branch, Hillsdale,** and**Wayne Counties**. Lots of energy and enthusiasm.

_There’s a lot of campaigning to do still, and I’m hard at work on the campaign trail_.
---
|
---
---
| Friday, I was in Detroit campaigning and then cheering on the **Detroit Tigers** to their Opening Day victory. It was a great time spent with the **Detroit Red Wings’ John Ogrodnick** , former Rep. John R. Pastor and so many citizens.
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
### Big Day

Tomorrow, _I’ll deliver over 21,000 signatures to the Secretary of State_ to have my name officially placed on the ballot. From the beginning of my campaign, I pledged to campaign tenaciously throughout the state, and that’s what I am doing now and will continue to do.

**If you haven’t volunteered to help out, now is a great time.** The momentum is strong. Events, endorsements, and more ... coming soon.

See you on the campaign trail.

Michael Brown
Common Sense Conservative
---
|
---

name: Kina Collins
subject: The absence of any advocacy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
What I saw when I visited the Barbara Jean Wright Court apartments | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk5e3hgdhQuH02DAdYppJl2quUq0npPQaelqEL2HrlChpI2yYDd369dcyPBtu_TJdzWIMKkIzpXT6XAV7XZv7xg0Rv1VBeOQIAlHtM4h-WFJYK3BwMdfMuxjzUS6s_ecWM7huj4jf6FxrOs0vq_AqjQ0WWxJ0mF4hxV4zcbknSOMQefLMrhjxrqpZZPoprc-2xO8NU0C563-JY4sP2G7zRzO/3l4/R76jEEGQRfyU_TR59GFbFg/h0/O2Uu2gduELPcs39UjxAXamjb3WiZA8ICDhGDAio63Zg) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESaZqgLnWHUQBQDDcoeT7ZMluarC67NpDn3OhQUK0qADl71ejqqGcl7mwDi3HQHEZtmtrmZ42L2cPrhKrZh-65CUhqUp5qawftYz3kPeDbR9ErcaD7ki-XD7H7Zl4b0uqobpP_1sXhyOtkZ1IWpAdbbprOd5E238T_pVoQH6u4fJcA6VOhuif57yEO9urD_rLjoT5tAsSCuIOj1icHROlbB9LlBcHdg8l-RZxYQwpcXLygXqsqxnSjWNkjibem086wVFAGlTdM_PFc20rUUhefGsp0wvgJhcS-PC0PjXnlLHY/3l4/R76jEEGQRfyU_TR59GFbFg/h1/ekmNDd_S5lme-BhPB_oH8hnlsc7QgfaxKIx-Ovb4L6U) Team, on Saturday I joined Alderman Byron Sigcho Lopez for a walk-through of the Barbara Jean Wright Court Apartments here in IL-7. I will never forget what I saw. **Housing is a human right, but for residents of this HUD development, exposed wiring, huge rat holes and mold growing inside of apartments is the reality.** How long do the people of IL-7 have to sit quietly and wait for someone to speak out for them in Congress? Who is sounding the alarm? [**I am running for Congress because we need a representative who shows up for us. If you agree, donate $3, $7, $15 today while we still have time to build the campaign necessary to win. clean_body: What I saw when I visited the Barbara Jean Wright Court apartments | | | Team, on Saturday I joined Alderman Byron Sigcho Lopez for a walk-through of the Barbara Jean Wright Court Apartments here in IL-7. I will never forget what I saw. Housing is a human right, but for residents of this HUD development, exposed wiring, huge rat holes and mold growing inside of apartments is the reality. How long do the people of IL-7 have to sit quietly and wait for someone to speak out for them in Congress? Who is sounding the alarm? After our walk through, I spent time speaking with the tenant's organization and while the primary purpose of my visit was housing, we also discussed public safety and gun violence, issues that are interwoven with housing. Investment in adequate housing is violence prevention. BJW tenants deserve improved housing conditions now, and that is going to take an advocate in Congress. Something we haven’t had for a long time. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Jonah Schulz is the only candidate standing for medical freedom... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/schulzforohio/schulz-rated-a-on-medical-freedom?e=cecfea7090)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# _Jonah Schulz is the Only Medical Freedom Candidate_

Ohio Advocates for Medical Freedom has released their candidate ratings for races across our state. Here is how the candidates for Congress in OH7 fared:
---
|
---
| It has been clear from day one that Jonah Schulz is the only candidate willing to step up and defend We The People from the radical and unconstitutional mandates that have violated our most basic rights. While Jonah's actions to defend medical freedom earned him the highest possible rating from OAMF, Miller's apathy towards the issue landed him the lowest grade of any candidate in Ohio.

These ratings come on the heels of Max Miller admitting that he has no intention of addressing vaccine/mask mandates if elected. Watch here: [https://fb.watch/cjYoJpMkdu/](https://schulzforohio.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=baa46087b1a6c64a9529eebf3&id=33677dacdd&e=cecfea7090)
---
|
---
| In response to these grades, Jonah Schulz stated:
_"There is no freedom without medical freedom. That is why I stood shoulder-to-shoulder with the people while Max Miller stood on the sidelines. That is why I have supported and continue to support efforts to pass HB248 while Max Miller’s campaign called the bill 'radical.' That is why I have assisted in petition collection efforts to get medical freedom on the ballot while Max Miller refused to even pick up a pen and sign._
_It’s time to put actions over words."_
---
| |
# **VOTE JONAH SCHULZ
FOR CONGRESS
MAY 3RD**
---
| [SchulzForCongress.com](https://schulzforohio.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=baa46087b1a6c64a9529eebf3&id=24b34a7764&e=cecfea7090 "SchulzForCongress.com")

name: Mia McLeod
subject: Abortion rights are on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA
body:
In states across the nation, anti-abortion legislation is spreading like wildfire, | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJRkGqm_Gt5Nq0ziqV0mNq751-hmyLZZjF0pEsnxueK8uRkAXOYpF1Ndb__x0ScwpRbrZkkkbS4ekFGS4UINGU9NnhXbvWPXQvZhXi7XjQdlMgO7wEL1HYv9TUFlOSB8BS-IdcSEZ8wGVujjjNuU6o8YhvULFm2um5KhMRzXehoxbkn7PBfMUYYDpH-8GtLbEsO3eIZiLfQmgOKOIp1pqluf8mROhJeniWB5Hw8DcEGHCtfBpGgxVi3fVheD9Pn2pxm0aVvCeFXYUtGYqKV92EimmNK8GdoeHXnZGLYX-1QV6uXzQf8_gUWbpCMyZKRmMUVs-E8XyLruroUo-aSTCf/3l4/8uyAKSUeQHOqW8rs05NR3Q/h0/wP40GjJV5RNsdYYJ0O0cXbWy3tjalsjur5JyD-dr-NU)
---
, In states across the nation, anti-abortion legislation is spreading like wildfire, and here in South Carolina, the attacks on reproductive rights are increasingly egregious. ** ** We are no longer working in the hypothetical. The SC Supreme Court already has a 6-week abortion ban in front of it and in the legislature, several bills restricting abortion access have been filed just this year. The downfall of Roe v Wade is looming. At the federal level, we can no longer rely on the Supreme Court to safeguard abortion access- we must fight to protect it at the state level. ** ** From pointing out Republican hypocrisy by authoring the "Viagra Bill" in 2015, to challenging anti-abortion efforts in the legislature, I've worked tirelessly to make reproductive healthcare more accessible. clean_body: In states across the nation, anti-abortion legislation is spreading like wildfire, | | , In states across the nation, anti-abortion legislation is spreading like wildfire, and here in South Carolina, the attacks on reproductive rights are increasingly egregious. We are no longer working in the hypothetical. The SC Supreme Court already has a 6-week abortion ban in front of it and in the legislature, several bills restricting abortion access have been filed just this year. The downfall of Roe v Wade is looming. At the federal level, we can no longer rely on the Supreme Court to safeguard abortion access- we must fight to protect it at the state level. From pointing out Republican hypocrisy by authoring the "Viagra Bill" in 2015, to challenging anti-abortion efforts in the legislature, I've worked tirelessly to make reproductive healthcare more accessible. We've got to take our fight to Governor McMaster's office and fortify a strong line of defense against anti-abortion efforts. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let me be clear about one thing: this new flood of anti-abortion legislation has nothing to do with South Carolina and only serves as a way for Republicans to flaunt their extremism. With gratitude, Mia McLeod About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. body:

# **Friend — On Saturday, we had our second debate of the Republican primary for the U.S. Senate, and I have a B.I.G. update to share with you. **

---
We shared our message, it resonated with conservatives, and we won the debate straw poll — which had more than 900 votes cast — with _**51% OF THE VOTE! **_ Our momentum is building across the state because we show up to debates, answer tough questions, and aren’t ignoring Georgia Republicans. **I can’t say the same for Herschel Walker. ** **See for yourself...[and if you agree that it’s going to take more than an empty podium to defeat Raphael Warnock and take back the U.S. Senate, help us win by donating here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1ce19df1e77d0032/a9a6174d2ba4128fc3d6b838967d376c/37793) **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1ce19df1e77d0032/2694eedad0d3d1cac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Georgia will decide who controls the U.S. Senate in November. I’m the **only Republican running** with a track record of winning in this state... and delivering results. **And now that message is resonating with voters across the state, but the work is just beginning.[That’s why I’m asking you to donate now if you can.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1ce19df1e77d0032/63a3a051348482d7c3d6b838967d376c/37793) ** Let’s keep up the momentum!
---

Gary Black

_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, .

name: Great America Update
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6875%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vVTVYG7LLZ3umh9PiCWHzA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60540%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLNk6UVm%2ffQH76wR%2biK5Yg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60541%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EKTJboYdXjS3L%2bRG%2fOmyCQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60542%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nT3mX5oqIbey%2bP3%2bLZRTEA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Matt Castelli
subject: Stefanik voted against capping the cost of insulin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
About one in ten people are living with diabetes in the United States and require insulin to help control their blood-sugar levels.
| Hi Team,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44010019/339700307/1081059094?refcode=MC_EM_PT_3MO_22020408_1_1&refcode2=716a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZhOTA1OC1hOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGMo8TLfEV1ecpGhL02iW00n0S_CeN2dHr2T8pDNsCs=&emci=6e6a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=716a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15140246)
This is a picture of me and my Grandma Castelli, who was diabetic — like many other members of my family.

About one in ten people are living with diabetes in the United States and require insulin to help control their blood-sugar levels. The cost of insulin has skyrocketed in the past few years solely because drug companies wish to increase their profits.

This has left many families unable to afford the ever-increasing cost of insulin, with some being forced to decide between putting food on the table and accessing life-saving medicine.

**Last week, Elise Stefanik voted against capping the cost of insulin. She voted against the health and well-being of my family and yours.**

**[Sign your name today to call out Stefanik’s failure and demand that insulin costs be capped.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44010020/339700308/1081059094?refcode=MC_EM_PT_3MO_22020408_1_1&refcode2=716a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZhOTA1OC1hOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGMo8TLfEV1ecpGhL02iW00n0S_CeN2dHr2T8pDNsCs=&emci=6e6a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=716a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15140246)**

My Grandma Castelli needed insulin just like so many others in NY-21 and across the country. By voting no, Stefanik has, once again, failed to protect my family and all the families struggling with diabetes.

**[Tell Stefanik that enough is enough by signing your name today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44010021/339700309/1081059094?refcode=MC_EM_PT_3MO_22020408_1_1&refcode2=716a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZhOTA1OC1hOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGMo8TLfEV1ecpGhL02iW00n0S_CeN2dHr2T8pDNsCs=&emci=6e6a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=716a9058-a8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15140246)**

Thank you for making your voice heard,
Matt Castelli

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Better Than This
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Joe Biden is a disaster. After just one year, he is already one of the worst presidents in American history:
❌ Historic inflation;❌ A violent crime wave;❌ A humiliating surrender in Afghanistan;❌ A border crisis;❌ Schools lying to parents and teaching kids to hate America;❌ A war on American energy that has funded Putin's war in Ukraine.
We are better than Joe Biden's America, and at the Conservative Partnership Institute (CPI), we're helping principled, patriotic conservatives fight back against the Left for the country we deserve.
Help CPI rescue America today!
The America we all want is a free and prosperous place, where people with diverse backgrounds all come together as one nation - with a government that puts us first.
Joe Biden wants no part of that. His loyalty is to left-wing fanatics, not working families. They don't believe there is any difference between boys and girls, citizens and subjects, or America and any other nation. They think we're a bad country and support policies to punish
us.
We can do better. That's why CPI and our partner organizations are leading fights against the Left on every front: to protect our border, our children, our families, our elections, and our values.
Join the Fight: Support CPI Now
We don't work for a party - we work for patriots, in Congress, in the conservative movement, and within the grassroots across the country. True conservatives know how to fight. We teach them how to win.
You don't have to take our word for it. Here's how President Donald Trump put it: "CPI is helping to build out the vital infrastructure we need to lead the America First movement to new heights."
The Left has the media, colleges, Big Tech, Wall Street, and elites in every industry. Conservatives have CPI... and YOU! And that's more than enough if we work together.
Please take a minute to learn about the fights we're leading.
And then join us in those fights by making a one-time or monthly tax-deductible gift to CPI.
Thank you for considering this important request. Together, we will save the country we love.

For Freedom,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

 

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 FaxCPI.org

SUPPORT CPI

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

Sarah has what it takes to win this fight. She’s tough as nails and has never once backed down to the radical left, the woke mob, or their cancel culture antics. As one of our BIGGEST supporters - we wanted to reach out to you first. Will you join us and endorse Sarah Palin for Congress? She has what it takes to WIN and to turn this country around. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is historic.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220411-ElizabethWarren-KBJConfirmation-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220411-ElizabethWarren-KBJConfirmation-ETG-sl1&akid=3737%2E9716520%2E9xNWOE)

I want to take a moment to celebrate, and talk about why Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation to the Supreme Court is so powerfully important. But first, I have to ask:

**[Can you chip in $5 to protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority and keep the fate of our courts out of Mitch McConnell’s hands? We need more exceptionally well-qualified judges and justices like Ketanji Brown Jackson instead of right-wing ideologues.](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220411-ElizabethWarren-KBJConfirmation-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220411-ElizabethWarren-KBJConfirmation-ETG-sl1&akid=3737%2E9716520%2E9xNWOE)**

Judge Jackson’s confirmation to the Supreme Court is historic. She'll be not only the first Black woman to sit on the Court, but also the first former federal public defender, bringing long-overdue representation and experience to the bench.

We need more judges with experience representing those without means or power -- instead of the usual special interests that already have so much influence in Washington.

But the hard truth is, if Republicans retake the Senate in November, Mitch McConnell will have the power to block _all_ of President Biden’s remaining judicial nominees, no matter how qualified or popular they are with the American people. Lindsey Graham himself admitted that if the GOP controlled the Senate, Judge Jackson wouldn’t have even gotten a hearing, let alone a vote.

There’s only one seat standing between McConnell and that unfettered power to send our courts hurtling to the right for generations to come. **Republicans are spending _millions_ in close races to sling mud at my Senate colleagues to take back control, so I’m asking you if you can pitch in to fight back.**

**[If it makes sense for you right now, please pitch in $5 or more to the DSCC today. Together, we can protect our Democratic Senate and ensure that future nominees like Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will continue to be given a fair shot.](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220411-ElizabethWarren-KBJConfirmation-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220411-ElizabethWarren-KBJConfirmation-ETG-sl1&akid=3737%2E9716520%2E9xNWOE)**

We need to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
