clean_body: | There’s one important thing that doesn’t get talked about enough in this race for governor: Veto power. As governor, Joe will have the power to stop legislation that hurts South Carolina families in its tracks. He’ll have the power to veto legislation like voter suppression bills, anti-choice measures, and more. Just recently, the Kentucky governor was able to stop an anti-trans bill from becoming law by using this power—and we know McMaster would have made it law. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = It wasn't that long ago that McMaster signed bills like these into law: Legislation to ban nearly all abortions statewide Legislation to make it easier to buy and carry a weapon Legislation to make casting a ballot harder to do The SC GOP’s gerrymandered maps that make it nearly impossible for Democrats to win in some regions And a lot more We can only expect more discriminatory legislation to become law if McMaster gets another term as governor. We need a leader who is focused on the big things—teacher pay and support, stopping flooding, improving access to healthcare. Joe is ready to be that leader, but it’ll take all of us to get there, especially as McMaster has a lot of special interest backing. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for showing your support today, Team Joe for S.C. | = | | If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from our team, ** Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina Joe Cunningham PO Box 21012 Charleston, SC 29413 United States **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jay=20Block?=
subject: BLOCK Boys From Competing In Girls’ Sports
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
It’s Too Much To Handle | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-7075397?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=2d5a2cfcb0&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Boys and girls are...well, boys and girls.

That’s why I can’t figure out how radical Democrats both here at home and in Washington, D.C. can condone even for one second a young male’s participation in a sport typically reserved for females of the same age.

Needless to say, I’m not surprised. Nor should you be. It’s time to **BLOCK boys from competing in girls’ sports.**

Throughout the U.S., Biden Administration officials are giving the green light to high school sports administrators to allow (much-stronger) male students to outshine their female counterparts.
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=c37f0a24c0&e=102b599530)
---
| Luckily, there is momentum growing to further prevent crazy exceptions like these from taking place. [In Pennsylvania](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=240839aee1&e=102b599530), legislators are making a bold attempt at reinstituting gender classifications when it comes to a school's given athletics program. This is a good start, and it’s the kind of progress voters in New Mexico deserve to see take shape.

But by sitting on the sidelines, we can’t possibly win the fight against radical Democrats who believe fairness among both sexes should equate to cheating.

**It’s too much to handle.** Because that’s what it is at the end of the day: _cheating_.

Your generous contribution will allow us to restore order in athletic departments across the United States and New Mexico. If Pennsylvania can make a bold attempt at putting a stop to this insanity, so can we. Will you help make that happen?
**LET’S BLOCK UNFAIR SPORTS PRACTICES AMONG THE SEXES **

---

name: Team Welch
subject: The importance of defending the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Our seat could be the difference in what America’s future looks like for the working and middle class.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=223%2E61531%2EGg4Voy)
Hello,
If Republicans retake the Senate majority, they’ve shown us exactly what they’re going to do: They’re going to fight for failure.
We’ve seen them filibuster everything from strengthening reproductive rights to labor protections to raising the minimum wage. And the American people pay the price.
The GOP calls the Senate race in Vermont a “sleeper” race, which means they’re gearing up to send their millions here. It’s up to us to come together to show them that Vermont—and the Democratic Senate majority—is not for sale. Winning here means working to secure a better future for working families in Vermont and across the country.
[**Can you make a contribution to this campaign and help defend the majority from Mitch McConnell and the rest of the Senate Republicans?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1789?t=21&akid=223%2E61531%2EGg4Voy)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: North Carolina Polling (via Team Cooper)
subject: re: teachers’ salaries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Roy supports efforts to bring teacher pay up to par. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026427/339763845/823540626?refcode=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAyNWU2OC1kZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQgIYVAMsqFw0FXxC7-co1hfdCumf4FXaIhd4FmGeb8=&emci=2fd9be61-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
| **ONE-QUESTION POLL ON NC TEACHERS’ SALARIES:** Peter, do you believe public school teachers in North Carolina deserve higher pay? | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026428/339763846/-137898843?refcode=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAyNWU2OC1kZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQgIYVAMsqFw0FXxC7-co1hfdCumf4FXaIhd4FmGeb8=&emci=2fd9be61-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026429/339763847/-137898843?refcode=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAyNWU2OC1kZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQgIYVAMsqFw0FXxC7-co1hfdCumf4FXaIhd4FmGeb8=&emci=2fd9be61-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---|---

Let’s be clear: No public school teacher should have to work a second or third job just to make ends meet.
Teachers go to incredible lengths to give our kids the best possible start — something Roy knows firsthand. _Growing up, his mom was a public school teacher in Nash County, and she instilled in him a lifelong respect for our educators._
**As governor, Roy has fought to make sure public school teachers get fair compensation that recognizes how hard they’ve had to work to make sure students continue receiving the quality education they deserve, even amidst a pandemic.**
We’re proud that our new budget includes teacher raises, but they aren’t enough. Teachers’ salaries still aren’t keeping up with inflation. And North Carolina teachers still earn less than those in many other states.
Roy supports efforts to bring teacher pay up to par. Now, he wants to hear from you:
**Do you believe that North Carolina public school teachers deserve higher pay?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026430/339763848/-137898843?refcode=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAyNWU2OC1kZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQgIYVAMsqFw0FXxC7-co1hfdCumf4FXaIhd4FmGeb8=&emci=2fd9be61-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026431/339763849/-137898843?refcode=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAyNWU2OC1kZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQgIYVAMsqFw0FXxC7-co1hfdCumf4FXaIhd4FmGeb8=&emci=2fd9be61-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b025e68-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---|---
Thanks for taking our poll,
Team Cooper

Now, he wants to hear from you: Do you believe that North Carolina public school teachers deserve higher pay? | ---|--- Thanks for taking our poll, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER. >>](http://trk.readactnews.)**
This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](http://trk.readactnews.)**_
[](http://trk.readactnews._Gmg)
At this critical time in our nation's history, we need leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our nation's interest to the highest bidder.

I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:
**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**
**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](http://trk.readactnews.)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://trk.readactnews.)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](http://trk.readactnews.-W3Gs7ah88JBggSL76jA)**

|

name: NinaTurner.com
subject: A very difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
I had to make a very difficult decision this morning.
#

Hi team, it's Kara — Nina’s campaign manager.
I had to make a very difficult decision this morning.
Just before our budget meeting earlier today, we found out that **our opponents are going up on the air with a $90,000 TV ad buy starting _tomorrow._**
It was immediately clear that we needed to significantly boost our digital advertising budget if we were going to fight back.
**The money wasn’t in our April budget, but I gave the green light anyway.**
It was a risky call, for sure. But early voting is already underway in this primary, and we have no choice — there’s simply no time to waste.
I made the bet that if we asked, our movement would come through for Nina, just like you have time and time again. And I’m really hoping you will — for Nina, for the working families of Greater Cleveland, and for everyone ready to win this race.
**[Can you make a $27 contribution to stand with Nina Turner today? Every donation will help fill the budget gap we created making critical investments in this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026483/339764183/413031954?refcode2=131e251b-e0b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220411-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzFlMjUxYi1lMGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kq2VQiqZmXQWKDQ7C_XDAqU40ngWPF-xce20EtH_oJQ=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026484/339764184/413031954?refcode2=131e251b-e0b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220411-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzFlMjUxYi1lMGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kq2VQiqZmXQWKDQ7C_XDAqU40ngWPF-xce20EtH_oJQ=)**
Like I said, it was a difficult decision, but it was the right one.
The thing about our campaign that makes it so different from our opponents’ is that our movement is powered by thousands and thousands of grassroots supporters just like you chipping in what you can.
I’m extremely proud of that fact, and I hope you are too. Thank you in advance for adding your support at this critical time for our campaign.
With these hands,
Kara Turrentine
Campaign Manager
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44026485/339764185/413031954?refcode2=131e251b-e0b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220411-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzFlMjUxYi1lMGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kq2VQiqZmXQWKDQ7C_XDAqU40ngWPF-xce20EtH_oJQ=)**

body:
[Open to read >>] |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027364/339768310/1278717326?amount=25&refcode=20220411_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI2Yjk2Yi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA4erYChcmB5trqUC0hWyCf5QENz-g6IUDF3YS3ux2k=)

_**NEWS ALERT:**_**Charlie Crist talks with MSNBC’s Katie Phang about stakes of Florida governor’s race**
_“Ron DeSantis ... is focused on 2024. He’s forgetting the rest of Florida.”_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027365/339768311/1278717326?amount=25&refcode=20220411_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI2Yjk2Yi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA4erYChcmB5trqUC0hWyCf5QENz-g6IUDF3YS3ux2k=)
---
[DONATE TO ELECT CHARLIE CRIST >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027366/339768312/1278717326?amount=25&refcode=20220411_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI2Yjk2Yi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA4erYChcmB5trqUC0hWyCf5QENz-g6IUDF3YS3ux2k=)
Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about Florida, friend — he only cares about appealing to his billionaire donors and helping his own political career.

And Charlie didn’t hold back when he went on MSNBC yesterday — he hit on each way Ron DeSantis is harming Floridians, from restricting voting rights, to banning discussion of LGBTQ+ issues in school, to attacking a woman’s right to choose.

Charlie told MSNBC, **_“This is not what Florida is about. Florida is a good, decent place with good, decent people.”_**

He’s exactly right.

**But if we’re going to stay competitive with Ron DeSantis and take him down in November, we don’t have any choice but to raise as much money as we can. If supporters like you pitch in a few dollars now, we’ll stay on track to defeat Gov. DeSantis!**

**_[Can you help us get there? Pitch in now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027367/339768313/1278717326?amount=25&refcode=20220411_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI2Yjk2Yi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KA4erYChcmB5trqUC0hWyCf5QENz-g6IUDF3YS3ux2k=)_**

name: Mandy Patinkin & Kathryn Grody
subject: Mandy and Kathryn here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
The most extreme Republican Party of our lifetimes is on the precipice of taking back both the Senate and the House!
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027380/339768330/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk910-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODI2Yjk2Yi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2vGIUOrVTvj6b7dWhHTuf2QyeBk_Fbql8Wzaed8E2E=)
| | _Kathryn Grody and Mandy Patinkin are actors and activists who have been married for almost 42 years. Patinkin is most known for his roles in Homeland and The Princess Bride. Grody wrote and acted in an autobiographical play called Mom's Life. During the 2020 election, Grody and Patinkin gathered a large social media following for their viral videos encouraging people to vote. _
---
Hi there –
For as long as we've been married (and it's been a long time), we've worked together – and worked ourselves up – getting out the vote and electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Because we know, as you know, how important every election is.
And this election is no different. The most extreme Republican Party of our lifetimes is on the precipice of taking back both the Senate and the House! If Mitch McConnell regains power in the Senate, he'll work to undo everything that Democrats have accomplished so far – affecting everything from health care protections to reproductive rights.
But instead of rolling on the floor, despondent and shaking, we decided to do something. And that something is helping reelect Senator Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire. Control of the Senate hinges on this seat, and we need all hands on deck.
Maggie Hassan has been a powerful voice in the fight to protect our democracy. She, like us, believes that no matter what your political affiliation is, every American's sacred right to vote should be protected. With our democracy at stake, we can't afford to lose Maggie's leadership.
But here's the issue: There are a lot of Republicans across the country who will do whatever and spend whatever it takes to defeat Maggie and take back the Senate.
That's why we’re asking for your help, friend. [**If you can, please chip in $3 to help reelect Maggie in New Hampshire and keep Democrats' control in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027381/339768331/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk910-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODI2Yjk2Yi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2vGIUOrVTvj6b7dWhHTuf2QyeBk_Fbql8Wzaed8E2E=)

| Friend,

President Trump's Title 42 order to protect Americans from illegal immigration has been one of our nation's only safeguards against the Biden Administration's borders agenda.

**Now,_Joe and Kamala want to do away with this crucial line of defense_, plunging an already dangerous situation into _unmitigated catastrophe._**
_Republican Attorneys General are suing Biden to reverse his policy._
---
| [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=997396d6f4&e=edf8a4d16d)

Brnovich calls their new policy,_"One of the most boneheaded decisions of this administration,_ " asserting that Joe Biden's "_...reckless pandering to the far Left and complete abdication of [his] responsibility to public safety cannot be allowed to continue."_

Republican Attorneys General are fighting Biden's America Last policies and open border agenda. **Your immediate support is vital to keep Rule of Law Attorneys General in office to hold Joe Biden accountable for his failed policies.**

[Will you rush a contribution today to help Republican Attorneys General hold Joe Biden accountable for his inexcusable breach of the law? ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=7b5e65b2b3&e=edf8a4d16d)

**_HISTORY MADE, Peter:_** **_Senate Confirms Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the FIRST Black woman Justice on the Supreme Court of the United States._** This is a powerful – _and long overdue_ – moment in American history, Peter.

I understand personally the great weight that comes with being the first Black woman in a position of power. Little Black girls across America will see themselves in a Supreme Court Justice for the first time ever – that inspiration is no little feat.

**Making history is a grueling task, Peter, but Justice Brown Jackson held her head high as she faced racist and sexist smears against her character.**

The battle for the Supreme Court remains a crucial one to protecting our reproductive freedoms, democracy, and more, Peter, but with Justice Brown Jackson on the bench, we can all breathe a little easier.

[So please, join me today congratulating Justice Brown Jackson on her history-making confirmation. Only 2,500 spots are available so sign her card now! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021414/339737450/1391408452?refcode=MRFC_20220411_EMCARD_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2JiMzA0OS1jM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtAtzVSxYClwIQr7ixTb3oEiDPFojdhEimgoSnx293k=&emci=adf5d72b-bab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=83bb3049-c3b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021415/339737451/1391408452?refcode=MRFC_20220411_EMCARD_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2JiMzA0OS1jM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtAtzVSxYClwIQr7ixTb3oEiDPFojdhEimgoSnx293k=&emci=adf5d72b-bab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=83bb3049-c3b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788) | [SIGN THE CARD: Congratulations, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021416/339737452/1391408452?refcode=MRFC_20220411_EMCARD_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2JiMzA0OS1jM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtAtzVSxYClwIQr7ixTb3oEiDPFojdhEimgoSnx293k=&emci=adf5d72b-bab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=83bb3049-c3b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Court Rules Against Newsom Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A Most Undeserved Break](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioptZG-kegFgH-CuRqhIbxP3lbP91V4LeAI1qtnx07bVGQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr11_final&n=1) Gavin Newsom has to be close to a record for the number of bills and orders he’s signed that have been ruled unconstitutional. A court just rebuked him again, overturning a law imposing quotas on businesses. Of course, Newsom had to read about the decision from the undisclosed tropical country where’s he vacationing for two weeks. And now the Legislature has joined him on Spring Break, recessing without doing anything about gas prices. A credit to Fox 40 for pointing out the absurdity of this, in a segment that breaks down the Supermajority’s bizarre series of maneuvers against my gas tax bill – and how we forced them to backtrack. Watch the story and my interview [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooO8c3FvBG-75AFVfiCV-YDEf0z3rrg1gZyJQu-14pUEKzVmUOfuh6TYY7CP7Dm6ac&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr11_final&n=2). When the Legislature returns on April 18, things will move quickly. The awful bills we’re fighting against (the [Vaccine Work Group bills](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorXaAMZ75RgmOUELhJ9S78rdH7ylDD3qc1HUyReYXqSjdyAjAvy76urKKrlnLcR1nc&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr11_final&n=3) as well as AB 2223) must pass out of committee by April 29 or they’re dead. That’s the rule, though the Legislature does have a habit of waiving its rules. This committee deadline is followed by a May 27 date for a bill to pass the whole Assembly or Senate – known as the “house of origin” deadline, which can’t be waived. In addition to halting the gas tax, I'm focused on passing 3 of my bills: AB 1599, which repeals Prop. 47; AB 2902, which limits a State of Emergency to 30 days; and ACA 13, which protects sheriffs who refuse to fire officers for their medical decisions. On the campaign front, we shot our TV ad this weekend, and I can’t wait to show it to you. I think it perfectly captures the citizens movement we’ll bring to Washington. [Support our grassroots campaign](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr11_final&n=4) [Attend this week’s statewide events](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltfVa2LAuro2ATBTgJF5BEnHrSkaMnUfh0-mF6ilnvo8J&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr11_final&n=5) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr11_final&n=6).

name: Shontel Brown (personal)
subject: The clock is winding down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Peter, Shontel here!

Our final FEC deadline before the primary is just days away, so I’ll make this quick!

We’re still short of our $2,500 goal. Putting up strong numbers is essential, but we cannot do it without your help! Can you pitch in $5 right now to help us close the gap and post strong for April 13's FEC deadline?

Donate today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shontel-brown-for-congress-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_220411PersonalResend_N_SB_180DO_5_NG_N_PT

This deadline is a major turning point in the life of our campaign. Last quarter, we were just shy of our goal, but now is our time to prove that we have what it takes to lead Ohio’s progress.

Our challenger’s war chest continues to swell with thousands in out-of-state dollars, but they are no match for the power of our grassroots campaign. We’re so close to our goal, and with your help, I know we can do this.

As our final FEC filing before the primary, this represents an opportunity to set the tone and ensure that we have all the resources we need to reach voters. Peter, will you donate $5 right now to help us reach our $2,500 goal?

name: SENATE MAJORITY ALERT (Iowa)
subject: The GOP’s desperate, partisan attempt to protect Sen. Chuck Grassley (R):
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
In the dead of night, a judge sided with national Republicans ...
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS OUT OF IOWA:** In the dead of night, a judge sided with national Republicans' meritless attempts to kick Democrat Abby Finkenauer off the ballot in her campaign against vulnerable incumbent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R).
This is the _second_ time Washington Republicans have made desperate and anti-democratic moves to have Abby removed from the ballot – and it's because Sen. Chuck Grassley has never been more vulnerable. He's facing RECORD-LOW approval in Iowa, and a mere 27% of likely Iowa voters said they wanted to reelect him.
Abby can win, and if she does, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold the Senate majority. We’re going to FIGHT BACK hard against this partisan attack and ensure the voices of Iowans are heard at the ballot box.

**That's why we’re challenging this decision. Now is the time we need this grassroots team to step up stronger than ever before.**** [Please, to help Abby fight these GOP attacks, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now? Republicans are stopping at nothing to silence the voices of Iowans – but with your help, _we won't let them._ Please donate whatever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028279/339770358/888067044?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk920-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjkyZTczNy1lNmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqTVvbICd70u3VdY2JkXxlD-8DJ_Tudir1LFQkLJt94=)**
We are not going to stop in the face of these desperate and repeated attacks. We are going to continue building the coalition that can defeat Chuck Grassley in November and expand our Democratic Senate majority. It’s the only way we can deliver progress for working families.

Thank you for fighting hard alongside Abby.

Chuck Grassley (R). This is the second time Washington Republicans have made desperate and anti-democratic moves to have Abby removed from the ballot – and it's because Sen. name: Sarah Palin
subject: Make history with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
Together, we will take back our country | Recently, I announced my candidacy for Alaska's United States House of Representatives seat.
Peter,

**I want to make history together.**

Recently, I announced my candidacy for Alaska's United States House of Representatives seat because we need a _**TRUE**_ America First patriot fighting for our state in Washington.

Now, I want YOU to join our fight as an **Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member**. Together, we will unite the America First movement in Alaska and SAVE OUR COUNTRY.

**[SAVE ALASKA>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

Public service is a calling and I am proud to be fighting for the great people of Alaska. By becoming an **Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member** you are joining me in the fight for:

**_Restoring our Alaskan values
Fighting the left's socialist Agenda
Providing energy security for America
Revitalizing our economy
AND SO MUCH MORE_**

Peter, taking back our country from the radical Left and restoring President Trump's agenda in Washington will not be easy. That's why I'm counting on great patriots like YOU to join me in this fight.

_**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to become an Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member and help me SAVE ALASKA.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**_

**[DAY 1 SARAH FOR ALASKA MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
MEMBERSHIP STATUS: ****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: TODAY**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $250>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105351:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105352:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105353:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $35>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105354:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

I won't lie to you. This is the final chance we have to reclaim the America we love before Biden and the socialist Left _**destroy our country for good**_.

Alaska needs a proud conservative fighter representing it and that's exactly what I plan on being. Don't just take my word for it. Here's what President Trump said about me:

**" Sarah Palin is tough and smart and will never back down, and I am proud to give her my Complete and Total Endorsement, and encourage all Republicans to unite behind this wonderful person and her campaign to put America First!"
- President Donald J. Trump**

_This is our moment. Together we will take back our country and put America First again. Peter, I need to know, will you be standing with me?_

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to become an Official Day 1 Sarah for Alaska Member and stand with President Trump and me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60105350:JwwotuoNa:m:1:3253819041:C692AFDCA0346B04465DA92211E3C189:r)**

subject: We won the sole endorsement of the California Labor Federation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=ec26837347&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

In case you missed it, I wanted to share some HUGE news: Our campaign for Congress won the sole endorsement of the California Labor Federation.

This is a big one, and a great honor. The California Labor Federation (CLF) represents over two million union workers in our state, and having them in our corner — and on our field and volunteer teams — is a massive boost to our momentum.

Peter, I am extremely proud to have earned a 99% lifetime rating from the CLF during my time in the Legislature. Across the board, union members in California know that I will always have their back.

That’s why local unions from the Teamsters to Sheet Metal Workers, Teachers to Operating Engineers, service employees to public sector workers and others have given us their sole and unequivocal endorsement.

In Congress, I look forward to expanding the fight to bring good-paying union jobs back home and standing tall against any attempt to erode union rights.

[Donate $10, $25, $50 or whatever you can give right now to keep the #Mullmentum going!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=6131b08833&e=292fde286a)

Let’s go win,

Kevin Mullin

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021786/339739231/-695349871?refcode=ZL_EM_ST_4MO_220411_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzRiMGYxOS1jNmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyPrSha0pbni_pbL3-xuqkApuvOeKaICuC6alXjw538=)
**A NOTE OF THANKS**

**From Zoe**

_As many of you know, in mid-March I tested positive for COVID-19. In accordance with the CDC and the Office of the Attending Physician's guidelines, I isolated and canceled campaign events. I was quite sick but worked remotely as much as I was able for around a week before testing negative and resuming a regular schedule.

During that time, I received many well-wishes from supporters. THANK YOU for your messages and prayers. You helped lift me up.

I encourage everyone who is eligible to get vaccinated and boosted. Let's follow the science and continue to support one another.

With my appreciation,
Zoe_

In accordance with the CDC and the Office of the Attending Physician's guidelines, I isolated and canceled campaign events. I was quite sick but worked remotely as much as I was able for around a week before testing negative and resuming a regular schedule. During that time, I received many well-wishes from supporters. THANK YOU for your messages and prayers. You helped lift me up. I encourage everyone who is eligible to get vaccinated and boosted. Let's follow the science and continue to support one another. With my appreciation, Zoe Column: San Jose’s new congressional boundaries mean more national clout San Jose Spotlight By Rich Robinson: Rep. Zoe Lofgren will remain dean of the delegation and her power has never been greater. Op-Ed: Rep. Lofgren is right—tech policy should focus on protecting consumers San Jose Spotlight By Adam Kovacevich: Rep. Zoe Lofgren [has pursued a] consumer-first approach to tech legislation. When Congress has gone off the rails with bad tech policy, she’s spoken up. At the same time, she’s taken a no-holds-barred approach to defending consumer privacy and security while cracking back at misinformation online. A Sense of Frustration, Urgency as the January 6 Investigation Crawls Toward Midterms Vanity Fair Lofgren’s respect for the rule of law is genuine, and her understanding of the stakes for democracy sincere. UPCOMING Monday in Monterey (County)****** ******Today, Monday, April 11, Zoe will be spending time in the City of Soledad.**** ******She'll be meeting with business owners, teachers, students, healthcare workers, and the Mayor.**** ******We look forward to updating you about this visit to the Valley!**** ****### | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. =** PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS Lofgren for Congress PO Box 913 San Jose, CA 95113 United States

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Sign the petition: $15 minimum wage now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
It’s time for Ohio to support its people, not push them out.

Team,

Across Ohio, people tell me one thing: they’re frustrated with the status quo.

I’ve visited all 88 counties in Ohio – and in every corner of our state people feel ignored by our current government. Ohio workers deserve to make enough money at one good job to make ends meet. For too many Ohioans, that’s not the case right now. That’s why we need to raise wages for working people across the board, including minimum wage workers.

**[I’m proud to support a $15 minimum wage in Ohio, and I’m hoping you will too. This is the first step in bringing opportunity back to Ohio and ensuring that people working full time can provide for themselves and their families. Can you add your name to our petition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028692/339772186/-1237773052?ms=nw_em_220411_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220411_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjNmZWM1MS1lOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9LiAlTO2l73W-tWDSC96elzgIZTybe3WZmndt7WOhQ=&emci=4c6bf782-e5b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ab3fec51-e8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**

Ohio used to be a place where people came for opportunities – that’s why I moved here for college. But the Republican leaders in our state government have spent the last 30 years putting profits before people, and corruption has run rampant.

**Ohio deserves better.** We deserve better jobs, better schools, and better opportunities. I’m in this race to fight for a stronger Ohio and that starts with a higher minimum wage.

**[Will you sign your name and join us in the fight for a $15 minimum wage? It’s time for Ohio to support its people, not push them out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028693/339772187/-1237773052?ms=nw_em_220411_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220411_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjNmZWM1MS1lOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9LiAlTO2l73W-tWDSC96elzgIZTybe3WZmndt7WOhQ=&emci=4c6bf782-e5b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ab3fec51-e8b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**

Onward,
Nan

body:
As a Congresswoman, I will do all I can to ensure that our farmers have the support they need to thrive in our economy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021862/339739649/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.11_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjgwNjIwMi1jN2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6guAME_4hdRLqaYcTcrKmPbzMrTtmXnlTtH7dM795ZM=) Hi Peter, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021863/339739650/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.11_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjgwNjIwMi1jN2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6guAME_4hdRLqaYcTcrKmPbzMrTtmXnlTtH7dM795ZM=)I wanted to share a bit about my personal story with you all, my incredible grassroots team. **Growing up on a family farm, I learned the value of hard work at an early age from my parents.** Some of my fondest memories from my childhood are doing farm chores with my two sisters and riding along with my dad as he sold seed corn. _Farming is a tough business_ , and the people working hard every day to make a living are the backbone of our incredible state. Sadly, farmers are facing an uncertain future; uneven commodity prices, climate change, farm consolidation, and high supply costs. [**In Congress, I will fight for farmers→ if you stand with farmers will you chip in to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021864/339739651/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.11_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjgwNjIwMi1jN2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6guAME_4hdRLqaYcTcrKmPbzMrTtmXnlTtH7dM795ZM=) | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44021865/339739652/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.11_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjgwNjIwMi1jN2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6guAME_4hdRLqaYcTcrKmPbzMrTtmXnlTtH7dM795ZM=)

subject: Dellicker to hold Town Hall at Hellertown's Steel Club
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
And Scheller skips yet another chance to debate | | | |
---
| | |
# **Congressional Town Hall this Wednesday at the Steel Club**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

I'm pleased to announce that the Steel Club in Hellertown will host a Congressional Town Hall this Wednesday, April 13. Doors open at 6 p.m. and the discussion will start at 7 p.m. The event is open to the public with light refreshments, snacks and a cash bar. The Steel Club is one of the most beautiful venues in the Lehigh Valley, especially during the spring. I hope you can attend.

Lisa Scheller was invited, but she declined, again.

During the past week, Lisa Scheller has dodged the Steel Club forum, ducked a Carbon County GOP debate invitation, and declined to participate in a radio roundtable hosted by WDIY Lehigh Valley Public Radio. It appears that she's done taking questions from the voters, which only hurts the Republican Party. Lisa Scheller needs to come clean about her company's ties to the [Chinese Communist Part](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=efab267a01&e=1090c5c412)[y](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bd7dcb602e&e=1090c5c412) and address critical issues about her [outsourcing jobs overseas](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=344938cd6e&e=1090c5c412). Visit [www.asklisascheller.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bc206eed84&e=1090c5c412) to see the questions I've asked. I think voters want answers to these questions too.

In other news, I'll be in Carbon County on Monday for a Meet-and-Greet, Northampton County on Tuesday for a meeting of the Blue Mountain Fish and Game Association, and Lehigh County on Saturday for an Easter Egg Hunt. We've got a new [Events](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=927b35eabb&e=1090c5c412) section on our website to keep you informed about all our campaign related occurrences.

On the domestic policy front, Susan Wild and Washington Democrats continue to miss the mark. I'm concerned about the Biden Administration's reported actions to restrict our 2nd Amendment rights ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=a530df5029&e=1090c5c412)), which are unlawful and won't do anything to promote Strong Families. And I'm opposed to the President's recent order on the continued deferment of student loans ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9b3bb22b21&e=1090c5c412)), which disproportionately helps wealthy professionals and won't create Good Jobs. I'm also watching the news about China's draconian Covid-19 lockdowns ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=391b34a9e6&e=1090c5c412)), which are exacerbating worldwide supply chain problems and demonstrating the brutality of the Chinese Communist Party. When will American elites stop doing business as usual with China?

Finally, this is Holy Week for Christians around the world. When everything seems to be collapsing around us, I take comfort that "Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever" (Hebrews 13:8).

God Bless,

---
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| In response to the current crime wave sweeping the nation, the Biden Administration is doing what progressives have done for years- blaming the 2nd Amendment. This time, it's so-called "ghost guns" that are the scapegoat, and the Biden Administration is issuing new rules to prevent people from assembling their own weapons at home.

Never mind that the Biden Administration doesn't have the authority to issue such rules. They won't have any impact on crime and only distract from the real issue: demonizing the police and failing to enforce existing laws leads to an increase in violence. If we want Strong Families and Safe Communities, we need to support our police.
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=219c647315&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| The Biden Administration recently announced an extension to August 31 of the Covid-19 emergency moratorium on student loan repayments. Most recipients of federal student loans haven't had to make payments since March 2020. Some Democratic leaders say that if President Biden has the authority to keep extending the moratorium, he should just wipe out the debt entirely.

That would be a big mistake. According to a recent [analysis](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=82ef1a3488&e=1090c5c412), more than half of all outstanding student debt is held by people by with Master's or professional degrees and median annual incomes exceeding $100,000. Just like electric car subsidies and the state and local tax (SALT) deduction, these student debt forgiveness proposals would disproportionally benefit wealthy liberals, not working men and women. Instead of encouraging our young people to take on debt in suspect college programs, we should them to enter the trades and be prudent in paying for their higher education. Why should working men and women have to pay for the master's degrees of other people's children?
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c279fb53d9&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=6bd0470622&e=1090c5c412)
---
| Have you seen what's going on in China? In response to an uptick in Covid-19 cases, the Chinese government has locked-down the entire city of Shanghai. This isn't just affecting the Chinese economy, it's impacting the whole world's supply chain ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1f4c4acf40&e=1090c5c412)).

The Chinese government still hasn't come clean on the origins of Covid-19 and they have no problems oppressing their people, threatening their neighbors, or stealing U.S. technology. We need to counter the Chinese Communist Party, not partner with them. When I get to Congress I'll be a leader in standing up to China. You can read about my 38-point plan to counter China [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ceb7d54f55&e=1090c5c412).

name: Alisha Shelton
subject: I Know How to Work Hard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m an everyday person, not a career politician.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028721/339772362/-817186231?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220411-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjEzNjBlMS1lOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YzqrRqEZhmPDgkGDMiNa5sbAs3WwrAgg0LoiCCC0aY=)
---
| Peter,

As you may know, I grew up right here in Omaha. Here’s a picture of me as a little girl who had no idea she would be running for Congress one day:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028722/339772363/-817186231?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220411-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjEzNjBlMS1lOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YzqrRqEZhmPDgkGDMiNa5sbAs3WwrAgg0LoiCCC0aY=)
I’m an everyday person, not a career politician. I was raised by a single mom, I worked my way through college, and I was the first person in my family to graduate with a Bachelor's degree. **I know what it’s like to work hard every single day — and now I’m ready to work hard every day for the people of Nebraska’s Second Congressional District.**
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028723/339772364/-817186231?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220411-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjEzNjBlMS1lOGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YzqrRqEZhmPDgkGDMiNa5sbAs3WwrAgg0LoiCCC0aY=)
---
I don’t have a network of ultra-wealthy donors at my disposal, and I don’t take contributions from corporate PACs. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to power my campaign and ensure I can flip this seat blue.

**I hate to ask for even a dollar of your hard-earned money, and I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important — but this is _reall_ y important. clean_body: I’m an everyday person, not a career politician. | = | Peter, As you may know, I grew up right here in Omaha. Here’s a picture of me as a little girl who had no idea she would be running for Congress one day: = I’m an everyday person, not a career politician. I was raised by a single mom, I worked my way through college, and I was the first person in my family to graduate with a Bachelor's degree. I know what it’s like to work hard every single day — and now I’m ready to work hard every day for the people of Nebraska’s Second Congressional District. | = I don’t have a network of ultra-wealthy donors at my disposal, and I don’t take contributions from corporate PACs. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to power my campaign and ensure I can flip this seat blue. I hate to ask for even a dollar of your hard-earned money, and I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important — but this is reall y important. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Alisha * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

name: Team Waltz
subject: ICYMI: Rep. Michael Waltz pens children's book to combat liberal agenda: 'We need to take our kids’ education back’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Dear Peter, just wanted to make sure you saw this recent article posted on [Foxnews.com](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=9e21f9167ac54b12a119556140c58360&_e=i96qG3cwt0oM72p-9l50b13AdwjIPijL9k7mIb-PS9nutD6QRPBCeRlIITEe_fdSmKVOPYm5SR_9JIlpFXIBf7se55BTzasqvBkyrixZrZZ5rjd5hGcbdCdsugcQBrfgKz6SIRhak1CENqxIDtBlrocw9N4zfuVqR0JSVg_9h3Xj3aTTPEZRO7sYwbWKcSCpUd5L3sB1dB_x2L2CINZL8nJu3A3Quq8-Qa14PNc21h2hjGSy5T9FQ3yG_iIfyCjcoA1csR4aTLPVGkuOlMEVra4kKuo7RnbLVXjbovlSiAwHZql1jBaRXV4MQ4jSZ0GxaxIXi83o7o6uVyEw9da67HZ0-nwMRNlyfKC01F7SYEDx3PxFO4wdDVE9-ED4OUil84A5CNk510K2XvEprCpuBA%3D%3D) about Mike Waltz’s new children’s book, “Dawn of the Brave.” Please take a look! \- Team Waltz **BY BRIAN FLOOD** APRIL 11, 2022 Rep. Michael Waltz, R-Fla., is already a member of the Armed Services Committee, a Green Beret veteran and former White House counterterrorism policy adviser, but he added children's book author to his resume this month when his latest book he was published. "I wrote the book because in the wake of what we've seen with COVID and COVID lockdowns exposing so much of the garbage that's now being taught to our kids, in the wake of what we saw with the backlash in Virginia, with the Youngkin race and now what we're seeing with Disney and their woke agenda exposed. Now we need to take our kids’ education back. We need to get good conservative content to them," Waltz told Fox News Digital. Waltz teamed up with Braves Books, which aims to "teach foundational conservative values" by "dispelling the progressive agenda aimed at teaching our kids all the wrong lessons," according to its official online store. "Dawn of the Brave" is the ninth and final book in a series, as each character previously had their own adventures. All the characters reflect traditional values of faith, family, the right of every family to defend themselves, and Waltz – who joined other conservatives who penned the previous books -- was able to bring them all together to work as a team defending Freedom Island from evil rat wolves. "It tries to teach our young, our young kids is that serving your country, serving each other, serving your community, and that self-sacrifice is something that needs to be taught, and they need to emulate and that'll make our country greater and make them better citizens," he said. Waltz, who objects to everything from universities to elementary schools pushing a liberal agenda, feels conservatives need to take action. "In the case of Florida, where they're opposing a law that says we shouldn't be talking about sex and gender for five-year-olds and free kindergartners and first-graders. So I think they're the left, it will be headlong on their agenda. But we have to start pushing back. We have to start fighting back," he said. "Complaining about it and pushing back isn't enough. How do we fill that void with traditional conservative values in content? That's what ‘Dawn of the Brave’ and Brave books seeks to do." Waltz hopes "Dawn of the Brave," which is aimed at children age 6-10, helps readers recognize that everyone has strengths and weakness, but teamwork allows people to come together for the greater good. "A cheetah named Rebel believes that she can defend the island by herself, that she's the fastest, that she's the strongest and the first time the pirate wolves come, she kind of gets her butt kicked a little bit and has to go back and lick her wounds," Waltz said. "In conversations with the other characters, she figures out they can help her, and she can help them. That's something we learn on special forces teams as I'm a Green Beret that has served all over the world, but that I think applies to all aspects of life." Waltz said the characters "truly sacrifice their own comfort through training and very difficult exercises" to successfully defend Freedom Island as a team. The bad guys in the book, known as evil rat wolves, represent forces that aim to take away freedoms and rights, similar to what Russia is currently attempting in Ukraine. "As President Reagan said, ‘We're about one generation away from losing those freedoms,’" Waltz said. "I think it’s a perfect time to start planting these seeds." The book is not available on Amazon, and can only be ordered directly [through Brave Books’ website](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=9e21f9167ac54b12a119556140c58360&_e=i96qG3cwt0oM72p-9l50b5yb-CKbikUdUy7ZroEPSA0bMpgiZlsRt2roXlKWsp8vcD3oPCDAXViLJnpGasLoBQjVfleP0lUxyZZwaVH8I7lurPegdhTC0KVGX6XaA9nS2_4t23aWmji6cCumZ-MLf3j5O3fRNsjvnBfyGZwCsqiKaHkqn1Vsxz5DYWTWbFn_cnVQBj0VW0lWufpv6QysyX95LZ-DIGbRuFzL8yzgjhuSLTqEMganJ80dPTNv4dkBsRvMTd1MlTjFkwjf346ay2xxCZu_ZoHLQF-CMayjlePaJZi3ykEtBw7WPoNl5UQjL-jhdcZkx6aEcOzTKwBez5NByJRyteRgleREe4QK838%3D) and subscribe to the monthly service that provides books from conservative authors to children on a regular basis. "Children will receive one book a month. We've had other notable conservative thinkers and leaders like my colleague, Representative Dan Crenshaw, former Navy SEAL. We've had Dana Loesch really late talking about the right to defend yourself that's baked in our constitution. There's another book about the Constitution itself and how you have a founding document with a set of principles that would stand the test of time and societal pressures," Waltz said. "Each book will have a different theme and importantly, $15 from every subscription... will go to Samaritan's Purse, which has been doing such wonderful work for Ukrainian refugees." Waltz said Brave Books are made in America, and he didn’t want retailers who rely on China and Chinese manufacturing to offer the product – even if being available on Amazon and major retailers would result in increased sales. "We have to lead by example," he said. Waltz previously wrote the book "Warrior Diplomat: a Green Beret's Battles from Washington to Afghanistan." Read the FoxNews article [here](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=9e21f9167ac54b12a119556140c58360&_e=i96qG3cwt0oM72p-9l50b13AdwjIPijL9k7mIb-PS9nutD6QRPBCeRlIITEe_fdSmKVOPYm5SR_9JIlpFXIBf7se55BTzasqvBkyrixZrZZ5rjd5hGcbdCdsugcQBrfgKz6SIRhak1CENqxIDtBlrocw9N4zfuVqR0JSVg_9h3Xj3aTTPEZRO7sYwbWKcSCpxM1H1GEZ8dLxyduGxvP1TLVJywE3i1cablKk1WxGGY0e689F10bshnyaQtM84t-BmdjgMGzW0D1CX3F9fw6cDO122BGUm4hfI1ExVDuDd2KzABorpRpZFSihzDVNVGV2_-rXQu19YQg3lEV12GXYzCOHlMuXttTfCEQQf9T6KXvmozz15MWD9P4Bj4KKipwNZN6D5ymyNvo3a11k3IZmQg%3D%3D). [**ORDER YOUR COPY OF THE BOOK**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=9e21f9167ac54b12a119556140c58360&_e=i96qG3cwt0oM72p-9l50bxpYgtdA7IHXKf36lMDGQtNW4fJtCBqCmrEZV9vBr1kMFovJ2NdDKBm9HbZi3RDKlZ-dh6vdj3segbbn4IxTSkLK59ZcHirJYS06Gk82wOfHFIXKrtgZS6vccrGIi68FsK8qWNCLFt_-kL_Ho1zknGlyarjvlXiwuNotY8oB_TSCkfZQ-cLLzH_nrt-KKaKelJPvWwvYJ6CyO-5UKUNnntkAHxGvnF-RdFlXjmHL7SDBJUk8PXLx6BZHjo1m_CmYCYsyn22s7Vb3A1KmY-f6nfjhOPp10k9LAOVVK_f5BlQNkqtRicCEGdQ7kjOqxuiQNr9PDFMGzC3D0VadagW_1aZrvEj_NOiXDYNJ9BV7DgTa_jUIYDiOAtfBBpFRymn7-5Hcmt9wrr2vi5K0E1KrT2vdX82rxaLV-hvb0Y1VU0Jc) Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. [**SHOP THE OFFICIAL MIKE WALTZ STORE**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=9e21f9167ac54b12a119556140c58360&_e=i96qG3cwt0oM72p-9l50b8S4U0rZwIMYp6F7E7nKvBgHd0a2C38mh1ZG_lHGBlAMA4pQKc0eRjZ1Zw83Z5n7uarw9KWknierbTYYQOpSS292qvN_B05gf4gezbopOTkZ6sRfRu1j48PX_zS65eU8g494xsxIZYzTNcBw4WDifx0WHPYztS7K8ETpE6aWsuX8MV15m75nq8-PXgUfuESEqlP80nn_zSm7J-IvspHkIlxhdMgzJjWOE7toP_0rH1kUY4U_pEqrg-26m7h8ouSn4McsthHZQzfsacqXe7KxuoOf0q5R2-DkfYJf1N0UUm7tOiPnlW2eFN2KfWbGEFwsQP80-nU3KnQq3AgSAwTB8wf3Z6wh5v32xOjNuV7bvJMjcjTLbXzDwF-aYzVok_cZIw%3D%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Michael Waltz for Congress [Unsubscribe.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_s=9e21f9167ac54b12a119556140c58360&_t=8SBZUKAS8fs_-oiRuTVZohF-euS15inf5NDtmepllhgR5660UikG-JaAR30_ZoDu4q8VemjZcLFXEgofGudd_jEvc0P70mmSV1y73xWydeohGH1bPH-a-g3sIFdRNWjKS9mMjZB1huObfeO_bAPcfu4m4HOrUhp_kGu-0T3ImXM%3D)

name: Mario DeSantis
subject: This Won't Happen Again for 12 Years!
body:
We usually think of voter suppression as a red state issue, but blue states are just as guilty; we're just much more covert about it. In fac
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/63O0OonAl/c?w=oE_Ug6W3KQW1dz07hQKthotk-r3jrJJZXPr087-E9v0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzYzTzBPb25BbD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjRjZDMyMWJhLTlkMGYtNGE0YS1hNTE4LTg3Y2I2OTQ3NmQwZCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | This Won't Happen Again for Twelve Years!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | We usually think of voter suppression as a red state issue, but blue states are just as guilty; we're just much more covert about it. In fact,New Jersey's bizarre ballot design, which affords chosen candidates (read "establishment candidates") a 33% point advantage, is currently the focus of a U.S. District Court lawsuit. This is how the political machines maintains their power in New Jersey. Despite this challenge, our slate's placement on the ballot - even in the worst possible scenario - is looking uncharacteristically favorable. A few things are working in our favor: This year, the House of Representatives is the highest office up for re-election. If we had challenged Norcross in any other year, we would've been in the second, third, or even fourth row. This means it will be DeSantis vs. Norcross at the very top of the ballot no matter what.Why is this significant? In other elections, Norcross had the luxury of hiding under less detested names: Biden, Booker, or Menendez. This year, he'll be judged on his own name.This won't happen again for another twelve years! In previous years, phantom (fake) candidates had littered the ballot to create as much space as possible between preferred candidates and their challengers. This year was no different, but we were prepared. With the help of an election attorney, we challenged the phantom candidates. How do we know they're phantoms? They forged the name of one of our own supporters, they're not running an active campaign, one of the candidates themselves is a registered Republican - in a Democratic primary, and, with the number of Republican and unaffiliated voters who signed their petitions, they don't have enough signatures to qualify. By Wednesday, we'll know if County Clerk Joe Ripa disqualifies their slate. Thursday is also a big day! We'll find out in which slate we'll be placed on the ballot via lottery. This happens live on Thursday afternoon at3:00 PM in Blackwood, New Jersey. Feel free to come join the fun! Enjoy a lovely week and thank you so sincerely for your support, Mario
---

It's just the latest example of why we need to flip this toss-up seat from red to blue, strengthen our Democratic House majority, and avoid two more years of having a Trump sycophant represent us in Congress.

**[It's time to take a stand against the extremist, divisive politics of Zeldin and Trump by turning NY-01 blue once and for all. name: Karen Bass
subject: A note on the L.A. Times poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
I’m sure many of you have seen the LA Times poll this morning showing that one of our opponent’s numbers have moved up and we are now in a dead heat. Just think, he had to spend nearly $10 million dollars to catch us and we have barely spent a dime on voter outreach! This is unprecedented spending in a mayoral race.

Friends — I’m sure many of you have seen the _LA Times_ poll this morning showing that one of our opponent’s numbers have moved up, and we are now in a dead heat. Just think, he had to spend nearly $10 million dollars to catch us and we have barely spent a dime on voter outreach! This is unprecedented spending in a mayoral race.

We continue to set the pace in the race and are the clear leader among Democrats, this is critical especially given the L.A. electorate — 57.6% Democrat, 12.9% Republican, 23.6% DTS, and 5% small parties. This race will be decided by Democrats!

Under normal circumstances campaigns don’t begin communicating with voters until much closer to the election which is exactly what we will be doing. I do want you to know about several things that will be coming up:
* Campaign headquarters and canvassing will begin Saturday, April 30th! Please mark your calendars — more info to come soon.
* Over 1,600 volunteers have signed up from every part of the City. And this week, we’re starting precinct walks — going door to door talking to voters about their top concerns.
* We will have “pop up” offices around the City — and volunteers are being asked to assist in identifying the locations where people can go and join in a phone bank or walk precincts.
* Ballots drop begins Monday, May 9th — so from our perspective this is the day the election begins! The election ENDS June 7th — we will want voters to turn in their ballots immediately!!

**[But we will need your help! Running a campaign takes resources. Will you commit to our grassroots team by making a donation today? Every little bit helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028837/339772770/-1030761386?ms=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2FRCfXqm0ZeMvicvBalezHguAMEmPzshYcHsiEwRbIGkOsfU%2F0nnng76tc4vfvYa7T4z9pFb%2BfMWLHiqZND6dh2IiCFMa%2F3Dn4%2BdopqokgBgl5own%2BofAJJSetQeq2jZd1NmYvYkBhIvLNAkXRR20ag%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmFmZDI2Yy1lOWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RAzUCKHjCIda0sO-6YZbgu5Iv-WSjm9mJWIORUyDTPM=&emci=63c55c44-bcb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=16afd26c-e9b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

We are also going to need even more campaign volunteers. If you want to sign up to help here's where you can do it: **[karenbass.com/volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028838/339772771/-1849352658?ms=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2FRCfXqm0ZeMvicvBalezHguAMEmPzshYcHsiEwRbIGkOsfU%2F0nnng76tc4vfvYa7T4z9pFb%2BfMWLHiqZND6dh2IiCFMa%2F3Dn4%2BdopqokgBgl5own%2BofAJJSetQeq2jZd1NmYvYkBhIvLNAkXRR20ag%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmFmZDI2Yy1lOWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RAzUCKHjCIda0sO-6YZbgu5Iv-WSjm9mJWIORUyDTPM=&emci=63c55c44-bcb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=16afd26c-e9b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

Here’s the thing:
* L.A. knows me, that’s why we've had strong numbers from before our launch – despite the $10 million media blitz.
* The outsized spending in this race is emblematic of a major flaw in our system: ultra-wealthy people can put in an unlimited amount of their own money into a campaign — with virtually no accountability while candidates without personal wealth are limited to $1,500 contributions with a ton of paperwork to account for every dime.
* Angelenos understand inequity. They know the difference between a candidate who has to earn their support and someone who has the luxury of using their personal wealth.
* Angelenos know that I'll make tough decisions, that I lead across party lines and against the status quo, and that I build coalitions to get big things done.

**Remember — a 30-second ad will not beat more than 30 years of fighting for social and economic justice in this City.**

Let's do this,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028839/339772772/-1030761386?ms=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220411_latpol_fnd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2FRCfXqm0ZeMvicvBalezHguAMEmPzshYcHsiEwRbIGkOsfU%2F0nnng76tc4vfvYa7T4z9pFb%2BfMWLHiqZND6dh2IiCFMa%2F3Dn4%2BdopqokgBgl5own%2BofAJJSetQeq2jZd1NmYvYkBhIvLNAkXRR20ag%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmFmZDI2Yy1lOWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RAzUCKHjCIda0sO-6YZbgu5Iv-WSjm9mJWIORUyDTPM=&emci=63c55c44-bcb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=16afd26c-e9b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: Morgan connects with voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Take a look at some pictures of Morgan on the campaign trail!
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220411-930-footer-ak&t=2&akid=930%2E90090%2EUEx9Ci)
Hi,
We understand you’re probably reading long emails all day – so we wanted to send you some pictures of Morgan talking with voters across Ohio instead.
But first, we’re a grassroots campaign powered by people, not corporations or the establishment. [**_Can you chip in $27 or whatever you can afford now to help Morgan stay on the road?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31114?t=3&akid=930%2E90090%2EUEx9Ci)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31298?refcode=em20220411-930&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=930%2E90090%2EUEx9Ci)**
Take a look at some of the pictures of Morgan on the campaign trail! ↓↓
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31114?t=23&akid=930%2E90090%2EUEx9Ci)
This is why Morgan entered this race. To talk with Ohioans, hear what challenges they’re facing, and engage people in the democratic process. This is especially important now because early voting has begun in Ohio. Voters are casting their votes RIGHT NOW. [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31114?t=24&akid=930%2E90090%2EUEx9Ci)Together, we can flip Ohio blue in 2022 and send a progressive champion like Morgan Harper to the U.S. Senate. We need your help to get there. [**_Can you help keep Morgan on the road with a contribution now to help us pay for gas and other travel expenses?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31114?t=25&akid=930%2E90090%2EUEx9Ci)****
Together,
Morgan Harper HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220411-930-footer&t=26&refcode2=930_90090_UEx9Ci&akid=930%2E90090%2EUEx9Ci)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)

subject: My dad is the best PAWsible person for the job

Hi Friends — It’s your good friend Jack, back again. Did you miss me? I’m here to remind you that it’s National Pet Day! name: Nikki Fried
subject: I’m fighting for an affordable Florida
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
I’ll be honest — I’m sick of watching politicians talk a big game and say all the right things and then fail to back it up with policy, planning, and action.
And with the challenges Floridians are facing right now, I know that you deserve better.
So today, I unveiled the first part of my Lower Costs, Higher Standards plan to address the housing affordability crisis as your next Governor:
✅ Declare a housing state of emergency
✅ Expand the Homestead Exemption from $50k to $100k
✅ Promise an immediate veto of any attempts to raid Florida’s Affordable Housing funds.
✅ Create ways to preserve current multi-family units
Housing costs are skyrocketing, and Florida families are being forced out of their homes. Everyday Floridians are struggling to make ends meet, keep a roof over their heads, and pay for ordinary expenses. And what’s Governor DeSantis done about it?
Absolutely nothing.
We need bold action. That’s why, as your next Governor, I’m ready to declare a housing state of emergency and take every step to provide affordable housing for Florida workers and families. I’m ready to look at every option — from increasing tax exemptions for working families to halting rent hikes.
That’s the effective, innovative, and compassionate leadership Floridians deserve. And that’s exactly the kind of leadership you’re going to get when we win this race. Can you chip in $20 today to support my campaign and stand with me in the fight for lower costs and higher standards? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=411affordability]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=411affordability]
Thank you for being on my team.
— Nikki

Miami, FL 33143

[It’s clear that Culp’s far-right candidacy poses a real threat to our district – help us defeat him by chipping in today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44022627/339743203/-1439264559?amount=10&refcode=DW_EM_FR_30DO_220411_1_1&refcode2=aeaf1802-cab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=WpVG+/Lc0hKBfuwiewpr5FEmDWFTLMppaldFkVr42LJHAoh5eun7iIHT7tGWzlH0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWFmMTgwMi1jYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzxRoKqjoDseZPPcEF5E4DClkVvFbpC4n1nwsOuwB60=)

You can’t make this stuff up.

Loren Culp is whining about Facebook “canceling” him after his page was removed for violating Facebook’s Terms and Services – specifically, for posting “false, misleading, fraudulent, or deceptive claims or content.”

body:
Before we give Bob his card, will you join me in wishing him a very happy birthday? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44022731/339743792/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTRhZDU0YS1jYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHIE2UcnWwSNLhmYRpIXfODDcZ9CaCUcbaGlGqUpVDU=&emci=2cb1df8c-aab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=394ad54a-cab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Every year, Bob and I look forward to getting together with our family to celebrate birthdays. As our family has grown, so have our celebrations: first with the addition of our four daughters, Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena; and then later our son-in-law Michael; and two years ago, we joyfully welcomed our grandson, Max Robert. Now we happily celebrate three birthdays in April – Bob’s on Wednesday, Max's on Thursday, and Caroline's on Saturday!

"Getting together" has looked a little different in the era of social distancing, but this Wednesday, we're ALL excited to make his birthday a special day for Bob – and we want you to be a part of that.

We're planning to give Bob a card to show him how much we all appreciate him and his hard work for the people of Pennsylvania, and we're hoping you'll add your name.
