name: Trump News HQ
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj780o5ueh73prf52fsfiv7kjddhhv5b6qr54o5g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp7attmmkr66s7464qbepdkmspneojn6hrbepllm3ieadhhmlgrbdhhmdpb6dbnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libad9gepg6ct30mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ieep30s1h66oh5u)
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zetl48udb0jqkp3hdknstp3emo3m6kcvdd3sf248_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sti61o32cdh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zajtgurkuhf3javql46l34vjdlkqs9h3hcf41fq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sti61o32cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsthph2iahfldao0o1e81c10d0j8kmphnvcijv5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sti61o32cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | ---|--- | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: American Security Survey
subject: Do YOU think we need to do more?
body:

Joe Biden is leaving America vulnerable to thugs and criminals at our southern border.

Between criminals crossing our border and illegal drugs flowing into our communities, our enemies are gaining ground while we stand by idly.

It’s time to put _**AMERICA FIRST**_ again - but we need your help.

We’re building momentum to make America strong again, so we put together a survey to show that we’re fed up with Joe Biden’s America-last policies.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Gratuitous pics of my dogs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220411&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220411&amount=28]
Friend,
If you weren’t already aware, today is National Pet Day. In honor of this holiday I didn’t know existed, I thought I’d tell you a bit more about my dogs: Rocky and Boomer.
Rocky and Boomer are vital parts of my family's life. As the saying goes, we don’t deserve dogs and the unconditional love they provide. My dogs are both rescues, shipped up from Arkansas – which is a kill state – where the good people at the Artemis Project [http://theartemisprojectrescue.org] work with Michigan rescues to get their animals placed.
Maybe because of Rocky and Boomer I’m so passionate about animals as a policy issue. I have a 100% rating from the Humane Society. And the PAWS Act – my bill to connect veterans with service dogs – was signed into law last year.
So, in honor of National Pet Day, and all who love dogs, here are some totally unnecessary photos to enjoy.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220411&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220411&amount=28]
From our family to yours, happy National Pet Day!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220411&amount=28]
Rocky & Boomer (and Elissa, too)

# [#]

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A critical Ohio battleground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44029786/339777247/699057340?refcode=EM_FR_220411PrePrimary1d_N_SB_30DO_7_NG_N_logo_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjg0ZWM0Zi1lZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=akiTq-wIbwvLHhVlrBlKddZEIzSBEU8eihWHKWnHNAs=) | ****NBC News:**

**Ohio Rep. Marcy Kaptur “could face her toughest election yet because of redistricting”**
_January 29, 2022_**
---

Republican politicians on the Ohio Redistricting Commission have gerrymandered our state’s maps for massive GOP advantage. Their efforts resulted in my friend and colleague Rep. Marcy Kaptur facing one of her toughest bids for re-election yet.

That’s why House Democrats added Marcy to their Frontline Program, a group of Democratic Members of Congress competing in battleground districts that are critical to keeping the House majority in 2022.

[**_Marcy has a pre-primary filing due this Wednesday. She needs to raise $3,000 by 11:59 pm Wednesday. clean_body: This is a huge honor, Fellow Conservative. This is a huge honor, Fellow Conservative. | I have just received the complete and total endorsement of President Donald J. Trump! Fellow Conservative, During Trump's term in office, I was honored to fight alongside the President to put America FIRST. I served on President Trump's impeachment defense team and have gone to battle against the radical Democrats every single day since. Democrats are hellbent on destroying my re-election campaign. Why? Because I am a conservative fighter with a track record of winning and the steadfast resolve to continue Trump's legacy. In 2018, I defeated the Democrats in a Special Election, and then again in the November general election, and AGAIN in 2020. But my commitment to our shared conservative values has made me a top target of the Left, Fellow Conservative. I have President Trump's support, now I am looking for YOURS. Whether that's $5, $50 or even $500, every single dollar matters in this race. JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP Taking back our country requires taking back the House in 2022. We can't afford to lose a single red seat, or we risk the Democrats increasing their stronghold in Washington. Building an America First House Majority requires America First leaders, which is why Having you on our team will make all the difference leading up to Election Day, Fellow Conservative. Thank you, Debbie Lesko (R-AZ) JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP** | | Debbie Lesko currently serves as a U.S. Congresswoman for Arizona's 8th District. It's about doing what's right, leading, and fighting for a Congress that works for people, not billionaires and multi-national corporations. _But right now, it is crucial that our supporters, donors, and the voters of the district understand two very simple reasons why Trish is the only candidate in the race who can run a winning campaign against Ann Wagner this fall: _
1. Trish is the only person in the race who has lived in the district for most of their lives, and the only candidate who has ever cast a vote in the district. As such, **she is also the only candidate in the race to have won an election and served in an elected position** —apart from Ann Wagner, that is.
2. **Our team has been building and perfecting our operation from Day 1**. Trish is the only candidate with a top-to-bottom operation capable of persuading new voters and turning out other voters when it counts, on Election Day.

Trish has strong relationships with leaders in the community, and a well-honed sense of where her constituents are on any issue. **She is exactly the kind of candidate that worries Ann Wagner and the consultants who run her campaign**. [_**But to win, we need to continually build our base of support between now and Election Day. clean_body: Peter, Our primary mission here at Team Trish Gunby is to wage a winning fight for the people of Missouri's Second Congressional District —but not for its own sake, or simply to elevate Trish as an individual to a position of influence. Our campaign—this grassroots campaign that belongs to every single one of our supporters—is about making a real difference in the lives of those who call this region home. It's about doing what's right, leading, and fighting for a Congress that works for people, not billionaires and multi-national corporations. But right now, it is crucial that our supporters, donors, and the voters of the district understand two very simple reasons why Trish is the only candidate in the race who can run a winning campaign against Ann Wagner this fall: 1. Trish is the only person in the race who has lived in the district for most of their lives, and the only candidate who has ever cast a vote in the district. As such, she is also the only candidate in the race to have won an election and served in an elected position —apart from Ann Wagner, that is. 2. Our team has been building and perfecting our operation from Day 1. Trish is the only candidate with a top-to-bottom operation capable of persuading new voters and turning out other voters when it counts, on Election Day. Trish has strong relationships with leaders in the community, and a well-honed sense of where her constituents are on any issue. She is exactly the kind of candidate that worries Ann Wagner and the consultants who run her campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much for your time, your attention, and your involvement in this campaign. -Team Trish = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $50,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical midnight deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44030103/339777859/-42398318?refcode=em20220411pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmE1MGQwOS1mMGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qEMqd5BU0-hTE9VVAHPBsLF2cdzqxmlY6Xw6hlvsXk=)

VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.
clean_body: Hello, When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful. People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened. They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service. And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other. This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue. In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $50,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = All the Super PAC money in the world can’t defeat grassroots support from people like you. I’m so grateful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Josh Lafazan
subject: When did politics become all show and no work?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44023378/339747069/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzVhMzgyZS1jZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9hCLMeRmip6uZ2vAGh2qzi6sAGJf9lZwpxorHmAMws8=&emci=52c2ef52-b0b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=835a382e-cfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, Politics these days is all about showmanship. While hardworking folks face crises – skyrocketing cost of living; access to quality, affordable health care; intensifying consequences of climate change – **politicians on both sides of the aisle don't seem to care about _solving problems._** We all know the drill:
1. An issue makes the news.
2. Politicians race to get on camera with carefully-crafted soundbites.
3. The political bickering becomes the news story, and the issue is forgotten.
4. Nothing gets done.
5. Rinse.
6. Repeat.

That's not why I got into public service, Peter. I ran for School Board and then for the Nassau County legislature **to deliver results on issues that matter to our community.** And it's why I continue to lead the charge right here in Nassau County to make our restaurants safer for all those with food allergies. Look Peter, I get that to a lot of folks, protecting people from food allergens isn't exactly a top priority. But for millions of other families, **food allergies _are a matter of life and death_** _._ More than 200,000 Americans a year require emergency care to treat allergic reactions to food. And the problem is growing, especially among children. Restaurants, in particular, are a minefield for people with food allergies. That's why I passed a law in 2019 that protects patrons, provides training for restaurant staff, and increases awareness of the eight major food allergens. And it's why just last month, I sponsored a bill to create the Nassau County EpiPen pilot program, helping reimburse restaurants for EpiPen purchases to keep all patrons safe. **In other words, solutions.** Peter, passing laws that make our communities safer and improve people's lives is the reason why I'm running for Congress. It's the most important reason _anyone_ should run for Congress. New Yorkers agree. It's why our movement is thousands strong, and growing every day. I'm proud to be in this fight with you, _Josh_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | Peter, Politics these days is all about showmanship. While hardworking folks face crises – skyrocketing cost of living; access to quality, affordable health care; intensifying consequences of climate change – politicians on both sides of the aisle don't seem to care about solving problems. We all know the drill: 1. An issue makes the news. 2. Politicians race to get on camera with carefully-crafted soundbites. 3. The political bickering becomes the news story, and the issue is forgotten. 4. Nothing gets done. 5. Rinse. 6. Repeat. That's not why I got into public service, Peter. I ran for School Board and then for the Nassau County legislature to deliver results on issues that matter to our community. And it's why I continue to lead the charge right here in Nassau County to make our restaurants safer for all those with food allergies. Look Peter, I get that to a lot of folks, protecting people from food allergens isn't exactly a top priority. But for millions of other families, food allergies are a matter of life and death . More than 200,000 Americans a year require emergency care to treat allergic reactions to food. And the problem is growing, especially among children. Restaurants, in particular, are a minefield for people with food allergies. That's why I passed a law in 2019 that protects patrons, provides training for restaurant staff, and increases awareness of the eight major food allergens. And it's why just last month, I sponsored a bill to create the Nassau County EpiPen pilot program, helping reimburse restaurants for EpiPen purchases to keep all patrons safe. In other words, solutions. Peter, passing laws that make our communities safer and improve people's lives is the reason why I'm running for Congress. It's the most important reason anyone should run for Congress. New Yorkers agree. It's why our movement is thousands strong, and growing every day. I'm proud to be in this fight with you, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. name: Team BTE
subject: Our 1st birthday is in a week, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barrier To Entry PAC
body:
A lot has happened in a year. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaks4FQOhe_ZptZY2Pt5T_OnLUIVFX-E7F_ZUJ72TvpSo_8UztbXWwO1UtbIoP0djnJJj9XMcFAh0LTnAV0WpD4K2nlt0rjlTXTTSO-rz2vvWBH9mYSYF2Th8CWwT_UxZ8i_BWHiEhZ38_wkU7xJSM52jZ-_gzlxfA7-Tz_BsC5W1M62cZZ0arQlQT-JG7nTqH0JaNxLt4WQ1BPMEehIcXDIHtsi8kqnZtcsphEylv4douDuHFenVnpgUaBKd6OaHyFzUtwhDagFtoNRLsKqEuf9HA/3l4/1cjWC3E5Tm2OS02qbn2pPA/h0/HXapU7-q2475V1FFPdq67CZMJlJn8kVJRMkVdNorm5c) *Cue happy birthday theme song*

Supporters, next week will officially mark the one year anniversary since the launch of Barrier To Entry PAC and we can hardly believe it. It has been a crazy year filled with high highs and low lows.

Together, we have taken on economic and racial injustice, gender discrimination, a pandemic, historic moments, and so much more.

Through all of that, here we are. Our scrappy little PAC is still fighting every day for change, representation, and equality.

And our impact has been anything but small. Over the past year, BTE has accomplished so much.

\- We have worked with FOURTEEN candidates (and counting!)

\- We won TWO mayoral campaigns in Galesburg, Illinois and Pittsburgh, PA

\- We beat an entrenched slate of *very bad* Democratic incumbents in Dayton, Ohio

\- **We changed the narrative about who gets to run for office in this country**

At Barrier To Entry PAC, we are grateful to feel so fulfilled by this work and to have you with us in this fight. It keeps us going, makes us smile, and pushes us to think and grow in new ways.

We have you to thank for that.

Because of you, we can create space for Democratic staff and candidates from all backgrounds. Yes, that includes poor people, too.

Primary elections have already begun for ALL of our current endorsed candidates. We need you to stand with us and our candidates so they can knock doors and talk to voters during this critical window.

[**Will you help us support our candidates by making a $12 contribution for the 12 months we’ve been breaking barriers?**

clean_body: A lot has happened in a year. | | | Cue happy birthday theme song Supporters, next week will officially mark the one year anniversary since the launch of Barrier To Entry PAC and we can hardly believe it. It has been a crazy year filled with high highs and low lows. Together, we have taken on economic and racial injustice, gender discrimination, a pandemic, historic moments, and so much more. Through all of that, here we are. Our scrappy little PAC is still fighting every day for change, representation, and equality. And our impact has been anything but small. Over the past year, BTE has accomplished so much. \- We have worked with FOURTEEN candidates (and counting!) \- We won TWO mayoral campaigns in Galesburg, Illinois and Pittsburgh, PA \- We beat an entrenched slate of very bad Democratic incumbents in Dayton, Ohio \- We changed the narrative about who gets to run for office in this country At Barrier To Entry PAC, we are grateful to feel so fulfilled by this work and to have you with us in this fight. It keeps us going, makes us smile, and pushes us to think and grow in new ways. We have you to thank for that. Because of you, we can create space for Democratic staff and candidates from all backgrounds. Yes, that includes poor people, too. Primary elections have already begun for ALL of our current endorsed candidates. We need you to stand with us and our candidates so they can knock doors and talk to voters during this critical window. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: __ ____ ____ Thanks for all you do! \-- Team BTE EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier To Entry PAC: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my upcoming midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. | Peter, did you see our team’s email on Thursday?

Last week, the House passed a bill that would cap the price of insulin at $35.

Though this proposal is incredibly important to working families and seniors, the pharmaceutical lobbyists are working overtime to make sure it doesn’t pass the Senate. The special interests are buying political influence to write laws that are good for their bottom lines – not yours.

This legislation will save money and, more importantly, save lives, so it is more important than ever for leaders to step up and put this bill on President Biden’s desk.

In Congress, I plan on fighting hard to ensure the cost of insulin and other life-saving medication is capped at an affordable cost. **But until I get there, we need to make our voices heard.**

[_**Peter, after checking the signers to our petition, I realized your name was missing. clean_body: Peter, did you see our team’s email on Thursday? | = | Peter, did you see our team’s email on Thursday? Last week, the House passed a bill that would cap the price of insulin at $35. Though this proposal is incredibly important to working families and seniors, the pharmaceutical lobbyists are working overtime to make sure it doesn’t pass the Senate. The special interests are buying political influence to write laws that are good for their bottom lines – not yours. This legislation will save money and, more importantly, save lives, so it is more important than ever for leaders to step up and put this bill on President Biden’s desk. In Congress, I plan on fighting hard to ensure the cost of insulin and other life-saving medication is capped at an affordable cost. But until I get there, we need to make our voices heard. | With gratitude & high hopes, Josh Riley * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 6806 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. name: Peter Franchot
subject: My personal invitation
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
In case you missed it, I just wanted to make sure you knew about our upcoming Campaign Rally in Fort Washington! On Saturday, April 23, Monique and I are excited to share our bold vision for the future of Maryland with voters. This will be a free, family-friendly event, and everyone's invited!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
As we enter the final stretch of this competitive primary race, our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum. Recent polls have shown that we are leading the rest of the field by a strong margin, and we’ve received the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials and labor unions – the most of any candidate for Governor. And we’re excited to announce more support in the days ahead!
I hope to see you on April 23, so make sure to RSVP and mark your calendar! Whether your top issue is lowering healthcare costs, creating new jobs, combating the student debt crisis, or something else, I’d love to meet with you in person to talk about the bold future we can build together.
Our Rally will be held at the Tucker Road Athletic Complex in Fort Washington, from 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM. Click here to RSVP. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Who is running our country?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Joe Biden has left the building. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066273?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=24757f63fe&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

**We have no idea who is running our country.**

It was crystal clear even during the 2020 campaign that Joe Biden had left the building.

He has no idea who he is, where he is, or what he is saying at any given time.

He is a danger to our national security, blurting out things about chemically attacking Russia, overthrowing the Russian government, and even sending American troops to Russia.

His own White House has to backtrack every time the man opens his mouth.

_Senile is an understatement._

_To add insult to injury, Joe Biden wasn't even elected President. He was installed by an illegitimate coup in the most fraudulent, corrupt "election" in US history._

Republicans had a chance to stop the 2020 Coup on January 6th. They failed.

Even worse, they show up to work every day like nothing is wrong. Like it's still business as usual.

They shouldn't even give Joe Biden the respect of calling him "President."

_As for Joe, his family should be ashamed. What they're doing to him is elder abuse._

**He should be on his porch watching the birds and feeding the squirrels, not making a fool of himself and our country every day.**

[It's time for leaders in D.C. who aren't afraid to call a spade a spade.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=2b435d020d&e=eda539b26b)

**[_Our RINO incumbents are failing us every day, sometimes out of spite, sometimes out of cowardice, and sometimes out of sheer stupidity. Any way you slice it, enough is enough_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5fbafe36e1&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me_ _ defeat the Bipartisan Establishment __\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=9d48943ebc&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=cca9f3a25d&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=2b68febe60&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---

For the first time, a Black woman is going to sit on the Supreme Court of the United States. This moment is long overdue, and we are ready to celebrate. This is a huge step for representation. We are so proud of KBJ. – Team Quaye | | Retired Naval Commander John Quaye Quartey II felt a call to serve his country once again after he watched extremists carry out a Trump-fueled insurrection at our nation’s Capitol. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Team Benson Campaign Update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Insert Preview Text | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9b92b5322a&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

Last week was so energizing on the campaign trail meeting with folks across the state! Our campaign continues to gain momentum because of YOU!
**STATE SENATE & OUTREACH** In the Senate last week, _**I voted to eliminate the tax on Social Security income and cut the first-rate income tax nearly in half. If enacted this would be the largest tax cut in the history of the state of Minnesota.**_
Tuesday night we had a wonderful turnout for a meet and greet in Tonka Bay. I enjoyed speaking with everyone there and hearing what they are looking for in our next Governor.

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=883836bbd0&e=9d6926af69)
---
| Wednesday I stopped by a business in St. Cloud where we discussed inflation and the impact it is having on their bottom line. Then went on to the Wright County monthly meeting where there was a great turnout! I did a Facebook Live after the meeting if you want to [head over to ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=eb0309138f&e=9d6926af69)[Facebook](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=267556526d&e=9d6926af69) to check it out.

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=a54ae8c135&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
Thursday there was a lot of energy at the Liberty Tea Party meeting in Champlin! They are excited and driven to beat Tim Walz this fall.

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c45602bf15&e=9d6926af69)
---
| **VIRTUAL TOWNHALL** Team Benson hosted a virtual town hall meeting Friday evening. Attendees got answers to their questions and discussed our shared Republican priorities for Minnesota and my vision for the state.
**CONVENTION SATURDAY ** It was a beautiful spring day on Saturday across Minnesota and my team attended conventions starting in Duluth for CD8, on to Lakeville for CD2, and finishing in Minneapolis for the Young Republicans Convention. We heard you loud & clear that you are ready to end the DFL control in St. Paul.

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=1eede405b7&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
Thank you for attending my events and conventions. It’s clear to me: Republicans are ready for a change. I am the most principled, prepared, and **electable candidate and am ready to serve on Day 1**.

**Chip In To Help Michelle. **Every little bit helps! We have a long road to get through the endorsing convention in **FIVE** weeks. If you can help please visit [https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=2b9f2fb410&e=9d6926af69)

**Thank you!**

In the meantime, please don’t hesitate to visit my website at [www.michelle4mn.com](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=239a8ab44b&e=9d6926af69) or to reach out via email: [Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com](mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign.

Sincerely,

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=00139df393&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson
[Candidate for Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=6ba5998f69&e=9d6926af69)[.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=e0ee8fd103&e=9d6926af69)
---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=a66d80b522&e=9d6926af69)
---
| [INTERESTED IN VOLUNTEERING AT STATE CONVENTION](mailto:Maddie@Michelle4MN.com?subject=State%20Convention%20Volunteer%20 "INTERESTED IN VOLUNTEERING AT STATE CONVENTION")
---

---

Peter Willis - Everyone knows there is an unmitigated crisis at our southern border. 15 years ago as the mayor of Hazleton, Lou was thrust into the national spotlight when he became the first person in America to pass a local ordinance dealing with the problem of illegal immigration.

Lou took an oath to protect and defend the people of his community and that’s exactly what he did. He stood in front of the entire country for the entire world to see and, despite the names they called him and the threats he received, he never once backed down!

SECURE BORDERS MATTER

The fact of the matter is: Lou is the only candidate who has a record of fighting illegal immigration and will continue to keep standing up for the people to Secure and Protect our borders.

clean_body: | | | | This is clearly a crisis. | Peter Willis - Everyone knows there is an unmitigated crisis at our southern border. 15 years ago as the mayor of Hazleton, Lou was thrust into the national spotlight when he became the first person in America to pass a local ordinance dealing with the problem of illegal immigration. Lou took an oath to protect and defend the people of his community and that’s exactly what he did. He stood in front of the entire country for the entire world to see and, despite the names they called him and the threats he received, he never once backed down! SECURE BORDERS MATTER The fact of the matter is: Lou is the only candidate who has a record of fighting illegal immigration and will continue to keep standing up for the people to Secure and Protect our borders. That is why Lou is demanding Attorney General Josh Shapiro sue the Biden Administration for violating the Refugee Act of 1980. We need to secure our border and keep Pennsylvania safe. Thank you, Team Barletta | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201

Peter, I’m confident that our grassroots army is strong.

I’m proud to have the support of Alicia, who chipped in $3, and the support of Michael, who chipped in $10.

| Peter,
HELP WANTED: A Governor who will put a stop to the CRISES that have made their way to the state of Nevada under the watch of Steve Sisolak!
While he's been busy making sure to follow every exact move of Gavin Newsom, Sisolak has also invited THIS to our great state:

* The third-highest gas prices in the entire nation, with costs per gallon well over the national average
* One of the highest unemployment rates in America that is STILL over 5%
* A failing school system that's also ranked near the bottom, and where parents have NO say
* And of course, soft on crime policies that put our communities at risk!

Are you fed up with the direction our state has been headed under this failed leader, and want someone else hired for the job?
If so, join the fight to send Sisolak packing this November... Click the button below to help get Nevada out of crisis and back on the right track!
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT: STOP SISOLAK IN 2022!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZailVWeUh8cfea39v-GCPW1ps72tNd2HzZd4hOUHf7J2xE-SyNCTHNXYywcRX2-6VjD8u50qka2YxnFFN-0raQWcxFHMzCkiD-tJm1Cfs8I_UX4twacgDEkn9tyG83N6wFfqteakn09UEwr8LFkriK2a6gK0dAE94g9XV49As6FR9yX4r4a2JaIyin_9K82tFC9HMefBDjI=&c=J4Eby7fPL6U7-2sLdnWaVMYYirxqdEEMjjPmFnwrjWVxmRXssz6TlA==&ch=xPddjhE05lSKQ0pq6ShPO0JPPNiTuzPJt5MlGIWDKptiSGyesBTGYQ==)
---
| Thankfully, there's a proven leader ready to step up this year and put a stop to the failures.
Throughout his career, Sheriff Joe Lombardo has overseen billion-dollar budgets and managed an entire police department in Nevada's largest city. And he did it all without needing the help of some far-left politician from California...
This lifelong Republican and proven conservative is ready to bring REAL leadership to the Governor's office this year. clean_body: HELP WANTED: A Governor who will put a stop to the CRISES that have made their way to the state of Nevada under the watch of Steve Sisolak! | | | | | | | == | | Peter, HELP WANTED: A Governor who will put a stop to the CRISES that have made their way to the state of Nevada under the watch of Steve Sisolak! While he's been busy making sure to follow every exact move of Gavin Newsom, Sisolak has also invited THIS to our great state: The third-highest gas prices in the entire nation, with costs per gallon well over the national average One of the highest unemployment rates in America that is STILL over 5% A failing school system that's also ranked near the bottom, and where parents have NO say And of course, soft on crime policies that put our communities at risk! Are you fed up with the direction our state has been headed under this failed leader, and want someone else hired for the job? If so, join the fight to send Sisolak packing this November... Click the button below to help get Nevada out of crisis and back on the right track! | | | == | Thankfully, there's a proven leader ready to step up this year and put a stop to the failures. Throughout his career, Sheriff Joe Lombardo has overseen billion-dollar budgets and managed an entire police department in Nevada's largest city. And he did it all without needing the help of some far-left politician from California... This lifelong Republican and proven conservative is ready to bring REAL leadership to the Governor's office this year. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you in advance - as election season heats up, we rely on the support of folks like you more than ever! | Team, the AZ GOP has once again passed another voter suppression law, **this time targeting Native voters.**

This latest law requires a **“proof of citizenship”** and a physical address, tactics that in other states have led to large numbers of Native voters' ballots being challenged and thrown out. The reality is the AZ GOP knows we’re on the verge of flipping AZ completely blue, and they are passing these laws to try and ensure victories in November.

We’re going to fight to get these laws thrown out, and if the courts don’t do it, we’re going to heavily organize in the communities targeted by these voter suppression laws so we can flip AZ blue and repeal them.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44030982/339797609/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE1MmI3Ny1mYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9JYs0iUBtblHHWfS3vZSgH0n2t-9DljeCN9UK5NRJsU=&emci=96f95fe3-88b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=71152b77-fab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

Although many of us try to forget, the before January 2021 times, have a way of lingering in our memory like a dusty drape covered in cobwebs we can't quite shake off.

But, we can never forget the past, **because forgetting opens the door for repeating and we can’t do that.**

Instead, we want to take you all the way back to November 8th, 2016 – it was election day and it was clear what was at stake. So many of us started that night eager to witness the first woman president smash the final glass ceiling.

We didn't know it then but that's not the ending we got. And if the years that followed taught us anything it's what is at stake when we think something is guaranteed.

**[We don't want to go back to those times and we know you don't want to either. Right now, something big is at stake – maintaining control of the House. Donate $5 or whatever you can afford to flip CA-27 red to blue to have a leader like Christy who will fight to make sure we never go backward.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44030983/339797616/2072937639?refcode=em22_220411_BeforeTimes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE1MmI3Ny1mYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9JYs0iUBtblHHWfS3vZSgH0n2t-9DljeCN9UK5NRJsU=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44030984/339797617/2072937639?refcode=em22_220411_BeforeTimes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE1MmI3Ny1mYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9JYs0iUBtblHHWfS3vZSgH0n2t-9DljeCN9UK5NRJsU=) It was a dark time, Peter. Tuning in the news every day felt like bracing for impact. It began with the racist and discriminatory Muslim ban, and never ceased from there.

The massive tax cuts for corporations and the wealthiest Americans. The apologizing for white nationalists and neo-nazi's (the "very fine people" he said they were). Perhaps worst of them all – separating families at the border and putting children in cages.

It was policy after policy of cruelty and callousness. Then, somehow, when it seemed it couldn't get any worse – the pandemic hit. The ineptitude and disinformation spread from the before-times president caused so much mass death and destruction – we're still picking up the pieces.

But, then, we won and we ousted our reckless leader through relentless hard work, determination, and serious organizing.

Yet, there are still a great many, including our own Mike Garcia, who want to return us to these terrible times, but we cannot let them succeed.

**We're not going back, Peter. Not with so much at stake, including the very fabric of our democracy.**

**[While our current elected leader of CA-27 – Mike Garcia – wants to send us back into those dark times, we know better. Spare $5 or more to help Christy hold our majority as we move forward into a better era, of reason, compassion, and hope.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44030985/339797618/2072937639?refcode=em22_220411_BeforeTimes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE1MmI3Ny1mYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9JYs0iUBtblHHWfS3vZSgH0n2t-9DljeCN9UK5NRJsU=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44030986/339797619/2072937639?refcode=em22_220411_BeforeTimes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE1MmI3Ny1mYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9JYs0iUBtblHHWfS3vZSgH0n2t-9DljeCN9UK5NRJsU=) A better future is possible, and we're going to build it together.

–Team Christy

Peter, Earlier this month Kyrsten Sinema impeded President Biden’s agenda — **once again** — by blocking his key Labor Department nominee. Now, we know even more about how and why Sinema orchestrated the defeat of President Biden’s Labor Department nominee. **And *spoiler alert* it was on behalf of corporate lobbyists.** Take a look:
> **_It was Sinema who broke first, and she has become less and less inclined to communicate, negotiate, or keep the leadership in the loop._**_Business groups had made an all-out push to defeat Weil, especially the International Franchise Association, which feared a Labor Department rule making parent companies and franchises jointly responsible for decisions affecting workers....Other corporate opponents included the small-business lobby (the NFIB), the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, and Uber and Lyft. 1_
**Sinema has made it abundantly clear that she will always take the side of rich corporations over workers and families.** She will continue to use her power to block progress in favor of her own interests and getting rich unless we lay the groundwork NOW to primary Sinema. **_[Please, chip in $10 or anything you can to help fund our grassroots work in Arizona as we lay the groundwork to remove Sinema from her seat →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSBFlvXp88uACZHRXBv76C_tp8TdGhdL66PiNhEFT4sTTbGME4GThXeGXxE_mzULo-ORGoblXvKamJBkj7JmiJG3hqEOzUMtIEn-vS3l_gIY6Les2QDGui7uPJlbVk8nswiEZAQlL4VHLsZkYyPQZZGuw6saLwWsmd_c7Hl1MAUdh7VtjPgeSepwTWtwlx87QLxlGc1Jg2Oz5NRQlhn8sSxZwj8nFBwvtFKLZiuYlWpBaI1wgEzhtSgHRIvUI6vXJYTgWVv7syevKnc5yFamyXtm8EHHMY7Jk0KL4iDGxCoFISRgrDBySW7AGUUu9kRSx6G-84snr4sPiapKwTiKGAZ409hSm5YQgBLz03dS6HFoP-wySq32kzjT3ZUP_7tRGSny5niMeZQU-1Cujyd6NFuA/3l4/gDx--pVbS6u4D7DDWWbyWQ/h1/yBhEqblZu9vJk_3o7BNe5KC_5oOjy21mXDMD4DnKK9w)_** **[Contribute $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSBFlvXp88uACZHRXBv76C_qKFQJZfmzBs03CMNaLWgU68vjgHFQDVWRHPEDr8IBtC_IFjqCMIFElmYEBfBKkluNTvOONhwPRta6WRa3PvFrjrwh1EG74A2Tz2fRaifyVzeHeghJBYz2PKYpbU2mWJXyTgGujyXH43nUklbc1RgGW4LEz7kF1KZPlsOybrZJrPlSI0Fau_BRBU7ZHdYcueTlK77vC9atmCkFEzbpsK4SHV7QIFM40a-GtqcKXO4OSFVGw95fNdBT6QUPev6sbL6n7qfiZOKWnxE8_eO2rRW_qmxaeboWMBlNSA-xKQuLBtR1-wmMwCacg9poXdKVXPJ_oLR70fm4Zhnfu_THMEftsC0opncWhnIDNL7YSIXyuAwHGULoWvOz13OL3BTld6svkkDDqv_sgUub2zXa4ARVo/3l4/gDx--pVbS6u4D7DDWWbyWQ/h2/RYYP3oyFU2EIStVO1Q-WnNW-C6T5OBU88Cxpf4BVOBU)** This behavior isn’t anything new but we’re still just as disgusted. clean_body: Sinema proves once again she will throw away progress to take the side of huge corporations. | | | Peter, Earlier this month Kyrsten Sinema impeded President Biden’s agenda — once again — by blocking his key Labor Department nominee. Now, we know even more about how and why Sinema orchestrated the defeat of President Biden’s Labor Department nominee. And spoiler alert it was on behalf of corporate lobbyists. Take a look: It was Sinema who broke first, and she has become less and less inclined to communicate, negotiate, or keep the leadership in the loop.Business groups had made an all-out push to defeat Weil, especially the International Franchise Association, which feared a Labor Department rule making parent companies and franchises jointly responsible for decisions affecting workers....Other corporate opponents included the small-business lobby (the NFIB), the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, and Uber and Lyft. 1 Sinema has made it abundantly clear that she will always take the side of rich corporations over workers and families. She will continue to use her power to block progress in favor of her own interests and getting rich unless we lay the groundwork NOW to primary Sinema. This behavior isn’t anything new but we’re still just as disgusted. Sinema’s blatant disregard for her constituents who elected her is disturbing and frustrating. Right now Kyrsten Sinema thinks she’s untouchable. She’s riding high on the praise and support of her millionaire donors and the power she holds in a razor-thin Democratic majority where she can be the deciding vote. But, Peter, we’re here to show Sinema that her actions have consequences. We’re working hard to amp up the pressure on Kyrsten Sinema and show her loud and clear that her time is up. We WILL primary her and elect a real Democrat who will work for Arizonans, NOT corporations. Thank you, Primary Sinema Project 1 - | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re being outspent 3 to 1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We’ve got to pick up the pace. We are behind our opponent’s historic fundraising numbers. |
---
Fellow American,

We've got some fundraising news to share with you: _we're behind._

Democrats know they will lose the Senate Majority if they lose this Georgia seat, so they're pouring money into Senator Warnock's campaign from across the country.

_**A blue wave of cash is hitting Georgia.**_

Polling shows that this race is a DEAD HEAT, but we're being outspent 3 to 1. That's a _big_ difference, and it's becoming a _big_ issue.

Everyone knows the polls showing us up a point or two will change if voters only see a barrage of misleading ads attacking us for the next 7 months. We can't take anything for granted, _so we've got to pick up the fundraising pace._

**[Fellow American, we're hoping that you can help us out RIGHT NOW. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: FWD - Nida Allam, Robert Garcia, Donna Edwards, Summer Lee, and Delia Ramirez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, did you see
Pramila’s email on Friday? She released her first slate of midterm
endorsements, backing five progressive champions for the House.

Nida, Robert, Donna, Summer, and Delia are proven leaders ready to fight
for the people and our progressive agenda. But to build strong, winning
campaigns, these candidates need to continue investing in large voter
outreach programs. That’s where you come in.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12355?refcode=em20220411-1176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1176%2E420207%2ETYcdC_ ]Will you rush a $3 contribution to help Team Jayapal
expand our people-first coalition and defend our Democratic majority in
Congress?

No donation is too small to make a difference in a midterm election year
as important as this one. Thanks for chipping in any amount today.

In solidarity,

Team Jayapal

----- Begin Original Message -----

[2]Pramila Jayapal

Peter,

Today, I’m excited to announce my first slate of congressional
endorsements for the 2022 midterm election cycle.

As we head into one of the most consequential midterm elections ever, and
Democrats prepare to make their case to the American people on why we
deserve to retain our majorities in Congress, it’s important that we have
strong progressives who are unafraid to stand up to corporate greed and
fight hard on behalf of the people. I’m so proud to endorse:

* Nida Allam, running for NC-04;
* Robert Garcia, running for CA-42;
* Donna Edwards, running for MD-04;
* Summer Lee, running for PA-12;
* Delia Ramirez, running for IL-03.

Peter, what
we’re able to accomplish in the next two years depends on growing our
progressive coalition in Congress. [ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12355?refcode=em20220411-1176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1176%2E420207%2ETYcdC_ ]Will you rush a contribution of
$3 or any amount today to help us elect these people-first
leaders so we can hold our Democratic majority in the House and expand our
movement for progress?

[ Photo ]Photo of Pramila with headshots of endorsed candidates

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12355?refcode=em20220411-1176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1176%2E420207%2ETYcdC_ ]Contribute $3 »

Nida, Robert, Donna, Summer, and Delia represent the best of what we have
to offer. They are activists, organizers, and bold champions for the
progressive agenda — and they will fight hard for climate action, Medicare
for All, and a fair minimum wage.

These candidates are currently running in open and/or newly drawn
congressional seats. [ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12355?refcode=em20220411-1176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1176%2E420207%2ETYcdC_ ]Their races are winnable — but only if we do our
part. Can you contribute $3 or any amount to help us send
Nida, Robert, Donna, Summer, and Delia to Congress?

Thank you in advance for supporting our efforts to elect these bold
progressives. Together, we will grow this movement — and we will win.

In solidarity,

Pramila

clean_body: Peter, did you see Pramila’s email on Friday? She released her first slate of midterm endorsements, backing five progressive champions for the House. Nida, Robert, Donna, Summer, and Delia are proven leaders ready to fight for the people and our progressive agenda. But to build strong, winning campaigns, these candidates need to continue investing in large voter outreach programs. That’s where you come in. [ ]Will you rush a $3 contribution to help Team Jayapal expand our people-first coalition and defend our Democratic majority in Congress? No donation is too small to make a difference in a midterm election year as important as this one. Thanks for chipping in any amount today. In solidarity, Team Jayapal ----- Begin Original Message ----- [2]Pramila Jayapal Peter, Today, I’m excited to announce my first slate of congressional endorsements for the 2022 midterm election cycle. As we head into one of the most consequential midterm elections ever, and Democrats prepare to make their case to the American people on why we deserve to retain our majorities in Congress, it’s important that we have strong progressives who are unafraid to stand up to corporate greed and fight hard on behalf of the people. I’m so proud to endorse: Nida Allam, running for NC-04; Robert Garcia, running for CA-42; Donna Edwards, running for MD-04; Summer Lee, running for PA-12; * Delia Ramirez, running for IL-03. Peter, what we’re able to accomplish in the next two years depends on growing our progressive coalition in Congress. [ ]Will you rush a contribution of $3 or any amount today to help us elect these people-first leaders so we can hold our Democratic majority in the House and expand our movement for progress? They are activists, organizers, and bold champions for the progressive agenda — and they will fight hard for climate action, Medicare for All, and a fair minimum wage. These candidates are currently running in open and/or newly drawn congressional seats. [ ]Their races are winnable — but only if we do our part. Can you contribute $3 or any amount to help us send Nida, Robert, Donna, Summer, and Delia to Congress? Thank you in advance for supporting our efforts to elect these bold progressives. Peter!

We're now **less than 30 DAYS away** from mail-in ballots dropping and the start of voting by mail in our race to flip California's 49th Congressional District and win back a Republican House majority.

With California now mailing ballots to ALL registered voters, **we can no longer treat June 7th as Election Day.** This election will start in less than one month from now and the majority of votes will be cast by mail _before Election Day even arrives!_

That means this week... today... RIGHT NOW is when we need to be getting our message out to voters by mail, online, over the airwaves, by phone and in person. [**And we can't do any of this without your support.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dd21d1b9e816463283a97d3aeb9918af&_e=DICg9RKaeVwD16YO_1bndJg0y9jw8AYMwWskVOxvBZB47hZaZLpuDHJDLHAC52KFdzvS6ZPwbWy0GtTQV-epzyQ7J0XKmSRkAniUfplxzoo0WsQeX0y-HtVRBPdevRN0pw0Yexjj12mOzNk1Ht7kB8K8M_uUMTTyQhceFO1Q5YQEJbpjYJTZ2PaoHFLY6bLgcnruKOX5kKLgD4kFkCjQN08yg4BUGWVTcpRPUFqYLikUW3qq6xTB7rV6-SxiHxDi2REzEB8TwEDm9gyGTJXuRdlh0DqhMjklS7Ro1a6QrQWYuEs0mgRpA20jeNoHE7lDzGpYFFqSeKKCLEP6sdzQTAXj62hrcTQWBaMS7b2HSbHLamScLpLzLzMvg9yBU8uo2HyDhN18r8Kvf0SdcQYGNjpQ06Uj7r7uhtih0rW1QU170h04Uqkb0gEESWQ2p-RXRHQurTeJvfZiqxgsNmQopg%3D%3D)

[**Will you restore a Republican-controlled Congress for our suffering nation by chipping in to help me flip top-target CA-49?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dd21d1b9e816463283a97d3aeb9918af&_e=DICg9RKaeVwD16YO_1bndJg0y9jw8AYMwWskVOxvBZB47hZaZLpuDHJDLHAC52KFdzvS6ZPwbWy0GtTQV-epzyQ7J0XKmSRkAniUfplxzoo0WsQeX0y-HtVRBPdevRN0pw0Yexjj12mOzNk1Ht7kB8K8M_uUMTTyQhceFO1Q5YQEJbpjYJTZ2PaoHFLY6bLgcnruKOX5kKLgD4kFkCjQN08yg4BUGWVTcpRPUFqYLikUW3qq6xTB7rV6-SxiHxDi3WDWOJlIntbhK1ZiN_CxPnv56heDwZtUrpAxDQgu0oVzorm1K3q8R9FagwnNlhRKyc3sznLE2py-gH_kwwfFlPGovjMwCWjmzrh4FRpWU5k6MFwzI4Azlo57HdfCejtXPxN8M_laMAdorB1aat5SFhZymcrLZzBulrtJJucuKwo4m6XIr4D77_UlFg_qulYSBpJU5f0hctXXwlgZOgHkgw%3D%3D)

[**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT TO LISA**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dd21d1b9e816463283a97d3aeb9918af&_e=DICg9RKaeVwD16YO_1bndJg0y9jw8AYMwWskVOxvBZB47hZaZLpuDHJDLHAC52KFdzvS6ZPwbWy0GtTQV-epzyQ7J0XKmSRkAniUfplxzoo0WsQeX0y-HtVRBPdevRN0pw0Yexjj12mOzNk1Ht7kB8K8M_uUMTTyQhceFO1Q5YQEJbpjYJTZ2PaoHFLY6bLgcnruKOX5kKLgD4kFkCjQN08yg4BUGWVTcpRPUFqYLikUW3qq6xTB7rV6-SxiHxDilwpWUsChmpuk3vXN8PrVqbXOn03ThKnkRVpkrolgHwG3Al1is_yOxbdUITmLkDhDkfeU7TRIwHVvJirXR6peV_4sI0X1phNieXRKH2Q1MJx4mFFErbpTNzwusvcRlcECw0c0-xuznoaCuNGPSavb7Xjt3l2jeZop9qnhs2lMUkN9LH-hD6m6hGZBVTtxsd6tCXQ3Pvn8xxeU4KDvIqW8lg%3D%3D)
I am in a competitive open primary race and only the top two vote getters will advance to November.

**Defeating liberal Mike Levin and flipping CA-49 back to a Republican seat is a critical part of our nationwide strategy to restore Republican control of Congress.**

That's why the NRCC included this seat in their first round of 2022 targets over a year ago.

Redistricting has put this seat EVEN MORE in play than it was a year ago, but I need your help to clear the hurdle of winning the primary first.

Lisa Bartlett

name: George Bochetto
subject: This is important.
body:
|
---
Peter, Fair-minded citizens who care about the rule of law want our elections to be free and fair – not rigged in favor of one party over the other. In 2020, politicians in Harrisburg passed the unconstitutional Act 77, allowing Democrats to harvest hundreds of thousands of ballots with a 50 day, no excuse mail-in rule, providing virtually no security or integrity for the election. Act 77 is the reason why the Democrats were able to steal the state in the 2020 election and it shows what the radical left is trying to accomplish through surreptitious, unconstitutional actions in the legislature. Our constitution requires in-person voting unless you are in the armed services or genuinely disabled and Act 77 has already been declared unconstitutional by Pennsylvania's Commonwealth Court. The fight is now in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and, until it is reviewed, the Act has been reinstated.

I am deeply concerned about what this portends regarding their potential ruling, and its direct impact on the upcoming 2022 election. That is why I intend to file a petition to intervene in the case, or failing intervention, present an argument as _amicus curiae_.

I have been an election law and constitutional expert in Pennsylvania for decades, and I want to make sure the rule of law prevails over naked partisanship and allowing our ballot boxes to be stuffed.

The people of Pennsylvania must have confidence in the outcome of our elections in order for our system of government to work and they must have confidence in their elected officials to know that preserving their rights is paramount. Please consider supporting my campaign to be Pennsylvania’s next US Senator. I have spent a lifetime fighting for the people of Pennsylvania as an attorney and will continue to fight for their rights in Washington. [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFULDvFQHgtUZnpAZW9LK18I_MJcBlHlgF-q6xyBvXftg&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=act_77_email&n=1) Thank you for your support. For America, George Bochetto
Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=act_77_email&n=2).

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Donald Trump just endorsed Dr. Oz. What’s next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
He’s obsessed with Pennsylvania.
#
🚨 Donald Trump’s so obsessed with Pennsylvania that he’s going all-in on 2022 — starting with yesterday’s announcement that **he’s officially endorsing Dr. Oz for U.S. Senate. 🚨**
It’s crystal-clear what Trump wants, Derek.****
**» First,** he wants to put an ultra-wealthy, pseudoscience-hawking celebrity (sound familiar?) into PA’s open Senate seat.
**» Then,** he wants to build on an Oz victory to clinch PA + win a second term in 2024.
We fully expect that Donald Trump will use every bit of his influence to buy this race for Oz using MAGA dark money. **This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. John Fetterman is the only candidate who can beat Trump + Dr. Oz**.
**_[We extended our emergency goal another 24 hours to raise 1,000 more donations. Will you pitch in yours today? Please, Derek, we need as many individual donations as possible to overpower Donald Trump’s involvement in this race.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47252?refcode=em20220411-5353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5353%2E434096%2E2tFIzG)_**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47252?refcode=em20220411-5353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5353%2E434096%2E2tFIzG)**
Derek, think back to Trump’s obsession with PA reaching an all-time high in 2020, when Republicans launched lawsuit after lawsuit to try to overturn our legitimate presidential election results.
Trump’s laser-focus on lying + spreading disinformation about our state was a big part of what energized thousands of his supporters to go to D.C. on January 6th and attempt an insurrection.
John Fetterman was proud to defend PA’s election integrity at every turn. **But now, we’re reminded that democracy is at stake in our race to flip PA’s U.S. Senate seat.**
Trump endorsing Oz is all part of a plan to set the table for Trump’s run in 2024. His endorsement is a blaring green light for MAGA super PACs to hit PA with an avalanche of dark money, the likes of which have never been seen before in PA.
**_[The stakes couldn’t be higher in PA + for our democracy. Will you chip in your first donation today toward our emergency goal? We need to be ready to fight back against Dr. Oz + the incoming tide of MAGA super PAC spending.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47252?refcode=em20220411-5353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5353%2E434096%2E2tFIzG)_**
Thank you,
Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220411-5353-footer&t=22&refcode2=5353_434096_2tFIzG&akid=5353%2E434096%2E2tFIzG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=5353%2E434096%2E2tFIzG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=5353%2E434096%2E2tFIzG)

_**Can you imagine what he will report next week to the Federal Election Commission for his entire 1st Quarter of fundraising?**_

clean_body: If we fall short in this race, it will be because we were outspent, not because we didn’t have the necessary support to win. If we fall short in this race, it will be because we were outspent, not because we didn't have the necessary support to win. | Fellow American, Our opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the country. In the 28 days of February, he raised $2.71 million online. That's a 50% increase in online donations compared to what he raised in the second half of last year. Can you imagine what he will report next week to the Federal Election Commission for his entire 1st Quarter of fundraising? We have a real opportunity to oust this DEM incumbent and win back the Senate majority for conservatives, but national Democrats are trying to buy this race. It's CRITICAL that you take a stake in our success today; we cannot win this race without your help. We're being outraised, and we simply cannot let fundraising gap continue to grow. We're currently ahead in the polls by one point, but we're behind in the money race. This is serious. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Hola Friend, **My name is Claudia Zapata and I am running for Congress in Texas' 21st Congressional District! I am running to represent rural Texas because we deserve representation that looks like us, knows our story and will fight with us.** I am a community organizer with legislative policy experience that knows the needs of the people in our district are being intentionally ignored by the Republican incumbent, Chip Roy. I have experience fighting for families. I developed policy at the Texas Capitol as a legislative aide and I am an experienced workforce & budget analyst for the Texas Health and Human Services Commission. **[As Chip Roy rejected science, vaccines, facemasks, and hazard pay for first responders during a pandemic, I rolled up my sleeves to help underserved communities. I was involved in mutual aid organizing, volunteered with my nonprofit, and hosted vaccine drives in underserved communities.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wSuSIWp7jkqQxXBgK8nJFdzF6G3cYEIhIKOaa7ecEl0GB2iUE3W4nECe7D_WfC7VptKlq3HbzJReEC6aHWt1DX3oq9OInicYw6v_Eco-6jd_CgeQkBuoPgoPfmwLKsRb5uxINpg2qMdg2NWynsbSwoR_S5aAKcIbNJRcnpRA9xtTpWB8OPXKAGcWSYulyAp0lflnq4UO3VKVagFdRWCiObRJiUL9FEEp9F1XDzc6nVQw-pLCvAzgakd7XiFQqXA7mzz805T7478CqQ0BOQ7_no3cLhjVfYuWxQAJFWIgfc2_sXzwPz83bEj-1V2VdKCKCHJLpf_PIsAEKViU_oA-fJlin1aSF57JUxCrzmSsdfWWo1t9knZotcgK0deFuzI34/3l4/fuveDJxxTiyuNpVgtOnDLw/h1/B_cTricPplz-PaKACf0em2nuqZbinBrg-Bui_tkOdso)**

I am not a stranger to hard work. I grew up helping my family make ends meet by cleaning toilets and picking citrus. I helped care for my grandfather in hospice. I continue to organize to help our communities during the pandemic. **I was raised to put family first and help take care of our neighbors.** Our district deserves a representative that addresses the basic needs of the people, instead of playing party politics during a global pandemic. **[We are proudly endorsed by Texas AFL-CIO, Wendy Davis, Black Austin Democrats, Austin-American Statesman, Sunrise Movement Austin, Liberal Austin Democrats, College Democrats at Texas State, University Democrats, Bexar County Tejano Democrats + so many more including voters like you.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wSuSIWp7jkqQxXBgK8nJFdzF6G3cYEIhIKOaa7ecEl0GB2iUE3W4nECe7D_WfC7VqWqyBMVeo7CzmnPN2ZVD7jppcaltR4A_K0tAcndgrPAPWR98MXGWhL4QZmUyLCSroKjDnh2KAxSOMr3iN56aV9AcdvdMeiWuNEbyPmL_C2WvpE51C7KsvvbiSNNazzlPQi5InP8ST5NrpUTzOu77_-oGHI0AJqxPo6sX3jAnpbGmrk7TS3CUjIt0wICHcFXZUV0ZcDZ8ibkIF4_2XDa9bqdp7A0BJxxTuFpFil_gjWeu7uxAiqarjNt74htSpk6GOS1SpRb_gYL52MGrSzHY2vCpiiuk_iQgma6OLZOfhhClme-k5dZm7Ci4sHur806Mk/3l4/fuveDJxxTiyuNpVgtOnDLw/h2/HvtTotj1VqoVvCEkl7-jy2Ky6hBW3QqQpzmvd2x0Tx4)** We have a real opportunity to win this seat, _**but as long as we continue to believe that "Republican safe seats" are unwinnable, nothing will change.**_ **The establishment in D.C. is ready to give up on Texas, but this Fierce Latina is just getting started.** Our campaign is ready to legislate in Congress -- with your help! **_Will you rush a donation right away so we continue fighting for the people of Texas? Every dollar makes a difference!_**

clean_body: | | Hola Friend, My name is Claudia Zapata and I am running for Congress in Texas' 21st Congressional District! I am running to represent rural Texas because we deserve representation that looks like us, knows our story and will fight with us. I am a community organizer with legislative policy experience that knows the needs of the people in our district are being intentionally ignored by the Republican incumbent, Chip Roy. I have experience fighting for families. I developed policy at the Texas Capitol as a legislative aide and I am an experienced workforce & budget analyst for the Texas Health and Human Services Commission. | I am not a stranger to hard work. I grew up helping my family make ends meet by cleaning toilets and picking citrus. I helped care for my grandfather in hospice. I continue to organize to help our communities during the pandemic. I was raised to put family first and help take care of our neighbors. Our district deserves a representative that addresses the basic needs of the people, instead of playing party politics during a global pandemic. We have a real opportunity to win this seat, but as long as we continue to believe that "Republican safe seats" are unwinnable, nothing will change. The establishment in D.C. is ready to give up on Texas, but this Fierce Latina is just getting started. Our campaign is ready to legislate in Congress -- with your help! Will you rush a donation right away so we continue fighting for the people of Texas? Every dollar makes a difference! Donate today to help get out the vote to finally get rid of far-right Republican incumbent, Chip Roy AND help rural Texans! Mil gracias, friend! Claudia | | Claudia Zapata is a practical, progressive Democrat running for Congress in Texas’ 21st congressional district in Central Texas. We have a real opportunity to win this seat, but as long as we continue to believe that "Republican safe seats" are unwinnable, nothing will change. Our campaign is ready to get the job done. Are you? | | | You can follow Claudia's campaign by clicking on the links below : | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2021 Con Claudia, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Claudia Zapata for US Congress P.O. Please make a today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.
