name: Adam Schiff
subject: For the first time since 2010
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

The Senate has voted to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme
Court.

This is a triumphant moment for our country. One without parallel in the
nearly 250-year history of the United States.

For the first time in our history, a Black woman will serve as one of nine
justices presiding over the most consequential cases in the nation.

It was the Supreme Court that decided in Dred Scott v. Sandford in 1857
that slaves were not to be considered citizens.

They decided in the 1896 Plessy v. Ferguson case the legal doctrine of
“separate but equal” which ushered in more than a half-century of Jim
Crow.

But the Supreme Court also integrated public schools with Brown v. Board
of Education and legalized interracial marriages like Judge Jackson’s
nationwide with Loving v. Virginia.

The people we put on the Supreme Court chart the course of our nation and
its history, and I’m thrilled such a talented jurist received bipartisan
support to become a Supreme Court Justice — the first confirmed by a
Democratic Senate since 2010.

The appointment of Justice Jackson exemplifies how crucial our Democratic
majorities are, and it’s why today I’m asking for your support to defend
those majorities this November.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]Will you rush a donation of $10, $25, or $50 today to help my
re-election campaign and support new and incumbent Democratic candidates
as we defend ourselves from the Republican attacks that are sure to come?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1006&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1007&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1008&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

President Biden made a phenomenal choice by nominating Judge Ketanji Brown
Jackson to the Supreme Court.

America will be a fairer, more just nation with her on the bench.

Judge Jackson’s confirmation comes at a crucial time for our country.

Since the 2013 Shelby County v. Holder decision, the Voting Rights Act has
been under constant attack.

A Mississippi abortion ban could overturn Roe v. Wade as soon as this
summer.

We need more Justices like Judge Jackson — and to ensure that, we have to
defend our majorities in Congress.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220411_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=174_5257348_SKqtly&akid=174%2E5257348%2ESKqtly ]Send a donation to my re-election campaign today. Any amount helps.

Thanks for everything you’ve done to bring us to this monumental moment in
our nation’s history.

Let’s defend the progress we’ve fought so hard to make together.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

**From:** **Vice President Kamala Harris**
**Subject:** My tie-breaking vote in the Senate
**Date:** Mon, Mar 28, 2022 at 4:11 PM
---
---
With just three days until the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2022, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain what’s at stake in this year’s midterms, **and then make a $7 donation to the DNC to help reach their goal by Thursday.**
---
With a 50-50 split in the Senate, I can cast a deciding vote. **But if we lose just _one seat_ , I can’t break the tie, and the Biden-Harris agenda will be at risk.** That’s why we need to protect Democrats in tough races, and fight to elect more Democrats, too. The DNC is at the forefront of this work, and that’s why I’m coming to you today.
---
**If you can, Friend, chip in $7 to the DNC ahead of Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. Democrats nationwide will be counting on a strong DNC to maintain and expand our congressional majorities this fall.**
---
---
I won’t sugarcoat it, Friend: Our majorities are incredibly slim, and only a handful of races will determine which party sets the agenda for the next two years. That’s why it’s so important that we support the DNC in building the party infrastructure it’ll take to expand our majorities.
---
**If you’re able, please join me in supporting the DNC with a $7 donation today. Your support is incredibly important.**
---
Thank you for all you do for Democrats and for this country.
---
Kamala
---
Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States
---
---

body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

clean_body: America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. Peter, Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C. America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing. I can’t do this without your support. That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an Official Founding Supporter. This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win. At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda. This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder. I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country. I just have one simple question for you: WILL YOU JOIN ME? Thank you & God Bless America. Sarah Palin | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

It's long overdue that Wisconsin parents have the tools they need to fight back against Evers and his “woke” liberal mob who have hijacked our children’s education. And YOUR signature brings us that much closer... Official Petition for a Wisconsin Parents’ Bill of Rights Signer: dpwillis67@gmail.com Submission Status: [Pending] Deadline: Tonight @ 9:45 P.M. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Wed, Apr 06, 2022 Subject: Friend's petition signature [PENDING] To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, The Eau Claire Area School District has quickly become one of the most radically progressive school districts in the country, trampling on the rights of Wisconsin parents at every turn. [Source: Fox News] From privilege tests to teacher training urging students to hide gender transitions from their parents, Tony Evers’ and his “woke” liberal mob have hijacked our children’s education. It’s never been more evident that Wisconsinites are in desperate need of a Parents’ Bill of Rights to take back control of our schools and protect our children from this leftist indoctrination. It’s not enough for Tony Evers and his liberal cronies to push their radical agenda on our children, our largest schools are also FAILING by any real standard under their watch. When only 10% of students are proficient, that should NEVER be “meeting expectations.” Teachers within the Milwaukee Public Schools system have even written letters expressing their “heartbreak” with the state of their schools. It’s time for Wisconsin parents – the taxpayers paying for their children’s education – to once again have a say. But that all starts with a Parents’ Bill of Rights and YOUR signature on this petition... Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: New York Times Called me an Insurrectionist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Soros media at it again |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=435df48fc7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Can you believe this? The media is at it again, attacking me at every opportunity. They’re bringing out the big guns now.

The New York Times just labeled me an “insurrectionist.”
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=444d1f9ffb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **They want to kick me and Paul Gosar out? **

**_Then they have another think coming._**

The _New York Times_ claims:

_In three separate candidacy challenges filed in Superior Court in Maricopa County, Ariz., voters and the progressive group, Free Speech for People, targeted Representatives Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs and State Representative Mark Finchem, who is running for Arizona secretary of state with former President Donald J. Trump’s endorsement._

_It was unclear whether the challenges would go anywhere; an initial skirmish, also led by Free Speech for People, failed to block Representative Madison Cawthorn’s candidacy in North Carolina. But they were the latest bids to find a way to punish members of Congress who have encouraged or made common cause with those who stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6._

This is the stuff of authoritarian regimes. The Left is on the defense so they attack and try to have forcibly removed from elected positions (against the will of the people) myself, Paul Gosar, Andy Biggs, and Madison Cawthorn.

**This shows that the Left STILL HATES the will of the people.**

**_Whether its stealing elections or ousting elected officials, all they care about is power. And they have the audacity to claim that WE are insurrectionists?_**

**_Even as they actively fight against the will of the people?_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a7487c8943&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Remember the party that brought you this? This is the same party that is calling me an insurrectionist for going to meet with the Vice President to show him evidence of fraud.

There’s a word in Psychology that I think applies to the Left here from _Psychology Today_ :
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=587d9da1ce&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| You can see it in everything they do!

They are worried people know they are stealing elections, so they accuse US of stealing elections.

**They accuse people of insurrection when their party burnt the country to the ground in riots and now are trying to oust anyone who opposes them.**

Do you know what this shows? Not only that they are _wrong_ but that they are _weak._

They are lashing out because they are on the _defense_.

[**Can you help me today take the fight to them and go on the offense? **](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fc56d04554&e=44b8c466b0)

**_[My team tells me if we raise $7,500 tonight, we can go on the offense and let people know the truth about who the REAL INSURRECTIONISTS are. Can you help with a rush donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=048e748204&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[**_Please donate today to help me take the fight back to them!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=46b86271e5&e=44b8c466b0)

They must be very afraid of me. All I did was stand up for you, and they hate that.

Thank you for your support!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=18f12d2211&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=0d52f0f33f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=0d52f0f33f).

body:
In just 36 days’ time, it will be primary election day here in Oregon (May 17th) and we’re diligently working to make sure that we’re ready for it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc15ab1e29b54ddab98fd5671c4de2ef&_e=NtiNa2pnw-qqIDccCkssK5D-bNUfPItvdu5wCGVRWEPtKyIp9sQb9kxD8sHndI1oJ673PP1hqLT7hgyiOnzkD23yJRO1SAzq3qgFPZ0TwrnR1g9XYWMo95a33ynpH4wDgya3kri6ybKJhuBnashvO7BE0dknzuhLbmzpAelR6v7FlyoL0qFBXrpOifjims_GTo49WqugIOS4SF3up4jrt_dvCGtmy7Onlxo9sGe8GGb083g3CByJFG1GvycTzN6kPfxQuzViMtCWRs73OlvssVTmNw4PGzyZDKrdQOhKKdKGuCRkI0MPgvSitZuvW7RYZ_uFhWEDCJLvHnl_EQIcgJFlMpZQMowayeh8xfE_-na6seaT0WmTWOs8j15D1upETxyRBOTP-Mng1y9PKj0KXQUYdxWvOEHBDcB0xyeObUpC15DLyuBNdKoEJRd4jkMcxSdNJ2zCZnSpb-r25vn7dQ%3D%3D)
---
_
_
Peter,

In just 36 days’ time, it will be primary election day here in Oregon (**May 17th**) and we’re diligently working to make sure that we’re ready for it.

Before we can gear up for the general election showdown - which is sure to be a nail biter of a race - I must first secure the Republican nomination.

With that in mind, I want to provide you with a few reasons right now as to why investing a couple bucks into my campaign is a good idea, especially if you’re someone who wants to take back the House from the crazed Democrats in November.

1. If I become the nominee – Democrats are going to target this district with millions. Recently Nancy Pelosi’s super PAC made a commitment to spend **$3 MILLION to prop up Oregon Democrats** - including my future opponent.
2. In 2020, Pelosi spent more than **$5 million** shoring up the campaign of my former opponent - ensuring his reelection.
3. This is the first time in nearly 3 decades that there is**no incumbent running** for this seat, meaning it’s anyone’s race to win/lose.

**In the next 36 days my campaign manager and I have set a goal of raising $13,584 in online donations.** To break that down, we need to be raising $377 per day through May 17th to hit that mark. That comes out to $15 per hour, every hour.

**[Here is my ask: I’m looking for two conservatives to each make a donation of $7.50 in the next hour.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc15ab1e29b54ddab98fd5671c4de2ef&_e=NtiNa2pnw-qqIDccCkssK5D-bNUfPItvdu5wCGVRWEPtKyIp9sQb9kxD8sHndI1oJ673PP1hqLT7hgyiOnzkD23yJRO1SAzq3qgFPZ0TwrnR1g9XYWMo95a33ynpH4wDgya3kri6ybKJhuBnashvO7BE0dknzuhLbmzpAelR6v7FlyoL0qFBXrpOifjims_GTo49WqugIOS4SF3up4jrt_dvCGtmy7Onlxo9sGe8GGb083g3CByJFG1GvycTzN6kHd4irLZngpkxufQi2m9la6uZ-ZBpbcDDj0EW6cqJl05zh9ZCltT09062rcuEnTBLXlFDgWCZkp9rG_tJ0mUrx_hB47vj53fIHiLrDNdD2zIKeBG7k4MxdqmNRapaQuRVuom1FKKhMbvzImFx_D8yxIZlYgcNZ3s3MpefsAVXyc34ZoaMYAirmVpSKJqmXbfupOWZcOOf3qD7edJbTDIU4A%3D%3D)** All it takes is two conservatives donating $7.50 every hour to hit our daily goal of raising $377.

**HELP ME HIT MY DAILY GOAL** [** MAKE A GIFT OF $7.50 ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc15ab1e29b54ddab98fd5671c4de2ef&_e=NtiNa2pnw-qqIDccCkssK5D-bNUfPItvdu5wCGVRWEPtKyIp9sQb9kxD8sHndI1oJ673PP1hqLT7hgyiOnzkD23yJRO1SAzq3qgFPZ0TwrnR1g9XYWMo95a33ynpH4wDgya3kri6ybKJhuBnashvO7BE0dknzuhLbmzpAelR6v7FlyoL0qFBXrpOifjims_GTo49WqugIOS4SF3up4jrt_dvCGtmy7Onlxo9sGe8GGaNe8NxzLs3yh0K84xlySl3ci5qVy5YJEY-z9_vhYqBuLXlALQ46Seqrd5dwFS1aKm7864fB5-McGi0IWErsMF2aun6vmNYexYFP9K-d6JOVtQrClqP6NEWQk0Jqn3XHbnG9VuSSEI7M75FKNwxQu3mniGqs3krJXX4VhS1I4sY-oR3Vpk3SdKdSfUTfBa7u29gsYk-Mvf7OXRHwD-2G9nlTvaCOXpynmu6V28I2O3AOFsvp-Epq8KSMCIKXgr3orA%3D)

I appreciate you! And I very much look forward to updating you on our fundraising progress over **the next 36 days.**

Thankful for your help,

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc15ab1e29b54ddab98fd5671c4de2ef&_e=NtiNa2pnw-qqIDccCkssK5D-bNUfPItvdu5wCGVRWEPtKyIp9sQb9kxD8sHndI1oJ673PP1hqLT7hgyiOnzkD23yJRO1SAzq3qgFPZ0TwrnR1g9XYWMo95a33ynpH4wDgya3kri6ybKJhuBnashvO7BE0dknzuhLbmzpAelR6v7FlyoL0qFBXrpOifjims_GTo49WqugIOS4SF3up4jrt_dvCGtmy7Onlxo9sGe8GGb083g3CByJFG1GvycTzN6kWJndr33Zxq7SeTUc9d3gk11IfO28P5cqOaK3wBfsOMogg_2_krYMVfbHSrQtkUZtlDgyEp4XHLT0AtBnGQ2RIUcwwJ9Wr6cyXuXlNBmAGvBbpxkFS_7LTSZc5F8kyAYKLD4tgP2rv5n6WqA38UbZA-bRb9gCEyYZ2BGqHzlDzS0MV1ufXmcCrhrNKt1tWw4Y3d4nuX4rgEaHJ0f92vfFlg%3D%3D)

name: Patty Murray
subject: Why we need to keep the Senate blue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The facts are clear.
#
Peter,
Last week was a historic one in the other Washington. I was proud to stand alongside my Democratic colleagues and vote to confirm Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court.
So much work and perseverance led to this moment–most of all Justice Jackson’s. And I’m also very clear that none of it would have been possible if we hadn’t turned the Senate blue. When he was Majority Leader, Mitch McConnell refused to hold confirmation hearings for the Democratic president’s Supreme Court nominee. But thanks to support from people like you, Democrats have a slim majority, and we’ve been working hard for progress ever since.
**[The facts are clear: If we want to protect our progress, we must protect our Senate majority. We can’t lose a single seat in our fight for working families. Will you help keep the Senate blue and donate $5 to our $25,000 mid-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44031306/339807732/1410418758?refcode=pm_em_220411_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI3YTNiYS0wNGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXwjtBckT6dNCIz6bGF7F6F4TXeQsJ9maU45Bf5IKtw=)**
We have so much work ahead of us. Child care. Health care. The climate crisis. Protecting the right to abortion. Support for workers and families. We need to be moving full steam ahead, not letting the Republicans pump the brakes and bring all of our momentum to a screeching halt.
But Republicans are convinced they can defeat us in November – even here in Washington state. **That’s why Mitch McConnell and the GOP are targeting our race.** My opponent, Tiffany Smiley, told McConnell it would be _“great to have Washington state be the seat that flips the Senate in November.”_
**[The Senate doesn’t need another red-stamp Republican standing with Mitch McConnell. It’s an essential time to mobilize and protect our Democratic majority. This race is heating up, and I could use your support. Can you pitch in $5 toward my $25,000 mid-month goal now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44031307/339807733/1410418758?refcode=pm_em_220411_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI3YTNiYS0wNGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXwjtBckT6dNCIz6bGF7F6F4TXeQsJ9maU45Bf5IKtw=)**
This team has stood by me so many times before, and I know we can win this fight together.
Thank you,
Patty
** **
** **
** **
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44031308/339807734/1410418758?refcode=pm_em_220411_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI3YTNiYS0wNGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXwjtBckT6dNCIz6bGF7F6F4TXeQsJ9maU45Bf5IKtw=)****

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Today’s victory on gun violence prevention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
I’ll keep fighting for meaningful action and laws to reduce gun violence
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027358/339768300/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220411-1-a&refcode2=b434c6b2-e3b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oeLiNitr/gfZ3odV7l1uc1Hg530zmnkd7OiTA6FmIZL1SrMEZTWiauKXQ2Nz6ntS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0YzZiMi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dka_jwkQZlm7Iz0rIBYLGSRNPvasfnFNsVzTGx8r6gY=)
Friends,
Today was an important day in our fight to make our communities safer from gun violence.
I was honored to join President Biden today as he signed an executive order to crack down on so-called “ghost guns” and enact other public safety measures.
We’ve already seen the toll these undetectable, untraceable guns have taken on our communities here in Maryland. That’s why the Maryland General Assembly recently stood up to the NRA and took action to ban ghost guns from our state.
Ghost guns are especially dangerous to our communities because they can be easily purchased over the internet, without a background check — and they don’t have serial numbers, so they are untraceable.
The new regulations outlined in President Biden’s executive order are common-sense updates that will address evolving technology and save lives.
But while this federal action is an important step, our work to reduce senseless gun violence is far from over.
Yes, we must make background checks universal.
Yes, we must ban assault weapons.
Yes, we must ban the use of high capacity magazines.
Will it be easy? No it will not be.
The NRA and their allies will continue to fight every inch of progress with every ounce of their being.
But even if Republicans don’t have the courage to stand up to the gun lobby, I’ll never stop fighting til we win. Because in this fight, winning means saving lives.
So I am asking:
[**Add your name to my petition calling on Congress to take comprehensive action that will make our communities safer from gun violence in this country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027360/339768302/-638521242?source=em220411-1-a&refcode2=b434c6b2-e3b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oeLiNitr/gfZ3odV7l1uc1Hg530zmnkd7OiTA6FmIZL1SrMEZTWiauKXQ2Nz6ntS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0YzZiMi1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dka_jwkQZlm7Iz0rIBYLGSRNPvasfnFNsVzTGx8r6gY=&emci=6c77af83-ddb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b434c6b2-e3b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)

clean_body: I’ll keep fighting for meaningful action and laws to reduce gun violence = Friends, Today was an important day in our fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. I was honored to join President Biden today as he signed an executive order to crack down on so-called “ghost guns” and enact other public safety measures. We’ve already seen the toll these undetectable, untraceable guns have taken on our communities here in Maryland. That’s why the Maryland General Assembly recently stood up to the NRA and took action to ban ghost guns from our state. Ghost guns are especially dangerous to our communities because they can be easily purchased over the internet, without a background check — and they don’t have serial numbers, so they are untraceable. The new regulations outlined in President Biden’s executive order are common-sense updates that will address evolving technology and save lives. But while this federal action is an important step, our work to reduce senseless gun violence is far from over. Yes, we must make background checks universal. Yes, we must ban assault weapons. Yes, we must ban the use of high capacity magazines. Will it be easy? No it will not be. The NRA and their allies will continue to fight every inch of progress with every ounce of their being. But even if Republicans don’t have the courage to stand up to the gun lobby, I’ll never stop fighting til we win. Because in this fight, winning means saving lives. So I am asking: Thank you in advance for raising your voice — and not giving up. Onwards, Chris PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

subject: [Polling Update] Our race is statistically tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I’m reaching out personally to ask for your support
#
Peter,
Our race for North Carolina’s open Senate seat could hardly be any closer. Recent polling shows me in a statistical tie with my Republican opponents.
Look, this is going to be so, so close, and it is so important that we do all we can to win. Flipping North Carolina’s Senate seat would be transformative.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027462/339768613/255501069?refcode=dd_em_220411_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Q5YjRmMy1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AY7rHdCkKUPmwfA5yH2Cly-yc4EUDO5o23Q1GV14dYI=)
**[If you can, please split a $5 donation between our campaign and Dick Durbin's today so we can reach more voters and win. We can change what is possible in the U.S. Senate by flipping this seat and expanding our majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027463/339768614/255501069?refcode=dd_em_220411_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Q5YjRmMy1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AY7rHdCkKUPmwfA5yH2Cly-yc4EUDO5o23Q1GV14dYI=)**
North Carolina is a purple state, and we know that our elections are usually very close. And when I say this race could come down to a handful of votes, it’s because I’ve seen it happen.
It happened to me, in fact. My race for Chief Justice was decided by just 401 votes. Out of 5,391,501 votes. In a race where I earned more votes than almost every Democrat on the ticket — including President Biden.
The recent polling is showing we could be in for just as close of a race, so we cannot afford to take anything for granted here. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you split a $5 donation between our campaign to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat and Dick Durbin's today? There’s no doubt in my mind that every dollar will make a difference when the votes are counted.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44027470/339768619/255501069?refcode=dd_em_220411_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Q5YjRmMy1lM2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AY7rHdCkKUPmwfA5yH2Cly-yc4EUDO5o23Q1GV14dYI=)**
In a race that could come down to such a narrow margin, this is why we have to work even harder. What we each do can truly make a difference.
\- Cheri Beasley

clean_body: | | | | Let’s make it happen. | Peter, It’s no surprise that Liz Cheney, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are allies, working to stop the America First Agenda. Cheney is so focused on January 6th and attacking President Trump that she has neglected the people of Wyoming and the United States. She has wasted the taxpayer's hard-earned money and continued to support Joe Biden’s radical agenda. Harriet and President Trump know that you are tired of Cheney's act. And since Day 1, you have been Harriet's biggest supporter, which is why we want to offer you an exclusive 200%-IMPACT on all donations in the NEXT HOUR! YOU could help us have our BEST FUNDRAISING DAY EVER Note: This offer is only valid for ONE HOUR TOP SUPPORTER:dpwillis67@gmail.com **DEADLINE: ONE HOUR 200%-IMPACT: NOT USED** Thank you, Team Hageman | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. name: Ben Samuels
subject: Ann Wagner’s new low
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi My Friend,
Did you know that the inventors of insulin sold the patent for $1 because they wanted everyone who needed it to have access? They said that the medicine “belonged to the world,” and they were right.
However, that vision has not been realized. Pharmaceutical companies have jacked up the price of insulin, charging thousands of dollars per year for life saving medication that millions of Americans rely on every day.
People in the United States should not lose their lives because they are rationing insulin to survive. I am running for office because this exploitation of the sick must end. Can you help me win this race by chipping in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-insulin?refcode=220411-email]
Let me be clear, no one should be held hostage by astronomical insulin prices because they have diabetes. Unfortunately, my opponent, Ann Wagner, does not seem to agree. Recently, the House voted to cap the price of insulin at $35 – Wagner voted AGAINST IT.
This is not the first time Wagner has voted against helping people afford healthcare. She has a long record of voting to gut the ACA and working to take health care away from the people of St. Louis.
We need to elect someone who cares about their constituents to Congress. Please help me win this race and donate $25 now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-insulin?refcode=220411-email&amount=25]
I am running for Congress because I believe in compassionate leadership and common-sense solutions that benefit everyone. I need your help to defeat Wagner and usher in a new moment in America. One in which no one dies because they are rationing their insulin.
In solidarity,
Ben Samuels
PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
Ben Samuels for Congress
9621 Olive Blvd.
P.O. Box 8484
Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998
United States

subject: re: just HOURS to go
body:
[](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=bfd7005669bf43148f0c0503e2100e53&_e=Ol_b0HqKNcz-ntVO-C1MBnj1E_PiPUXSBhRMlOBbX3G_Fx96ShSHumqN9CihJlw8gvx47eTjIx6Xo-j_L8EsNrn-EDa53sZ8oSVfFhPlJqmdaF_J5LIGZHPJBCWoyt-oklXdXsHHLJKLiz2LCX75Dd3Q8MNUJWG0aPPOE1kLgMuTEMihbcp-EeYmSKVG22LHwYZ-QjSnxTja1CdoW4umNJHvtyu9mdzHSkt69YI_dMMDraeBfWdRP7Z8e0y8RXdw8be7qXeDYqJ5_E3y6AWB9_GBo0aNMZPxZzI26cb_6hzQjcOKdywIx_XiEBKDkZXwF8DQlpa2HXY4w9os8FBEg6-m6VPCzmW8oIyAHirieoFdb97kKheKjPB8KN-1sBvrzg0QUyn6NjDLCXYXGFDhrKuR9ILkmbYWTQL_yXvMzoY%3D) Peter, I went on Fox News to talk about Vladimir Putin, Ukraine, and my service training Ukrainian forces while serving in the U.S. Army, and I did _not_ hold back. clean_body: Peter, I went on Fox News to talk about Vladimir Putin, Ukraine, and my service training Ukrainian forces while serving in the U.S. Army, and I did not hold back. Vladimir Putin chose THIS MOMENT to invade Ukraine because he KNOWS how weak Joe Biden is. The truth is, Putin wouldn’t dare make this kind of move under a strong Commander-in-Chief. But with Joe Biden, he has nothing to fear. China and Russia are getting closer every day, and our adversaries are putting the pedal to the metal to move against us. It’s no surprise that in just over a year as President, Joe Biden already lost two U.S. embassies. The only way to STOP Joe Biden and make America strong again is to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE with a Republican majority - and we can’t do that without your help. Take a stand NOW: Thank You, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russell=20Fry?=
subject: The Russell Roundup
body:
Stay up to date on the latest from Russell Fry's campaign for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/russellfrysc/russellroundup-8866094?e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=177886496d&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | It’s the beginning of the week, and that means another installment of **_Russell’s Roundup_** , your weekly source for the latest information on Russell Fry’s campaign to send a true conservative to Congress.
---
|
---
---
| | | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=674a0a4677&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**MEETING FOLKS IN MYRTLE BEACH**

Russell had a great time introducing himself to dozens of fellow Grand Strand Republicans Friday evening. Cathy Farish hosted a special meet and greet at her lovely home in Myrtle Beach. It was a fun, friendly, relaxed atmosphere where Russell explained how a new Republican majority in the U.S. House of Representatives next year can start turning things around for our country.

Would you like to host a meet and greet in your home? [**_Click here_**](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=de63544a77&e=7aa6ac5965) if you’re interested in having Russell chat with your friends, neighbors, and associates.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=57d92a4539&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**SUPER SATURDAYS ARE HERE!**

Did your doorbell ring Saturday? If not, it may soon because Super Saturdays are now underway. Our door-knocking campaign kicked off in Myrtle Beach last weekend. Dozens of eager, enthusiastic volunteers showed up spread the word about Russell Fry's conservative message.

We reached hundreds of homes in our inaugural effort. But thousands more remain to be reached. And we need **_you_** to help us contact them all. [**_Click here_** ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=cdd4936c1c&e=7aa6ac5965)to volunteer. You’ll have a great time meeting fellow conservatives as you help spread Russell’s message. And best of all—lunch is on us.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=b36ca6dc62&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**RUSSELL NEEDS YOUR DONATION**

Every day closer June 14 gets, the more the need for resources to fund Russell’s campaign increases. It’s vitally important that we make sure his conservative message reaches every corner of the Grand Strand and Pee Dee. But he needs your help to make it happen.

Any amount you can share is both desperately needed and much appreciated. [_Click here to donate_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=4769049a8b&e=7aa6ac5965) right now!
---
|
---
| **WE WANT YOU!**
Looking to get involved in Russell’s campaign? With plenty of opportunities available, there’s something for everyone. [_Click here_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=2e45c0bcdc&e=7aa6ac5965)[ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=254cfe28e6&e=7aa6ac5965)to volunteer, and we’ll be in touch with you soon.

**Pssst! PASS IT ON!**
Help spread the word of what Russell is doing here in the 7th Congressional District. Please take a moment and forward this newsletter to 10 of your neighbors, relatives, co-workers, and friends. They’ll be glad you did!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=5ff3475745&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=5cc10a7f99&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=aaef245eea&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
|
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Fry For CongressPO Box 14641Surfside Beach, SC 29587-4641
[Add us to your address book](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=e605e819c0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=e605e819c0).

Friends --

I’m Sam Langheim, Brad’s finance director. I try to only reach out when it’s critically urgent, and unfortunately that’s why I need to email you today.

**I just checked our finance records, and it looks like things dramatically slowed down over the weekend.**

The truth of the matter is that we have been outraised every month so far by Capitol Rioter Derrick Van Orden. **The sad truth is that even the worst candidates have a shot at winning with enough financial backing.**

clean_body: I just checked our finance records, and it looks like things dramatically slowed down over the weekend. | = Friends -- I’m Sam Langheim, Brad’s finance director. I try to only reach out when it’s critically urgent, and unfortunately that’s why I need to email you today. I just checked our finance records, and it looks like things dramatically slowed down over the weekend. The truth of the matter is that we have been outraised every month so far by Capitol Rioter Derrick Van Orden. The sad truth is that even the worst candidates have a shot at winning with enough financial backing. So I really need supporters like you to step up and chip in $5 before our mid-month fundraising deadline on Friday. = | = = = = = = If we are going to win this election, it is going to be because supporters like you helped us get there. Every dollar you donate is a dollar that helps us fight against Trump-endorsed Derrick Van Orden and fight for a better future for all Wisconsinites. We can win this election -- but only with your help. Sam Langheim Finance Director, Pfaff for Congress | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: Team Cranley-Fedor
subject: 🚨 News Updates from Team Cranley-Fedor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
With less than four weeks to the primary, this race is heating up | Hey team,

The countdown is on: **The Ohio primary is less than four weeks away!** Check out what Team Cranley-Fedor is up to with these headlines from the past week >>>
* * *
**Ohio Democratic governor hopefuls John Cranley, Nan Whaley debate for the first time** \- Cleveland.com [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028603/339771832/-226218937?amount=25&refcode=ea.1d76eb9c-e7b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1d76eb9c-e7b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc2ZWI5Yy1lN2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5-wX-OTxYNhntdKMgKoec2tbAE7pZxXistnYawM7ag=) During an hour-long debate at Central State University, John laid out the case: this primary is about who has a better economic record than Mike DeWine. As Cincinnati has grown, much of the state has suffered and stagnated. That’s the type of leadership that John would bring to the table.

Running through some of his policy priorities, he highlighted his plan to legalize recreational marijuana, use energy companies' profits to fund a $500 per year dividend for middle-class Ohioans, and fire every member of the Public Utilities Commission of Ohio in the wake of the House Bill 6 scandal.

We’re thankful to the Ohio Debate Commission for organizing the event, and we're glad to have John lay out his policy proposals in such a public forum!
* * *
**Teresa voted early! Can you guess who she cast her ballot for? 👀** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028604/339771834/-2001625320?refcode=ea.1d76eb9c-e7b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1d76eb9c-e7b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc2ZWI5Yy1lN2I5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5-wX-OTxYNhntdKMgKoec2tbAE7pZxXistnYawM7ag=&emci=018ae72e-dfb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1d76eb9c-e7b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289) Early voting for the Ohio primary began last Tuesday! Teresa couldn’t wait to cast her ballot for her pick for governor, so she made sure to cast her ballot early for the Cranley-Fedor ticket.

[**Have you already cast your ballot during the early voting period? Do you want to but aren’t sure how to? clean_body: With less than four weeks to the primary, this race is heating up | Hey team, The countdown is on: The Ohio primary is less than four weeks away! Check out what Team Cranley-Fedor is up to with these headlines from the past week >>> Ohio Democratic governor hopefuls John Cranley, Nan Whaley debate for the first time \- Cleveland.com = During an hour-long debate at Central State University, John laid out the case: this primary is about who has a better economic record than Mike DeWine. As Cincinnati has grown, much of the state has suffered and stagnated. That’s the type of leadership that John would bring to the table. Running through some of his policy priorities, he highlighted his plan to legalize recreational marijuana, use energy companies' profits to fund a $500 per year dividend for middle-class Ohioans, and fire every member of the Public Utilities Commission of Ohio in the wake of the House Bill 6 scandal. We’re thankful to the Ohio Debate Commission for organizing the event, and we're glad to have John lay out his policy proposals in such a public forum! Teresa voted early! Can you guess who she cast her ballot for? 👀 Early voting for the Ohio primary began last Tuesday! Teresa couldn’t wait to cast her ballot for her pick for governor, so she made sure to cast her ballot early for the Cranley-Fedor ticket. A very special thank you to Rep. Marcy Kaptur for joining John and Teresa on stage at our early voting kickoff event! = = Thank you to everyone who came out for Team Cranley-Fedor’s early voting kickoff event in Toledo! We were blown away by how many supporters were able to attend and were honored to have Rep. Marcy Kaptur headlining the event. Don’t forget to go cast your vote for Ohio’s future! disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Last week, I vetoed several harmful bills passed by Republicans in the Kentucky legislature that would take us backwards and do wrong by our most vulnerable neighbors. Peter,

Last week, I vetoed several harmful bills passed by Republicans in the Kentucky legislature that would take us backwards and do wrong by our most vulnerable neighbors.

I ran for governor to build a welcoming, compassionate, future-focused Kentucky. I promised to always do right by all Kentuckians. And we’ve delivered, bringing record jobs and economic development. Unfortunately, while I'm focused on making progress for our Commonwealth's families, Republicans are working to pass legislation that will drag us down.

That’s why I vetoed a number of bills last week that would undercut much of our progress. They include legislation that would quite literally take food off the table for our poorest kids and seniors, a ban on reproductive freedom so extreme that it doesn’t include protections for victims of rape and incest, a mean-spirited attack on transgender kids and an attempt to take critical funding away from our public schools and give it to private, unaccountable, for-profit charters.

I know that Republicans are going to try to use these vetoes against me to score political points. But I ran for governor to build the kind of Commonwealth that attracts new jobs, where everyone feels welcome and where all Kentuckians can live and thrive.

Thanks for being with me in this important work,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q2-2022?refcode=em22_220411_vetoes_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220411_vetoes_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

name: Max Steiner
subject: My response to LaMalfa's latest newsletter.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028905/339773126/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY4OTY4Yi1lYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XaZ9Pg9vf7afl0WsEIuH2xilqA2KFCNuW-psCgVcr4U=)
Friend,

Doug LaMalfa sent out another e-Newsletter on April 7th. So in response, and due to popular demand, here's my rebuttal:

First off, many of supporters have noted that LaMalfa now wants you to sign up to receive newsletters moving forward. _Why?_ Because it’s election season, and Congressmembers facing tough re-election fights send "campaign" material to residents while disguising it as “constituent messaging.” It's essentially taxpayer funded campaign activity.**LaMalfa has zero respect for election law, just as he has zero respect for elections – as shown by his embrace of the Big Lie conspiracy and vote against certification**. Our democracy is built on rules, and LaMalfa prefers to pay lip service while doing his best to evade the intent. The rules he can get away with breaking, he breaks. And the rules he is afraid to break, he bends.

The big news from the update is that LaMalfa is actually working with Democrats for once to improve the lives of Camp Fire victims. Paradise residents should never have had to pay taxes on lawyer fees or settlements, but **it has taken LaMalfa three years to work with Democrats to get the bill passed.** Here’s the thing: it’s always good to see bipartisan bills in Congress (the Tax Exemption Bill is co-sponsored by Democratic Congressman Mike Thompson). It’s just a shame it’s so rare to see LaMalfa put constituent needs above his petty, personal need to spew invectives at the Democrats when he could be working with them.

**Unsurprisingly, after bragging about his newfound bipartisan spirit, LaMalfa goes right back to complaining about the Democratic Party.**

First, he complains about the budget. Think about that for a second: A Congressmen who has**sucked up millions of dollars in rice subsidies** and who **voted for the massive tax cut for the rich** that has been adding to the deficit since the Republicans passed it in 2017 wants to pretend he's on our side. Shamelessness, thy name is Doug.

Then, he moves on to complaining about energy. He spends six paragraphs complaining about gas prices without mentioning Ukraine. Here’s the deal: the reason gas prices are high is because Putin invaded Ukraine and is killing civilians. LaMalfa ignores the suffering of Ukrainian to score political points.

LaMalfa’s latest email meanders through a series of topics without ever demonstrating any understanding of the deeper issues at play. In that way, it’s a lot like a Trump speech -- and that is not meant as a compliment. He is an embarrassment to the district and we need to defeat him in November.

**[Every time LaMalfa use his office as a megaphone for his extremist views, we need respond in-kind with our own messaging -- online, on the airwaves, and in mailboxes. Doing that takes resources which is why we are depending on support from readers like you. Anything you can give goes to defeating LaMalfa and defending democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028906/339773127/-96927706?refcode=em-4.11.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY4OTY4Yi1lYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XaZ9Pg9vf7afl0WsEIuH2xilqA2KFCNuW-psCgVcr4U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028907/339773128/-96927706?refcode=em-4.11.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY4OTY4Yi1lYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XaZ9Pg9vf7afl0WsEIuH2xilqA2KFCNuW-psCgVcr4U=)

Thanks for hearing me out,

Max

name: Ashley for PA-01
subject: Reproductive rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44028920/339773226/-1793552021?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220411oklahoma_A4PA1_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTNhYzZiMy1lYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XP5EeZG3LyQCYy0numEvvnQXSo6VwN1JGf6Bo1yIBKI=)
---
Folks — Last week, Oklahoma’s legislature passed a bill banning abortions in nearly all cases — one of the harshest anti-choice bills in the country. If signed, anyone who performs an abortion would face a punishment of up to 10 years in prison and $100,000 in fines. This dangerous bill would threaten the safety of women, doctors, and healthcare providers. Last year, Brian Fitzpatrick voted against the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , legislation that would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. With the Supreme Court expected to decide on the fate of _Roe v. Wade_ in the upcoming months, it’s shameful that Fitzpatrick refuses to stand up for our reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. [Reproductive rights are under attack. Add your name next to Ashley’s to fight back against the Republicans’ extreme efforts to regulate our bodies. clean_body: | = Folks — Last week, Oklahoma’s legislature passed a bill banning abortions in nearly all cases — one of the harshest anti-choice bills in the country. If signed, anyone who performs an abortion would face a punishment of up to 10 years in prison and $100,000 in fines. This dangerous bill would threaten the safety of women, doctors, and healthcare providers. Last year, Brian Fitzpatrick voted against the Women’s Health Protection Act , legislation that would codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. With the Supreme Court expected to decide on the fate of Roe v. Wade in the upcoming months, it’s shameful that Fitzpatrick refuses to stand up for our reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. | When you’re fighting just to pay the bills that have piled up, fighting for your reproductive rights against a legion of right-wing lawmakers and dark money may seem impossible. name: Strength in Faith Challenge
subject: 🙏 What we’re praying for this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
Team, we have a lot to be thankful for. Daily intentions inside >>>| | | Team, For our final week of the Strength in Faith challenge, we want to join together in offering prayers of **gratitude**. Let us spend these last few days of Lent giving thanks to the many people who bless our state with their hard work and sacrifice. Follow along with our daily intentions: MONDAY: We pray **in thanksgiving for all Illinois active duty military and veterans.** We are grateful for their service and sacrifice in defense of our country and our freedoms. TUESDAY: We pray **in thanksgiving for Illinois first responders** , We are grateful for the police, firefighters, paramedics, and other first responders who run to danger to protect others who are running from it. WEDNESDAY: We pray **in thanksgiving for all Illinois medical personnel**. We are grateful for the patient healers among us, who have persevered through a historic pandemic and continue to care for us when we are at our weakest.

THURSDAY: We pray **in thanksgiving for Illinois parents**. We are grateful for the moms and dads who put in the endless hours of work and bottomless reserves of love required to form the next generation of Illinoisans.
---

President Trump’s America First message wasn’t ignored by Americans... it was BLOCKED by Big Tech.

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dc1dcc0a77f34b3eb18ea122875a696d&_e=HybW2hthm0gJpCopOuonAc1_7km4i_8B6iZssrY-rPW4Y7q-UD7U0oUmGujkJsgrVHeUoGhBqq4M68CCsfQzl3YvfEgA4XqPWnWs1qE_aJYR3IGTwaKGZdS-amvblCaaeUHRCuLxXdSXZPdUAWRS523Du2bKF4CIOkFg_8uVIZ4Pfiu4PfvIqy2cf_HioM37DR5frI91_1AmqLkRen1qZA9C4nuuTj0n6eD2SfbGiiMDm9I-I9xM3tyEwSbLiTqg22GGjDEI8AObJ8zrEpeHKDyuKVWuSuZghJQ_6zK5QZkgKSd8AWsRbtsHzq6kiYOHLhkC50p1_sJDW3a8760sJCIHic4OndHbdn2q9b7XLqZKo_fDl_ye_vjM4JvxvxxHmGHNh6qcgfTAPYOtgw0LxpPIhzraSkOUTX_BZD5jYiAvYrTI3fuCsupQdxqp81aOeEQbr2KvmZTVLwc1yv03KIkYngSltXP7JONcZGSmNVPcqBKw3n2xuRhzTYX1EQe7Q4M1zlraSDOsbBY4GLK6QCb0guiyPGQj8Kd5ar4Y8PI7IlDDbx3JkolOjd9ZTe-QXuMs090pquhE7qXeZInAc7tjQqcvUO6Yg1Srq7dON-w%3D)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dc1dcc0a77f34b3eb18ea122875a696d&_e=HybW2hthm0gJpCopOuonAc1_7km4i_8B6iZssrY-rPW4Y7q-UD7U0oUmGujkJsgrVHeUoGhBqq4M68CCsfQzl3YvfEgA4XqPWnWs1qE_aJYR3IGTwaKGZdS-amvblCaaeUHRCuLxXdSXZPdUAWRS523Du2bKF4CIOkFg_8uVIZ4Pfiu4PfvIqy2cf_HioM37DR5frI91_1AmqLkRen1qZA9C4nuuTj0n6eD2SfbGiiMDm9I-I9xM3tyEwSbLiTqg22GGjDEI8AObJ8zrEpeHKDyuKVWuSuZghJQ_6zK5QZkgKSd8AWsRbtsHzq6kiYOHLhkC50p1_sJDW3a8760sJCIHic4OndHbdn2q9b7XLqZKo_fDl_ye_vjM4JvxvxxHmGHNh6qcgfTAPYOtgw0Lxpp1_dS3N9FQ1mWONSXHtVulC0TYTVMrfWlAkpZReiIF6PmxQi1qeGYnlXzUtYmaPaJSPHiRInAy1SL93ut6Rot-zEEYvi0Q5mLo1Hgl-DSGPEcJCD7Ti-r0HCgm1dmAR8DtpQqjPE8U03KJXlL3BSrpdfHX9uCBs_AFkOUliPDkggtPvnwthDtFYn8AsHF2Lg7i01IVCsny0xQUvWFA5yM%3D)**_

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dc1dcc0a77f34b3eb18ea122875a696d&_e=HybW2hthm0gJpCopOuonAc1_7km4i_8B6iZssrY-rPW4Y7q-UD7U0oUmGujkJsgrVHeUoGhBqq4M68CCsfQzl3YvfEgA4XqPWnWs1qE_aJYR3IGTwaKGZdS-amvblCaaeUHRCuLxXdSXZPdUAWRS523Du2bKF4CIOkFg_8uVIZ4Pfiu4PfvIqy2cf_HioM37DR5frI91_1AmqLkRen1qZA9C4nuuTj0n6eD2SfbGiiMDm9I-I9xM3tyEwSbLiTqg22GGjDEI8AObJ8zrEpeHKDyuKVWuSuZghJQ_6zK5QZkgKSd8AWsRbtsHzq6kiYOHLhkC50p1_sJDW3a8760sJCIHic4OndHbdn2q9b7XLqZKo_fDl_ye_vjM4JvxvxxHmGHNh6qcgfTAPYOtgw0LxjlgIbITuvgumubBskyPrFR0dnOuRc1J5dT2QCze8XwIQaJJgVHmAu68JL9W6z1wwz3gLEB07LQWrKzvBWREd8W1GaE9VQuTCSqBj4Wykdfow1DcW1k6NSCU7t3HrRsoNsnsuNS0s1aeUZ3QSiV_a4UtU71_6f6YFalnjft_q5iCaTmfAJ564VQD0v80-ewm9FB532yrkHfuM-GTLe9HLrE%3D)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

clean_body: America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. Peter, Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C. America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing. I can’t do this without your support. That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an Official Founding Supporter. This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win. At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda. This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder. I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country. I just have one simple question for you: WILL YOU JOIN ME? Thank you & God Bless America. Sarah Palin | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Team Oakley
subject: “Ambitious” 🙄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

First, Rep. Donald Payne Jr. called Imani unqualified. Now, he’s doing what all men do when they feel threatened by a supremely qualified, outspoken woman: he’s trying to paint her as “too ambitious.”

You know as well as we do that being ambitious is only a flaw when a woman does it, particularly a Black woman like Imani.

And you can bet that no one has EVER called Payne Jr. “too ambitious” — for good reason, too.

Payne Jr. hasn’t shown a single ounce of ambition during his 10 years in Congress. He’s barely lifted a finger to help our community through the challenges of the last decade. All he’s done is take corporate PAC money, do what special interests tell him to do, and ignore his constituents.

And you know what? Given the choice, we’d rather have a Congresswoman who’s ambitious — ambitious about securing housing as a human right, ambitious about securing universal healthcare, and ambitious about protecting our democracy — than a do-nothing Congressman who isn’t ambitious enough to put on pants for work, much less fight for our community.

If you agree that it’s time to elect a proud, ambitious, and outspoken progressive to fight for our community in Congress, click here to chip in $27 and help elect Imani Oakley. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=405ambitious]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=405ambitious] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=405ambitious]

Imani has worked for everything she’s earned. She earned three degrees, spent years working as an advocate for marginalized communities, and delivered critical victories in the fight against New Jersey’s corrupt political machine.

And if that makes her “ambitious”, then so be it.

It’s time for us to shake things up and elect a leader who has the ambition to deliver progressive change for our communities. Can you chip in $27 to help us do it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=405ambitious]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Oakley

name: Erica Smith
subject: Long overdue investment in rural communities 🌱 = a Rural New Deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
I’m fighting hard to give rural communities, like mine, a voice.
#
I grew up on my family’s farm in the heart of rural eastern North Carolina with my five siblings. A normal day began by waking up at the crack of dawn with my siblings (_yes, even on weekends and in the summer_) to pick cucumbers, corn, and do other chores around the farm.
**This was the same land where my ancestors were enslaved not that long ago.**
It’s where my great-grandfather, Pop Buster, became a sharecropper after being born into slavery. It’s where my mother grew up, and my mother’s mother — and I watched as three generations of my family waited for the same dirt road leading to our farm to be paved. _To this day,_ _it’s still unpaved_.
I’m a dirt-road Democrat, and I intimately understand the challenges facing rural communities like mine. [**_Can you donate $5 to my campaign today to send me to Congress where I’ll fight for rural communities in North Carolina’s First District and beyond._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48560?t=1&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48566?refcode=em20220411-1080&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)**
Our communities deserve more than unpaved roads, a GoFundMe healthcare system, and a dollar store economy. We deserve more than poverty and struggle.
**We need a Rural New Deal** — a bold vision that lifts up our families and small farms, breaks up Big Agriculture, raises the minimum wage, helps unionize the South, provides postal banking, high quality broadband, universal healthcare, **and more.**
Being a Democrat in a rural area can be hard, isolating, and challenging. _If that’s you, know that I see you and appreciate you_.
I’ll never stop believing in and fighting for our communities — and I’m ready to continue this fight in Congress.
I come from a humble background, and I don’t have millionaire friends or family to rely on for fundraising. That’s why I have to ask: [**Can you chip in $5 right now to our campaign to send a champion for rural North Carolinians to Congress?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48560?t=21&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)
Thank you for supporting me every step of the way,
Erica Smith
Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **_[Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48566?refcode=em20220411-1080-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)_** **[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48566?refcode=em20220411-1080-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220411-1080-footer&t=24&refcode2=1080_3698_p9pSQH&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1080%2E3698%2Ep9pSQH)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

clean_body: President Trump speaks highly of Ted Budd | Friends, President Trump released a special message surrounding the US Senate race in North Carolina and discussed the importance of an America First leader, like Ted Budd, winning the Republican nomination. | President Trump knows how important it is for the Republican Party to flip the US Senate in 2022 in order to revive the America First Agenda and get our country back on track. President Trump has fully endorsed Ted Budd, but needs YOUR help to get him to Washington! “Ted Budd is an outstanding person. He’s loved by, especially, the conservative wing of the party — highly respected guy.” If we take back the US Senate, we can take back America! Thanks for being part of the America First Movement! clean_body: Nancy Pelosi won’t even get a chance to rig elections | ARE YOU READY TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE? | Friends, I just came from an important meeting with the Miller-Meeks team, and Congresswoman Miller-Meeks reminded me that a year ago, Nancy Pelosi tried to steal her election. HAVE YOU FORGOTTEN WHAT HAPPENED: Nancy Pelosi asked for a recount even AFTER the election results were certified! WHY YOU SHOULD NOT FORGET: We need to start blowing this campaign’s goals out of the park so Pelosi doesn’t get another chance to take control of Iowa. Are you tired of rising gas prices, skyrocketing crime, and increasing inflation? I hate to break it to you, but it will only get WORSE if we don't take back the House. The Democrats do not have America’s best interest at heart! With all of your help, Nancy Pelosi won't have a chance to rig ANY elections. | "Miller-Meeks for Congress" | - "Miller-Meeks for Congress" | "Miller-Meeks for Congress" | "Miller-Meeks for Congress" WE ARE IN THIS TOGETHER! name: Jordan Moskowitz - Political Director
subject: In case you missed our Newsletter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=1)
---
### April 11, 2022
Hi Friend -- I wanted to make sure you saw the news from last week that conservatives dominated in spring elections throughout the state. Thank you to all those who supported our great candidates! **Our grassroots are fired up and the****momentum has never been more on our side.** Last week, Wisconsinites watched as conservatives in all corners of the state won big in the Spring Election – and we’re not stopping there. We look forward to carrying this energy into November as we turn our attention to re-electing Senator Ron Johnson, defeating Tony Evers, and winning at all levels of the ballot. We are still looking for patriots to get involved to help win these important races this fall! You can sign up to volunteer to help propel the Red Wave forward [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=2). \- Team WisGOP | While Democrats try to hang their hats on winning a mayoral race in a city where their party has routinely carried 80 percent of the vote, the enthusiasm for conservatives was clear in this week’s Spring Election. Across the state, conservatives were successful in roughly two-thirds of the races in which we were active, including swing and Democrat leaning areas. The Republican Party of Wisconsin worked with county parties throughout the state, providing financial assistance, data, walk apps for door knocking, in-person and virtual trainings, and voter guides. Some highlights included Maria Lazar’s victory that marked the second time an Evers appointee was defeated in the Second District Appellate Court, Samantha Kerkman becoming the first woman, and reportedly the first Republican, elected as Kenosha County Executive in a historically Democrat county, a conservative was elected County Executive in Portage County, and conservatives flipped County Boards in Calumet, Door, Kenosha, Marathon, Rock, Adams, and St. Croix Counties. You can read our recap press release on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0coD43uhuC0lkL-ug-GSI10sdniJZJq-u2PdbOlVOTukV-q-lxyXAQNmdeAet6jubQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=3). | |
Ahead of the Spring Election, Senator Johnson rallied conservatives in all corners of the Badger State – from Manitowoc, to Calumet, to Brown, to Dane, to Washington Counties. We are grateful for his work to emphasize the importance of getting involved in the community and support of our local elected officials! You can watch a clip of his remarks at our Green Bay GOTV event [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TniGTJRrb5Q4HW8Eq_SWRj_jwqZkKue_flH0cUIcuhuqI91qJeEQS5IYfDCB1PYsQ7cPkJPaL_j60QTyYqwqWqyKZc3Uq2-zeqfpYYVIczVc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=4).
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=5) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=6)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**Tony Evers Refuses to Endorse Lousy Lieutenant Governor**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0QEdzyi2YazwRkYqPDIwQNpAutuFdtRPSlKJ5ZgwXfjv6L5xpAQsK-7-4tj9dcbcZ-dXdK70P1T2Jktj4_N8Ex0KN5mDpWXEChwjZAavvG4H&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=7)_
Despite three years by Evers’ side as lieutenant governor, Mandela Barnes has failed to earn enough confidence from his boss to receive his endorsement. During a WisPolitics luncheon last month, Tony Evers said that he didn’t have a favorite in the Democrats’ U.S. Senate primary. While unfortunate for Barnes, it’s no wonder that the re-election minded governor doesn’t want to back a far-left candidate trying to win over the hearts of the most liberal fringe of his party.
### _[**Republicans Are Winning on Education**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bjXko_-Y86syUCmtZ1xdHx2cI4C8pLiUCtc18i_0zutnaVYpDtF5fu3TXzG6oo3ew&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=8)_
Conservatives’ success in school board elections is a testament to both the strength of Republicans’ infrastructure and to the fact that parents are fed up with far-left influence in our children’s education. After two years of greater attention on divisive curriculum, school closures, and mask mandates, parents are responding by standing up and participating in local elections – and they’ll do so again in November.
### _[**More Hypocrisy from Democrat U.S. Senate Wannabes**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0Wi7p6sZwIsHsKGMDKLQH36eGOfTn177elqO8bJJZjX2eXU7jEu9vST1F5Fect1LE3OowhTgc4D3O1dhncbt_7Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=9)_
When the Democrat candidates for U.S. Senate aren’t committing election year flip-flops on divisive issues, proposing dangerous far-left ideas to appease their base, lying about their resume, or otherwise making caricatures of themselves, they’re purporting to stand on principles while personally profiting from the opposite. The Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reported that both Sarah Godlewski and Alex Lasry have invested in companies that directly contradict the values they claim to support.
### **Worth the Read**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=zN5gEYXLykR0kv-yDZpGDXJgaybYGUjh8lGY6yo_px1grLKHM7fM98KRODA0CreyAd9_169Pm-lT474xiPZZoayUgfuFbi6_tPm_EkiS_FlU2GH90zTHh9_A9cKR0sTkdFI6QWHPX0tRQza6b-YpfGr1YUzWIQGUoiRRuAfOSDbLOH8Sw-qbD9oHgQTYW8SDTrU_qVZJNZWXjutbwH6bwdHRSW_qxmNRsGdfj6TgJ4xofq60QM0l0S4wM7u9iu-D&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=10) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=OwehQGnYjrzpIc0rxaR28Zg-3pjG8881iwbsJF1GviCZSzxOB2Tp1U5xyAtnChYEmmz1qJiqrYY3Co0Aim1Tbd_pMsMyvNlNT2Gj0UB87WqE2oidUONSz_DNt8hkQPb91YZ_k0pEBscYRCbXnAyCcIrdsygjJycyzaSQOBlgtth_EJnbuKH05yJZDDP_9o_d&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=11) | | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fK2ahIWiS9Ox8vF_WSlPx8yCM2aaDuFRaHqhqL5lgVdZtC1xws3hDOGiRzMMLaoeFM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=12) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwLEd4bQ53T8vLOWx9bXpluDSR0hfacQFBrTfeoKmZtZV-DGHjE_mIGh52RQ7vLOEWSXxpxn29zseHcTPSvudnjM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_nl_2&n=13)
---|---|---
* * *
